IVI-C Programming Guide and KtNA Driver Reference Keysight Technologies 
Functions and Attributes

Functions

Name Description
KtNA_AFRGetCalibrationReference Returns the the calibration reference Z0 type.
KtNA_AFRGetFixtureDataFile Returns the file paths of saved fixture data.
KtNA_AFRGetImpedanceAtSpecificPosition Reads the impedance profile of the calculated fixture model at a specified position.
KtNA_AFRInitialize Restores the default AFR settings.
KtNA_AFRQueryImpedanceProfile Reads the impedance profile of the calculated fixture model.
KtNA_AFRRefreshPreview Refreshes preview data.
KtNA_AFRSelectCalibrationReference Chooses the calibration reference Z0 after fixture removal.
KtNA_AFRSelectCalibrationReferenceWithUserInput Chooses the calibration reference Z0 after fixture removal.
KtNA_AFRSetFixtureDataFilePath Specifies the file paths of saved fixture data.
KtNA_AFRStandardGetDataFilePath Returns the file path of existing measurement data.
KtNA_AFRStandardGetFixtureLength For the selected fixture, this method reads the fixture length for both 1X or 2X AFR.
KtNA_AFRStandardGetFixtureThruSetting Specifies fixture thru settings.
KtNA_AFRStandardGetGatePosition Reads the gate position for the selected fixture.
KtNA_AFRStandardGetImpedanceAtSpecificPosition This command reads the impedance of the measured standard at a specified position.
KtNA_AFRStandardGetSelectedStandards Returns the string of used standards, separated by commas.
KtNA_AFRStandardLoadData Loads the calibration standards data from a file.
KtNA_AFRStandardQueryImpedanceProfile Reads the impedance profile of the measured standard.
KtNA_AFRStandardSelectCalibrationStandard Chooses the calibration standards.
KtNA_AFRStandardSelectCalibrationStandardWithEnable Chooses the calibration standards.
KtNA_AFRStandardSetFixtureLength For the selected fixture, this method sets the fixture length for 1X AFR.
KtNA_AFRStandardSetFixtureThru Specifies fixture thru settings.
KtNA_AFRStandardSetFixtureThruWithThruLength Specifies fixture thru settings.
KtNA_AFRStandardSetGatePosition Sets the gate position for the selected fixture.
KtNA_AFRStandardSetImpedance Sets the impedance for the selected impedance term.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionAdd Adds an instance of the Cal All Session.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionAttenuationGetReceiverPowerLevel Returns the Receiver Attenuator setting for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionAttenuationGetSourcePowerLevel Returns the Source Attenuator setting for the Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionAttenuationSetReceiverPowerLevel Sets the Receiver Attenuator setting for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionAttenuationSetSourcePowerLevel Sets the Source Attenuator setting for the Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionDelete Removes an instance of the Cal All Session that was previously added by the user.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionDeleteAll Removes all instances of the Calibration All Sessions that were previously added by the user.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGetCalSetCatalog Returns the User Cal Set or cal register names that were produced by the cal all session.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGetPorts For each channel to be calibrated, returns the ports to be calibrated. Specify port numbers ONLY for standard channels.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGetPowerLevel Returns the power level at which a Cal All calibration is to be performed.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGetPowerOffset Returns the power offset value for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGetSelectedChannels Returns the list of channels to be calibrated during the Cal All session.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGuidedCalGetChannelList Returns all cal all guided calibration channels.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGuidedCalGetPortList Returns the ports to be calibrated during the Cal All Channels calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionGuidedCalGetPrimaryChannelNumber Returns the primary guided calibration channel number if more than one channel exists; otherwise, this command returns the one value.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalAddRange This command adds a power cal range for a specific port.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalClearAllRanges This command resets all ranges for the given source port
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalGetPortCatalog This command queries how many ranges are included in the calibration for source port..
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalGetRangeCount This command queries how many ranges are included in the calibration for source port.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalGetRangePoints This command gets the number of points for given range for source port.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalGetRangeStart This command gets the start frequency for given range for source port.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalGetRangeStop This command gets the stop frequency for given range for source port.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalSetRangePoints This command sets the number of points for given range for source port
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalSetRangeStart This command sets the start frequency for given range for source port.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionIndependentPowerCalSetRangeStop This command sets the stop frequency for given range for source port
KtNA_CalibrationSessionMeasurementClassGetPropertyCatalog Returns the unique, settable properties for the current cal all session.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionMeasurementClassGetPropertyValue Returns the property value for a specific property name.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionMeasurementClassGetPropertyValueCatalog Returns the valid property values for a specific property name.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionMeasurementClassSetPropertyValue Sets the property value for a specific property name.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionQueryPathConfiguration Returns the Path Configuration settings for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionReset Resets all properties associated with the Cal All session to their default values.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionSelectChannels Sets the list of channels to be calibrated during the Cal All session.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionSetPathConfiguration Sets the Path Configuration settings for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionSetPorts For each channel to be calibrated, sets the ports to be calibrated. Specify port numbers ONLY for standard channels.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionSetPowerLevel Sets the power level at which a Cal All calibration is to be performed.
KtNA_CalibrationSessionSetPowerOffset Sets the power offset value for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_CalSetsCascadeFixtures Combines the losses and phase shift of two S2P files into a single S2P file.
KtNA_CalSetsCharacterizeFixture Characterizes a fixture based on two Cal Sets.
KtNA_CalSetsCharacterizeFixtureWithPhasePivot Characterizes a fixture based on two Cal Sets.
KtNA_CalSetsCopy Creates a new Cal Set and copies the current Cal Set data into it.
KtNA_CalSetsCreateS4PFile Creates a new S4P file.
KtNA_CalSetsDeembedFixture De-embeds a fixture from an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_CalSetsDeembedFixtureWithExtrapolationEnable De-embeds a fixture from an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_CalSetsDelete Deletes the specified Cal Set from the VNA.
KtNA_CalSetsDeleteAll Deletes ALL Cal Sets from the VNA, including phase reference and Global Delta Match Cal Sets.
KtNA_CalSetsEmbedENRFile Generate a new ENR file by embedding an adapter to an existing ENR file.
KtNA_CalSetsEmbedFixture Embeds a fixture (usually a matching network) into an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_CalSetsEmbedFixtureWithExtrapolationEnable Embeds a fixture (usually a matching network) into an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_CalSetsErrorTermGetCatalog Returns a list of error term names for the given Cal Set.
KtNA_CalSetsErrorTermQueryData Returns the error term data (real, imaginary pairs) for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_CalSetsErrorTermQueryXFrequencies Returns the x-axis frequencies for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_CalSetsErrorTermSetData Sets the error term data (real, imaginary pairs) for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_CalSetsErrorTermSetXFrequencies Sets the x-axis frequencies for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_CalSetsGetCatalog Returns the names of Cal Sets stored on the VNA.
KtNA_CalSetsGetItemList The catalog query returns a list of item names contained in the specific Cal Set being queried.
KtNA_CalSetsGetValidation This query compares the stimulus of "channelNo" with the stimulus stored in the specified calset.
KtNA_CalSetsIsPresent Returns whether or not the specified Cal Set exists on the VNA.
KtNA_CalSetsQueryDateTime Returns the Date(year, month, day) and Time(hour, minute, second) that the specified Cal Set was last saved.
KtNA_CalSetsQueryItemData Returns the VNA Measurement Class or Channel that created the specific Cal Set item.
KtNA_ChannelAbort Stops all sweeps - then resume per current trigger settings.
KtNA_ChannelActiveParametersGetTraceInputPower Reads a fixed trace input power level.
KtNA_ChannelActiveParametersSetTraceInputPower Set a fixed trace input power level.
KtNA_ChannelActiveParametersSweepQueryType Reads the sweep type.
KtNA_ChannelActiveParametersSweepSetType Set the sweep type. Default LIN.
KtNA_ChannelAddMeasurement Creates a measurement but does NOT display it, on an existing or new channel.
KtNA_ChannelApplyCalSet Selects and applies a Cal Set to the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelAveragingRestart Clears and restarts averaging of the measurement data. Does NOT apply to point averaging.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitDelete Deletes installed cal kits.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleAdd Add repeated capability instance for Ecal Module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationAcquire Initiates the measurement of the ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationGetConnectorCatalog Returns a list of connector names that are valid for use with user-characterized ECal modules.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationGetConnectorType Returns a connector type name for every ECal module port used during the user characterization.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationGetDescription Reads the description of the adapters, cable, or fixture to be included in the user characterization.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationGetNoOfSteps Returns the number of steps required to measure the ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationGetStepDescription Returns the connection description for the specified step of the ECal user characterization process.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationInitiate Initiates an ECal User Characterization.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationInitiateWithECalMemory Initiates an ECal User Characterization.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationIsCalpodModule Returns whether the device is a CalPod module, which is capable of being characterized as an in-situ device.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationSave Completes an ECal user characterization by writing the characterization data to the VNA disk.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationSaveToECalMemory Completes an ECal user characterization by writing the characterization data to the ECal module memory.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationSetConnectorType Specifies a connector type name for every ECal module port used during the user characterization. Default No "Adapter".
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleCharacterizationSetDescription Sets the description of the adapters, cable, or fixture to be included in the user characterization. Default "Empty String".
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleDelete Deletes repeated capability instance for Ecal Module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleDeleteAll Deletes all repeated capability instances for Ecal Module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleDeleteCharacterization Deletes user characterizations from VNA disk memory.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleExportCharacterization Saves an existing ECal characterization to a file.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleGetCharacterizationInfo Reads the identification and characterization information from the specified ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleGetCharacterizationInfoVNADisk Reads the identification and characterization information from the specified ECal module or VNA disk memory.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleGetCharacterizationList Returns a list of characterizations stored in the specified ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleGetData Returns the data for a state from the memory of the selected ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleGetList Returns a list of index numbers for ECal modules that are currently attached to the VNA.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleGetNoOfStates Returns the number of unique states that exist for the specified path name on the selected ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleGetPort Returns the ECal port that is connected to the specified VNA port.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitECalModuleImportCharacterization After the VNA disk memory is Exported to a file, use this command to Import the file into VNA disk memory, which allows the User Characterization to be used with the VNA and ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitExport Saves an existing ECal characterization to a file.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitGetCount Returns the number of installed cal kits.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitImport After the VNA disk memory is Exported to a file, use this command to Import the file into VNA disk memory, which allows the User Characterization to be used with the VNA and ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitImportFile After the VNA disk memory is Exported to a file, use this command to Import the file into VNA disk memory, which allows the User Characterization to be used with the VNA and ECal module.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitLoad Loads the specified collection of cal kits from a .wks file.
KtNA_ChannelCalKitRestore Restores default factory installed cal kits.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsCopy Creates a new Cal Set and copies the current Cal Set data into it.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsCreate Creates an empty Cal Set and attaches it to the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsCreateDefault Creates a unity Cal Set useful for debugging or to quickly test a prototype of automation software.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsGetCalTypeCatalog Returns a list of Cal Sets.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsGetErrorTermCatalog Returns a list of error term names found in the current Cal Set that is applied to the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsGetItemCatalog Returns the names of the items n the Cal Set.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsGetItemData Read the value of the Cal Set item.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsGetPortMapping Reads the port mapping used for the specified Cal Set.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsGetStandardCatalog Returns a list of available standard name found in the current Cal Set that is applied to the specific channel.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsGetTestsetType Reads the test set type (model) used for the specified Cal Set.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsQueryData Reads a specific error term from/to the Cal Set currently attached to the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsQueryErrorTermData Returns error term data for all VNA measurements.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsQueryStandardData Returns standard data.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsQueryStimulusValues Returns the source or response stimulus values for the Cal Set that is currently used by channel.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsQueryStimulusValuesWithFreqRange Returns the source or response stimulus values for the Cal Set that is currently used by channel.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsSave Saves the channel's Cal Set to the VNA hard drive.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsSaveModified This command saves the modified Cal Set to the VNA hard drive so that it can be reused.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsSaveWithUser Saves the channel's Cal Set to the VNA hard drive.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsSetData Write a specific error term from/to the Cal Set currently attached to the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsSetErrorTermData Sets error term data for all VNA measurements.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsSetStandardData Sets standard data.
KtNA_ChannelCalSetsUnselect Unselects a Cal Set from the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelCopy Copies ALL settings from the selected channel to another channel.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionAcquire For UNGUIDED calibration, measures the specified standards from the selected calibration kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionAcquireWithSync For UNGUIDED calibration, measures the specified standards from the selected calibration kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionApplyErrorTerms Applies error terms to the measurement that is selected.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitConnectorAdd Creates a new connector. The connector is automatically added to the list of available connectors for the currently selected cal kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitConnectorDelete Deletes the primary connector family name from the selected kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitConnectorGetCatalog Returns a comma-separated list of all connectors defined within the currently selected cal kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitConnectorGetStandardFamilyName Returns a family name to the currently selected standard from the currently selected kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitConnectorSetStandardFamilyName Assigns a family name to the currently selected standard from the currently selected kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitGetCalClass Returns the calibration class for the standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitGetCatalog Returns the names of the first 95 mechanical cal kits in your VNA that can be used for unguided calibrations.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitGetClassLabel Returns the label for the standard classes.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitGetSelectedByName Returns the name of the Cal Kit to use for Unguided cal.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitGetSelectedByNo Returns (makes active) a calibration kit for performing an UNGUIDED calibration or for modifying standards.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitSelectByName Sets the name of the Cal Kit to use for Unguided cal. Default Last kit selected.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitSelectByNo Selects (makes active) a calibration kit for performing an UNGUIDED calibration or for modifying standards. Default Last kit selected.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitSetCalClass Assigns the calibration class for the standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitSetClassLabel Defines the label for the standard classes.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardDelete Deletes the selected standard from the selected cal kit.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardGetCapacitance Returns the C0, C1, C2 and C3 value (the first, second, third and fourth capacitance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardGetInductance Returns the L0, L1, L2 and L3 value (the first, second, third and fourth inductance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardGetSelected Returns the calibration standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardLoadData Loads response (and optionally accuracy) data from a file for the selected database standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardQueryType Returns the type for the selected standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardSelect Selects the calibration standard. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardSetCapacitance Sets the C0, C1, C2 and C3 value (the first, second, third and fourth capacitance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardSetInductance Sets the L0, L1, L2 and L3 value (the first, second, third and fourth inductance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionCalKitStandardSetType Sets the type for the selected standard.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionClearAllFlags Clears ALL flags for channels to sweep during calibration.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionConfidenceCheckAcquire Reads the 'confidence data' associated with the specified ECal module and puts it into memory.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionConfidenceCheckAcquireWithChar Reads the 'confidence data' associated with the specified ECal module and puts it into memory.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionConfidenceCheckConclude Concludes the Confidence Check and sets the ECal module back into the idle state.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionDisableAllWindows Clears the flags for windows to be shown during calibrations.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionGetCalTypeCatalog Lists the Cal Types in the VNA by either GUID or registered name.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionNoiseGetLOPowerCalEnabled Return the state of LO power calibration for NFX.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionNoiseSetLOPowerCalEnabled Enables and disables LO power calibration for NFX.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPortSubsetQueryFullPortList Specify the ports allowed to participate in a multiport calibration.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPortSubsetQueryResponsePortList Returns the ports that can be corrected using lesser corrections (enhanced response).
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPortSubsetReset Reset the the full and response list of the port subset correction.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPortSubsetSetFullPortList Specify the ports allowed to participate in a multiport calibration.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPortSubsetSetResponsePortList Specify the ports that can be corrected using lesser corrections (enhanced response).
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPreferenceGetECalPortMapping This command returns the port mapping (which ports of the module are connected to which ports of the VNA) prior to performing ECal calibrations.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPreferenceIsTriggerFree Returns the preference for the trigger behavior during a calibration.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPreferenceSetECalPortMapping This command specifies the port mapping (which ports of the module are connected to which ports of the VNA) prior to performing ECal calibrations. Default Null String.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionPreferenceSetTriggerFree Sets the preference for the trigger behavior during a calibration. Default OFF for both calibration types.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionQueryENRCalData Read the ENR (Excess Noise Ratio) calibration data.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionSave For UNGUIDED calibrations ONLY.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionSetENRCalData Set and read the ENR (Excess Noise Ratio) calibration data.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionSetFlagEnabled Specifies an alternate channel (other than the calibration channel) to be viewed while using the calibration wizard. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelCorrectionSetWindowEnabled Set the 'show' state of the window to be displayed during a calibration to view the measurements/channels. Default off.
KtNA_ChannelDCGetCurrentRange Reads the range (in Amps) used for sensing current, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_ChannelDCGetSampleCount Reads the DC measurement number of sample counts per one point measurement.
KtNA_ChannelDCGetSampleTime Reads the DC measurement time per one point measurement .
KtNA_ChannelDCGetTriggerOffset Reads the trigger offset in the measurement sweep.
KtNA_ChannelDCGetVoltageRange Reads the range (in Volts) used for sensing voltage, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_ChannelDCSetCurrentRange Sets the range (in Amps) used for sensing current, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_ChannelDCSetSampleCount Sets the DC measurement number of sample counts per one point measurement.
KtNA_ChannelDCSetSampleTime Sets the DC measurement time per one point measurement .
KtNA_ChannelDCSetTriggerOffset Sets the trigger offset in the measurement sweep.
KtNA_ChannelDCSetVoltageRange Sets the range (in Volts) used for sensing voltage, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_ChannelDelete Deletes the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelDeleteAllMeasurements Deletes all measurements on the VNA.
KtNA_ChannelDIQAddFrequencyRange Adds a frequency range using the next available range name.
KtNA_ChannelDIQCreateParameter Create a new parameter for Differential IQ channel.
KtNA_ChannelDIQDeleteFrequencyRange Deletes the specified frequency range.
KtNA_ChannelDIQDeleteParameter Deletes the named parameter.
KtNA_ChannelDIQGetFrequencyRangeCount Returns the number of frequency ranges in the DIQ channel. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelDIQGetParameterCatalog Returns a list of all existing parameters.
KtNA_ChannelDIQLoad Recalls the list of parameters and frequency ranges settings from a previously-saved .xml file.
KtNA_ChannelDIQLoadWithSetting Recalls the list of parameters and frequency ranges settings from a previously-saved .xml file.
KtNA_ChannelDIQSave Stores the list of parameters and frequency ranges settings to an .xml file for recall at a later time.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionAutotune Auto tunes all measurement bands for the modulation distortion channel.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionBandTableAddParameter Adds the specified parameter to the Distortion Table.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionBandTableDeleteParameter Deletes the specified parameter from the Distortion Table.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionBandTableGetCatalog Returns a list of existing band names from the Measurement Band Table.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionBandTableGetDataParameterCatalog Returns a list of data parameter names corresponding to the currently specified Measurement Type.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionBandTableGetDisplayCatalog Returns the currently displayed Distortion Table parameters.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionBandTableQueryData Returns a list of data values from the Distortion Table for the specified band and parameter name.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionBandTableSave Specifies the file path to save a modulation distortion table file.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionCarrierAdd Adds a new row to the power sweep list table.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionCarrierDelete Deletes the specified row from the power sweep list table.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionCarrierLoad Specifies the file path to recall a previous power sweep list file.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionCarrierSave Specifies the file path to save a power sweep list file.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionMeasureAddBand Adds a new distortion measurement band.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionMeasureAutofillBands Automatically fills in the measurement settings for all bands from the currently active modulation file loaded in the source.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionMeasureDeleteBand Deletes the specified distortion measurement band.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionMeasureGetBandCount Queries the total number of distortion measurement bands.
KtNA_ChannelDistortionMeasureInitialize This command ignores any specified band number and deletes all existing bands and adds a single default band back into the Measurement Band Table.
KtNA_ChannelDSPFilterGetCoefficients Returns the digital filter coefficients of the specified stage.
KtNA_ChannelDSPFilterGetError Returns the error string associated with the digital filters.
KtNA_ChannelDSPFilterGetStage3Catalog Returns a list of strings for the currently supported filter types that can be used for the stage 3 filter.
KtNA_ChannelDSPFilterGetStage3ParameterCatalog Returns a list of the available parameters for the currently selected filter type.
KtNA_ChannelDSPFilterGetTapsCount Returns the number of taps in the digital filter of the specified stage.
KtNA_ChannelDSPFilterSetCoefficients Sets the digital filter coefficients of the specified stage.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveApply Copies the draft fixture to active fixture.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveCheckReversedPorts Returns whether or not the ports on an existing S2P file are reversed.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetAllCircuitsEnabled Returns all circuits ON or OFF for all ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetAllPortExtensionsEnabled Returns the port extensions ON or OFF for all ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetAllZConversionsEnabled Returns all ZConversions ON or OFF (both SE and BAL).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitCapacitance Returns the capacitance circuit element for the specified circuit. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitCatalog Returns a comma-separated list of circuit numbers created in the draft circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitConductance Returns the conductance circuit element for the specified circuit. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitEnabled Returns the circuit ON or OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitFilename Returns the filename.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitInductance Returns the inductance circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitLoss Returns the loss at DC.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitPortList Returns the VNA ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetCircuitResistance Returns the resistance circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetDevicePortList Returns the Device ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetModifyState Returns the current state of the Modify setting.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetPortExtensionDelay Returns the delay value in time.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetResistanceInput Returns the resistance (R) value at input of transformer (real only).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveGetResistanceOutput Returns the resistance (R) value at output of transformer (real only).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveIsCircuitEmbedded Returns whether the circuit is embedded or de-embedded.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveIsExtrapolationEnabled Returns whether or not extrapolation is allowed
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveLoadTopology Loads an active fixture from a file.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetDCLoss Returns the Port Loss at DC value for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetDelay Returns the delay value in time at the specified port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetDelayDistanceUnit Returns the units for specifying port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetDelayInDistance Returns the port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetEnabled Returns the state of port extension for the specified port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetFreqLossPairEnabled Returns the ON or OFF state for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetFreqLossPairFrequency Returns the frequency for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetLossValue Returns the Loss value for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetMedium Reurns the media type of the added fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetPowerCompEnabled Returns on power compensation for the active fixture.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetVelFactorCoupEnabled Returns the state of coupling with the system Velocity Factor value.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetVelocityFactor Returns the velocity factor of the fixture or added transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetWaveguideCoupEnabled Returns the state of coupling with the system waveguide value.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtGetWaveguideCutoffFreq Returns the cuttoff (minimum) frequency of the added waveguide fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActivePortExtSetPowerCompEnabled Sets power compensation for the active fixture
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveSave Saves SNP file corresponding to the entire active fixture.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveSaveTopology Saves the current active fixture topology to a file.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetComplexImp Returns the complex impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetComplexImpForLogicalPort Returns the complex impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetEnabled Returns the differential or commonmode port impedance conversion function ON/OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetScalarImp Returns the real part of impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetScalarImpForLogicalPort Returns the real part of impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetSingleEndedComplexImp Returns the complex impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetSingleEndedEnabled Returns the single-ended impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorActiveZConvGetSingleEndedScalarImp Returns the real part of impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetParameter Returns the measurement parameter for the specified trace. Default Sdd11.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetParameterCatalog This query returns the list of measurement parameters available for the currently selected device type and topology.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPhaseOffset Returns the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPhaseOffsetForLogicalPort Returns the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPhaseStart Returns the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPhaseStartForLogicalPort Returns the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPhaseStop Returns the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPhaseStopForLogicalPort Returns the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPowerOffset Returns the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetPowerOffsetForLogicalPort Returns the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetTopology Returns the mapping of the VNA ports to the DUT ports for the specified Balanced measurement device.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasGetTrueModeEnabled Reads the True Mode state for a specified balanced port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetParameter Selects the measurement parameter for the specified trace.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPhaseOffset Sets the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPhaseOffsetForLogicalPort Sets the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPhaseStart Sets the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPhaseStartForLogicalPort Sets the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPhaseStop Sets the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPhaseStopForLogicalPort Sets the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPowerOffset Sets the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetPowerOffsetForLogicalPort Sets the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetTopology Sets the mapping of the VNA ports to the DUT ports for the specified Balanced measurement device.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorBalMeasSetTrueModeEnabled Sets the True Mode state for a specified balanced port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftAddCircuit Create a block of the specified block type with the specified fixture port count.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftApply Copies the draft fixture to active fixture.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftDeleteCircuit Deletes the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftDiscard Copies the active fixture into scratch/draft fixture (discards changes on scratch/draft fixture)
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitCapacitance Returns the capacitance (C) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitCatalog
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitConductance Returns the conductance (G) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitEmbedType Sets whether the circuit should be embedded or de-embedded.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitEnabled Returns the circuit ON and OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitFilename Returns the filename.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitImpedance Returns the impedance (Z0) for the ideal block (scalar value).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitInductance Returns the inductance (L) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitLoss Returns the loss at DC.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitPortList Returns the VNA ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetCircuitResistance Returns the resistance (R) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetDevicePorts Returns the Device ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetExtrapolationEnabled Returns whether or not extrapolation is allowed.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetModifyState Returns reflection and crosstalk parameters modify setting on the DUT side.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetPortExtensionDelay Returns port extension delay in time.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetResistanceInput Returns the resistance (R) value at input of transformer (real only).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetResistanceOutput Returns the resistance (R) value at output of transformer (real only).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftGetReversePortsEnabled Returns whether or not the ports on an existing S2P file are reversed .
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetDCLoss Returns the Port Loss at DC value for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetDelay Returns the delay value in time at the specified port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetDelayDistanceUnit Returns the units for specifying port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetDelayInDistance Returns the port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetEnabled Returns the state of port extension for the specified port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetFreqLossPairEnabled Returns the ON or OFF state for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetFreqLossPairFrequency Returns the frequency for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetLossValue Returns the Loss value for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetMediumType Returns the media type of the added fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetVelFactorCoupEnabled Returns the state of coupling with the system Velocity Factor value.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetVelocityFactor Sets the velocity factor of the fixture or added transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetWaveguideCouplingEnabled Returns the state of coupling with the system waveguide value.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtGetWaveguideCutOffFreq Returns the cuttoff (minimum) frequency of the added waveguide fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtMoveToEnd
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetDCLoss Sets and returns the Port Loss at DC value for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetDelay Sets the delay value in time at the specified port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetDelayDistanceUnit Sets the units for specifying port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetDelayInDistance Sets the port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetEnabled Sets and returns the state of port extension for the specified port.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetFreqLossPairEnabled Sets the ON or OFF state for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetFreqLossPairFrequency Sets the frequency for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetLossValue Sets the Loss value for the specified port number.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetMediumType Sets the media type of the added fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetVelFactorCoupEnabled Sets the state of coupling with the system Velocity Factor value.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetVelocityFactor Sets the velocity factor of the fixture or added transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetWaveguideCoupEnabled Sets the state of coupling with the system waveguide value.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftPortExtSetWaveguideCutOffFreq Sets the cuttoff (minimum) frequency of the added waveguide fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftResetCircuit Resets the circuit section to preset values
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSave Saves SNP file corresponding to the entire scratch or draft fixture.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitCapacitance Sets the capacitance (C) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitConductance Sets the conductance (G) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitEmbedType Sets whether the circuit should be embedded or de-embedded.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitEnabled Turns the circuit ON and OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitFilename Sets the filename.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitImpedance Sets the impedance (Z0) for the ideal block (scalar value).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitInductance Sets the inductance (L) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitLoss Sets the loss at DC.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitPortList Sets the VNA ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetCircuitResistance Sets the resistance (R) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetDevicePorts Sets the Device ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetExtrapolationEnabled Sets whether or not extrapolation is allowed.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetModifyState Sets all reflection and crosstalk parameters on the DUT side to zero.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetPortExtensionDelay Sets port extension delay in time.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetResistanceInput Sets the resistance (R) value at input of transformer (real only).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetResistanceOutput Sets the resistance (R) value at output of transformer (real only).
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftSetReversePortsEnabled Sets whether or not to reverse the ports on an existing S2P file.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetComplexImp Gets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetComplexImpForLogicalPort Gets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetEnabled Returns the specified port impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetScalarImp Gets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetScalarImpForLogicalPort Gets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetSingleEndedComplexImp Returns the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetSingleEndedEnabled Returns the state of the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvGetSingleEndedScalarImp Gets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetComplexImp Sets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetComplexImpForLogicalPort Sets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetEnabled Returns the specified port impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetScalarImp Sets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetScalarImpForLogicalPort Sets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetSingleEndedComplexImp Sets the complex impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetSingleEndedEnabled Sets the single-ended impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorDraftZConvSetSingleEndedScalarImp Sets the real part of impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_ChannelFixtureSimulatorIsLegacyCommandUsed Returns 1 if user is only using legacy SCPI fixture commands. If the user has used the GUI or new SCPI commands to create a fixture, it will return 0. Default 1
KtNA_ChannelFOMGetCatalog Returns a comma-separated list of available range names in the VNA.
KtNA_ChannelFOMGetRangeName Returns the name of range.
KtNA_ChannelFOMGetRangeNo Returns the number of a specified range name.
KtNA_ChannelFOMGetRangeNoCount Returns the number of valid range numbers in the VNA.
KtNA_ChannelGainCompressionGetDUTInputPortNo Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Input. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelGainCompressionGetDUTOutputPortNo Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Output. Default 2.
KtNA_ChannelGainCompressionGetFailureFrequencyList Returns a comma-separated list of the frequency indexes that were out of tolerance for SMART Sweep mode, or at the power limit for 2D acquisition modes.
KtNA_ChannelGainCompressionSetPortMapping Set the DUT-to-VNA port mapping for the Gain Compression measurement.
KtNA_ChannelGetActiveChannel Returns the number of the active channel.
KtNA_ChannelGetCatalog Returns the channel numbers currently in use.
KtNA_ChannelGetMeasurementCatalog Returns ALL measurement numbers.
KtNA_ChannelGetMeasurementClassName Returns the measurement class name of the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelGetRefOscillatorCatalog Reads the list of available reference oscillator.
KtNA_ChannelGetRefOscillatorCondition Reads the Reference Oscillator 'locked' condition.
KtNA_ChannelGetSelectedCalSet Returns the name of the Cal Set that is applied to the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelGetTopology
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAbort Aborts the acquiring of a guided calibration that has been initialized but has not yet been concluded using the save command.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedConfigureThruAdapter
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedDeltaMatchCalApplyCalSet Specifies a Delta Match Cal Set to be used for delta match correction.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedDeltaMatchCalGetPortList Returns the port numbers for which delta match correction is required.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedDeltaMatchCalInitiateGlobal Initiates a global delta match calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedECalAcquire Execute the Ecal calibration with specified Ecal.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedECalGetMeasParameterCatalog Returns a comma-delimited CSV string of measurement parameters (with parameter names) for STANn at State x.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedECalGetStateCatalog Returns an array of ecal states used for the standard number.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedECalQueryMeasurementData Returns the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal and for a specific state of an ECal.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedECalSetMeasurementData Sets the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal and for a specific state of an ECal.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedGetCalMethod Returns the calibration method for each port pair.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedGetThruAdapterCount
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedGetThruMethod Returns the calibration THRU method for each port pair.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedGetThruPortPairs For calibrating more than 2-ports ONLY. Returns the port pairs for the Thru connections of the calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedRemoveAllAdapters
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedSetAdapterDelay
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedSetAdapterDelayWithWGDelay
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedSetAdapterDelayWithWGPhase
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedSetAdapterDescription
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedSetCalMethod Specifies the calibration method for each port pair.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedSetThruMethod Specifies the calibration THRU method for each port pair.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationAdvancedSetThruPortPairs For calibrating more than 2-ports ONLY. Specifies the port pairs for the Thru connections of the calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationErrorTermCompute Computes the error correction terms, turns Correction ON, and saves the calibration to an existing, specified Cal Set.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationErrorTermLoad Loads 1-port error terms from a Cal Set into the current Guided Cal sequence.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationErrorTermLoadWithFromPortNo Loads 1-port error terms from a Cal Set into the current Guided Cal sequence.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationGetCalKitCatalog Returns a comma-separated list of valid kits that use the specified connector type.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationGetConnectorCatalog Returns a list of valid connectors based on the connector descriptions of the available cal kits.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationGetConnectorType Returns a DUT connector type for every port during the Guided Calibration procedure.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationGetNumberOfSteps Returns the number of measurement steps required to complete the current guided calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationGetPortList Returns the list of ports being calibrated by an active calibration session.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationGetSelectedCalKit Returns the calibration kit (mechanical or ECal) for each port to be used during a guided calibration. An unused port does NOT need to have a specified Cal Kit.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationInitiate Initiates a guided calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationInitiateWithMatchAndSync Initiates a guided calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationIsolationQueryPaths Returns the paths (port pairs) to make isolation measurements on during a guided calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationIsolationSetPathsAddOrRemove Specifies the paths (port pairs) to make isolation measurements on during a guided calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationIsolationSetPathsAllOrNone Specifies the paths (port pairs) to make isolation measurements on during a guided calibration.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationSave Completes the guided cal by computing the error correction terms, turning Correction ON, and saving the calibration to a Cal Set.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationSaveByCalsetName Completes the guided cal by computing the error correction terms, turning Correction ON, and saving the calibration to an existing, specified Cal Set.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationSaveWithMode Completes the guided cal by computing the error correction terms, turning Correction ON, and saving the calibration to a Cal Set.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationSelectCalKit Specifies the calibration kit (mechanical or ECal) for each port to be used during a guided calibration. An unused port does NOT need to have a specified Cal Kit.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationSetConnectorType Specifies a DUT connector type for every port during the Guided Calibration procedure.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepAdd Adds an instance of the Guided Calibration Step.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepDelete Removes an instance of the Guided Calibration Step that was previously added by the user.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepDeleteAll Removes all instances of the Guided Calibration Steps that were previously added by the user.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepGetAcquisitionCount Designed to be used for an iterative cal standard such as a sliding load, this command returns the number of iterative measurement acquisitions that has been made for the specified step.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepGetConnectionDescription Returns the connection description for the specified calibration step.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepGetDescription Returns the step description.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepGetMinimumAcquisitions Designed to be used for an iterative cal standard such as a sliding load, this command returns the minimum number of required iterative measurement acquisitions for the specified step.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepGetNumberOfStandards Returns the number of standards for step[n]. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepGetRequiredCount Returns the number of measurement steps required to complete the current guided calibration. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalibrationStepReset Resets the specified guided cal connection step as unmeasured. This clears all previous measurements made for that step.
KtNA_ChannelGuidedCalInitiateWithMatchChannelAndCalsetStimulus Initiates a guided calibration.
KtNA_ChannelIMDGetActiveHighestOrderProduct Returns the highest order product measured by SweptIMD.
KtNA_ChannelIMDGetDUTInputPort Returns the VNA test port to be connected to the DUT input for an IMD or IMDx channel. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelIMDGetDUTOutputPort Returns the VNA test port to be connected to the DUT output for an IMD or IMDx channel. Default 2.
KtNA_ChannelIMDGetHighestOrderProduct Returns the highest order product that can be measured by SweptIMD. Default 9.
KtNA_ChannelIMDIsSecondOrderActive Returns the state of whether or not 2nd order parameters are measured. A "1" or "ON" indicates 2nd order parameters are measured.
KtNA_ChannelIMDSetPortMapping Sets the input port and output port of an IMD or IMDx channel. Default 1,2.
KtNA_ChannelIsBlockedFromSweeping Reads whether the specified channel is currently 'blocked' from sweeping.
KtNA_ChannelMixerApply Applies the mixer setup settings and turns the channel ON.
KtNA_ChannelMixerCalculateFrequencies Calculates the Input, IF, or Output frequencies of the mixer setup and updates the channel settings.
KtNA_ChannelMixerDiscard Cancels changes that have been made to the Converter setup and reverts to the previously-saved setup.
KtNA_ChannelMixerGetDUTInputPort Returns the VNA port that is mapped to the DUT input. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelMixerGetDUTOutputPort Returns the VNA port that is mapped to the DUT output. Default 2.
KtNA_ChannelMixerLoad Loads a previously-configured mixer attributes file (.mxr)
KtNA_ChannelMixerSave Saves the settings for the mixer , converter test setup to a mixer attributes file.
KtNA_ChannelMixerSetPortMapping Sets the VNA to DUT port map for FCA measurements.
KtNA_ChannelNoiseGetDUTInputPort Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Input. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelNoiseGetDUTOutputPort Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Output. Default 2.
KtNA_ChannelNoiseQuerySNPData Returns S-parameter and noise parameter data for vector noise figure measurements.
KtNA_ChannelNoiseSaveSNPData Saves the S-parameters and vector noise parameters to an S2P file. For NFX channels, mixer setup information is included as comments at the beginning of the file.
KtNA_ChannelNoiseSetPortMapping Set the DUT-to-VNA port mapping for Noise Figure.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigCopy Copies the mechanical switch and attenuator settings from the specified channel to current selected channel.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigDelete Deletes the specified configuration name from the VNA.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigGetCatalog Returns a list of configuration names stored in the VNA.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigGetElementCatalog Returns the names of configurable elements as a comma-delimited list of strings.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigGetElementSetting Read the setting of a specified element in the current configuration.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigGetElementSettingCatalog Returns the list of valid settings that can be used with the specified element.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigGetName Returns the name of the current configuration only if NO individual element settings had been changed since selecting or storing a configuration.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigSelect Loads the named configuration onto the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigSetElementSetting Write the setting of a specified element in the current configuration.
KtNA_ChannelPathConfigStore Saves the path configuration currently associated with channel to the specified configuration name.
KtNA_ChannelPNBasebandDischarge Executes the Dischage DC Block C.
KtNA_ChannelPNLoadPowerCorrectionData Sets and returns the power correction data from correction definition file.
KtNA_ChannelPNQueryPowerCorrectionData Returns the power correction data.
KtNA_ChannelPNSegmentGetCount Returns the number of phase noise segments currently defined.
KtNA_ChannelPNSegmentGetStartFrequency Returns the start frequency for each phase noise segment.
KtNA_ChannelPNSegmentGetStopFrequency Returns the stop frequency for each phase noise segment.
KtNA_ChannelPNSetPowerCorrectionData Sets the power correction data.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetADCDelay Returns the ADC delay for pulse measurements.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetCatalog Returns the string names of internal and configured external pulse generators.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetDelay Returns the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetDelayEnabled Get Enable or disable state of modulator and ADC delays for pulse measurements.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetDelayIncrement Returns the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetDelayIncrementWithNo Returns the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetDelayWithNo Returns the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetDevice Reads the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetDeviceWithNo Reads the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetEnabled Returns the state pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetEnabledWithNo Returns the state pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetInvertEnabled Returns whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetInvertEnabledWithNo Returns whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetModulatorDelay Returns the time lag between the pulse drive signal and the actual RF output.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetPulsePeriod Returns the pulse-period for ALL pulse generators.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetPulseWidth Returns the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetPulseWidthWithNo Returns the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetSubpointTriggeringEnabled Returns the state of subpoint triggering. When enabled and performing Point Averaging, Each rising edge of P0 triggers a subpoint (one of N acquisitions in an N point average).
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorGetTriggerType Returns the type of trigger signal to which the internal pulse generators will respond when being externally triggered at the PulseSyncIn pin.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetDelay Sets the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetDelayEnabled Enables or disables modulator and ADC delays for pulse measurements.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetDelayIncrement Sets the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetDelayIncrementWithNo Sets the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetDelayWithNo Sets the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetDevice Sets the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetDeviceWithNo Sets the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetEnabled Turns the pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetEnabledWithNo Turns the pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetInvertEnabled Sets whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetInvertEnabledWithNo Sets whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetModulatorDelay Sets the time lag between the pulse drive signal and the actual RF output.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetPulsePeriod Sets the pulse-period for ALL pulse generators.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetPulseWidth Sets the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetPulseWidthWithNo Sets the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetSubpointTriggeringEnabled Enables or Disables subpoint triggering. When enabled and performing Point Averaging, Each rising edge of P0 triggers a subpoint (one of N acquisitions in an N point average).
KtNA_ChannelPulseGeneratorSetTriggerType Sets the type of trigger signal to which the internal pulse generators will respond when being externally triggered at the PulseSyncIn pin.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetAcquisitionTime Returns the LO acquisition time.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetMaxPercentageRange Read the maximum ADC percentage range of all receivers in use.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetMaxRecordSize Read the current maximum available ADC record size.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetMinPercentageRange Read the minimum ADC percentage range of all receivers in use.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetMinRecordSize Read the current minimum available ADC record size.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetOverloadCount Read the count of ADCs or receivers in overload status for the previous sweep.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetOverloadList Read the list of measured receivers in overload status for the previous sweep.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetReceiverPercentageRange Read the ADC percentage range for the specified receiver.
KtNA_ChannelSAADCGetRecordSizeValue Read ADC record size value.
KtNA_ChannelSAAutotune Auto tunes and zooms in on a signal within a SA sweep.
KtNA_ChannelSAAutotuneWithSync Auto tunes and zooms in on a signal within a SA sweep.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceExecutePulseSearch Executes the pulse search.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceGetLOFeedThruMonitorResult Return the last monitor result of LO feedthru monitor.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceGetLOFeedThruMonitorValue Return the last monitor value of LO feedthru monitor.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceGetPulseSearchItemCount Returns the number of possible pulse configurations found.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceGetPulseSearchItemPeriod Returns the pulse period for found pulse configuration number num.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceGetPulseSearchItemWidth Returns the pulse width for found pulse configuration number num.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceGetSpanDFTBinCount Read the number of DFT points to be exported across the total RF span.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceIsMultitoneSettingValid Read the current multitone settings and determine if they are valid or not.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherencePulseSearchInitialize Sets all the search parameters to their default values.
KtNA_ChannelSACoherenceSelectPulseSearchItem Selects the found configuration number num, and applies it to the measurements.
KtNA_ChannelSADataAutofillIQSettings Fill in the IQ settings automatically.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetCurrentStoredReceiversList Read the current list of receivers that have been stored in memory.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetDataBinByteSize Read the byte size of one data bin in binary mode.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetDFTPointsCount Read the number of DFT points to be exported across the total RF span.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetExportedDataByteSize Read the byte size of the data to be exported in binary mode.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetExportedDataLSB Read the least significant bytes (LSB) of the byte size of the data to be exported.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetExportedDataMSB Read the most significant bytes (MSB) of the byte size of the data to be exported.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetExportedReceiverList Read the list of receivers that will be exported to a data file.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetExportedReceiversCount Read the number of currently exported receivers.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetFirstRFBinFrequency Read the frequency of the first RF bin.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetIQErrorCode Read the IQ error code to indicate whether the IQ settings are valid or not.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetIQErrorText Read the error text to determine if the IQ settings are valid or not.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetIQRecordDuration Read the IQ record duration.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetRawIQData Gets the raw IQ data as a Visa arbitrary binary block of data.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetRawIQDataWithBuffer Gets the raw IQ data as a Visa arbitrary binary block of data.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetScalarData Read the scalar data. Scalar data is amplitude only values, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetScalarDataWithPosition Read the scalar data. Scalar data is amplitude only values, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetStoredFrequenciesCount Read the number of frequency domain points in memory.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetStoredReceiversCount Read the number of receivers that have been stored in memory.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetVectorData Read the vector data. Vector data is amplitude and phase, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetVectorDataWithPosition Read the vector data. Vector data is amplitude and phase, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_ChannelSADataGetWindowingFactor Read the windowing factor for band power computation. This factor is derived from the window type (Gaussian, flat top, etc.).
KtNA_ChannelSAGetDFTRecordSize Read the current DFT record size.
KtNA_ChannelSAGetDFTResolution Read the DFT resolution.
KtNA_ChannelSAGetFFTResolution Read the FFT resolution.
KtNA_ChannelSAGetLOAcquisitionCount Returns the number of LO acquisitions determined by the Image Reject selection and the span.
KtNA_ChannelSAGetResolutionBWCatalog Read the list of all Resolution Bandwidth values currently supported with spectrum analyzer current settings.
KtNA_ChannelSAGetVideoBWSweepCount Reads the number of Video bandwidth sweeps that are averaged together. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentAdd Adds a segment.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentDelete Deletes the specified sweep segment.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentDeleteAll Deletes all sweep segments.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentGetCount Queries the number of segments that exist in the specified channel. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentGetPowerLevel Get the Port Power level for the specified sweep segment. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentQueryData Reads the entire list of values in the segment sweep table.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentSetData Writes the entire list of values in the segment sweep table.
KtNA_ChannelSegmentSetPowerLevel Set the Port Power level for the specified sweep segment. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelSetTopology
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCAFCImmediate Tune the frequency one time.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetCatalog Returns the names of the configured and active DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetCatalogWithProtection Returns the module list or name of DC source in which protection function is activated due to over current or voltage.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetCenter Returns center DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetControlType Returns the output regulation mode.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetCurrentRange Returns a current output range in Amps.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetEnabled Returns the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetEnabledWithPortNo Returns the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetMaxDCLimit Returns the Max DC limit value for a DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetMinDCLimit Returns the Min DC limit value for a DC source. Default -10.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetNames Reads the DC source names.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetNegativeCurrentLimit Returns the negative current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default -3.06.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetOutputRelayClosed Returns the locked-down state of the output relays on SMU units with output relays.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetParallelMode Returns Parallel Mode. This command is to make a single aggregate port out of two power ports - specifying whether one result is same.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetPositiveCurrentLimit Returns the positive current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default 3.06.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetProtectionEnabled Reads the DC output protection state.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetProtectionVoltage Returns the protection voltage level for the DC output.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetSpan Returns span value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetStart Returns start DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetStartWithPortNo Returns start DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetStop Returns stop DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCGetStopWithPortNo Returns stop DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCProtectionReset Resets the instrument's output protection circuit after a protection condition occurs.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCQueryData Returns the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCQueryDataWithPortNo Returns the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetCenter Sets center DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetControlType Sets the output regulation mode. Default Voltage.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetCurrentRange Sets a current output range in Amps. Default (SMU) 3, (M9341B) 0.05.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetData Sets the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetDataWithPortNo Sets the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetEnabled Sets the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetEnabledWithPortNo Sets the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetMaxDCLimit Sets the Max DC limit value for a DC source. Default 10.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetMinDCLimit Sets the Min DC limit value for a DC source. Default -10.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetNegativeCurrentLimit Sets the negative current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default -3.06.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetOutputRelayClosed Sets the locked-down state of the output relays on SMU units with output relays. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetParallelMode Sets Parallel Mode. This command is to make a single aggregate port out of two power ports - specifying whether one result is same.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetPositiveCurrentLimit Sets the positive current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default 3.06.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetProtectionEnabled Sets the DC output protection state. Default 1.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetProtectionVoltage Sets the protection voltage level for the DC output. Default 14.4.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetSpan Sets span value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetStart Sets start DC value for the specified DC source. Default 5.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetStartWithPortNo Sets start DC value for the specified DC source. Default 5.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetStop Sets stop DC value for the specified DC source. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCSetStopWithPortNo Sets stop DC value for the specified DC source. Default 0.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageExecuteCalibration Execute the output voltage calibration for both AO1 and AO2.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageGetBandwidth Returns a voltage bandwidth to optimize the output response time with capacitive loads.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageGetLimit Returns the positive voltage limit in Volts when output regulation is in current priority mode.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageGetRange Returns a voltage output range in Volts. Default 6.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageQueryCalibrationDateTime Returns the date and time of execution output voltage calibration.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageSetBandwidth Sets a voltage bandwidth to optimize the output response time with capacitive loads. Default "Low".
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageSetLimit Sets the positive voltage limit in Volts when output regulation is in current priority mode. Default 6.12.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourceDCVoltageSetRange Sets a voltage output range in Volts. Default 6.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortGetCatalog Returns a list of valid port names that can be controlled. Some ports only have string names, NOT numbers.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortGetGain Returns the gain settings to a specified port.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortGetGainCouplingEnabled Returns the status per port for receiver gain coupling.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortGetGainForAll Set and read the setting for receiver gain coupling for all port in the specified channel.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortGetPortNumber Returns a port number for a named source. To convert a string name to a port number use this command.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortGetReceiverGainCatalog Reads a list of valid state for the receiver gain on the specified port.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortIsPulseSourcePresent Checks if pulse source exists.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortQueryGainData
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortSetGain Sets the gain settings to a specified port.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortSetGainForAll Sets the gain settings to all ports.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSourcePortSync Add Source Port instances in the driver which are present in the instrument current state.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSweepGetStartTime
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSweepQueryType Returns the type of analyzer sweep mode.
KtNA_ChannelStandardStimulusSweepSetType Sets the type of analyzer sweep mode.
KtNA_ChannelTransientLoadPowerCorrectionData Sets and returns the power correction data from correction definition file.
KtNA_ChannelTransientQueryPowerCorrectionData Returns the power correction data.
KtNA_ChannelTransientSetPowerCorrectionData Sets the power correction data.
KtNA_ChannelTriggerAuxConnectorInputQueryType Returns the type of Aux input detection that the VNA will employ.
KtNA_ChannelTriggerAuxConnectorInputSetType Sets the type of Aux input detection that the VNA will employ.
KtNA_ChannelTriggerGetNoOfAuxConnectors Returns the number of AUX trigger input / output connector pairs in the instrument.
KtNA_ChannelTriggerInitiate Stops the current sweeps and immediately sends a trigger.
KtNA_ChannelTriggerTransientVideoNarrowBandQueryType Gets the trigger type for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default Power.
KtNA_ChannelTriggerTransientVideoNarrowBandSetType Set the trigger type for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default Power.
KtNA_ChannelVCOGetDCVoltage Read the DC voltage level after sweep.
KtNA_ChannelVCOGetUserDCVoltage Read the DC voltage level for user after sweep.
KtNA_ChannelVCOLoadPowerCorrectionData Sets and returns the power correction data from correction definition file.
KtNA_ChannelVCOQueryPowerCorrectionData Returns the power correction data.
KtNA_ChannelVCOSetDCVoltage Set the DC voltage level after sweep.
KtNA_ChannelVCOSetPowerCorrectionData Sets the power correction data.
KtNA_ChannelVCOSetUserDCVoltage Set the DC voltage level for user after sweep.
KtNA_ClearError This function clears the error code and error description for the current execution thread and for the IVI session. If the user specifies a valid IVI session for the Vi parameter, this function clears the error information for the session. If the user passes VI_NULL for the Vi parameter, this function clears the error information for the current execution thread. If the Vi parameter is an invalid session, the function does nothing and returns an error.
KtNA_close Closes the I/O session to the instrument. Driver methods and properties that access the instrument are not accessible after Close is called.
KtNA_ControlAuxGetFootswitchState Reads the Auxiliary connector Footswitch Input. Default 0.
KtNA_ControlAuxGetInputVoltage Reads voltage on the Power I/O connector.
KtNA_ControlAuxGetOutputMode This command reads the mode of the selected "Analog Out" line on the Power I/O connector.
KtNA_ControlAuxGetOutputVoltage Reads voltage on the Power I/O connector AnalogOut1|2 (PNA), AUX Out 1|2 (E5080B).
KtNA_ControlAuxPassFailGetStatus Returns the most recent pass/fail status value.
KtNA_ControlAuxSetOutputMode This command sets the mode of the selected "Analog Out" line on the Power I/O connector.
KtNA_ControlAuxSetOutputVoltage Sets voltage on the Power I/O connector AnalogOut1|2 (PNA), AUX Out 1|2 (E5080B). Default 0.
KtNA_ControlExternalTestsetGetData Writes 13 bits of data to the specified address using the AD0 through AD12 lines of the external test set connector.
KtNA_ControlExternalTestsetGetInterruptState Reads the boolean state of the Interrupt In line (pin 13) on the external test set connector.
KtNA_ControlExternalTestsetGetSweepHoldOff Reads the Sweep Holdoff Iine (pin 2) on the external test set connector.
KtNA_ControlExternalTestsetSetData Writes 13 bits of data to the specified address using the AD0 through AD12 lines of the external test set connector.
KtNA_ControlGetDCInputCurrent Return the current measurement for DC sources.
KtNA_ControlGetDCOutputVoltage Gets the voltage immediate one time DC current measurement.
KtNA_ControlGetNoOfECalStates Returns the number of unique states that exist for the specified path name on the selected ECal module.
KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerGetOutputData Reads the specified output line.
KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerGetPortData Reads data on the specified port.
KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerGetUserOutputData Reads the specified USER output line.
KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerIsTransitionDetected Reads a hardware latch that captures high to low transitions on Input1 of the Material Handler IO.
KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerPassFailGetStatus Returns the most recent pass/fail status value.
