KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerSetOutputData Sets the specified output line. Default 0 - Low.
KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerSetPortData Writes data on the specified port.
KtNA_ControlMaterialHandlerSetUserOutputData Sets the specified USER output line. Default 0 - Low.
KtNA_ControlMultiplexerGetData Reads the output port data for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set.
KtNA_ControlMultiplexerGetVoltage Reads the output voltage for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set.
KtNA_ControlMultiplexerSelectPort Sets the multiport test set port.
KtNA_ControlMultiplexerSetData Sets the output port data for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set. Default 0.
KtNA_ControlMultiplexerSetVoltage Sets the output voltage for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set. Default 0.
KtNA_ControlPhaseModuleGetCount Reads the number of phase reference modules connected.
KtNA_ControlPhaseModuleGetModelNo Reads the model number of the specified module (x).
KtNA_ControlPhaseModuleGetSerialNo Reads the serial number of the specified module (x).
KtNA_ControlPhaseModuleSetDivideNo Turns on the phase reference, and sets the divide number.
KtNA_ControlPhaseModuleStoreData Reads the calibration data from the phase reference of the specified module (x), and writes the data to the Path.
KtNA_ControlReadCalpodCommand Reads query versions Calpod commands.
KtNA_ControlRecallInterfaceConfig Recalls an Interface Control configuration file.
KtNA_ControlSetDCOutputVoltage Set the voltage immediate one time DC current measurement. This function is not available on Soft Front Panel.
KtNA_ControlSetECalState Number of the state to set.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOGetChannelFunction Read the function for the selected pin on the Application I/O connector.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOGetChannelFunctionCatalog Read the catalog of the functions assignable to the pin on the Application I/O connector.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOGetFunction Read the function for the specified port in the application I/O interface.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOGetFunctionCatalog Read the list of the available function for the specified pin in the application I/O.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOGetInputLevel Read the level of the specified INPUT pin of the application I/O.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOGetPinCount Read the total number of pin on the application I/O. Default 15.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOSetChannelFunction Set the function for the selected pin on the Application I/O connector. Default High.
KtNA_ControlSignalAppIOSetFunction Set the function for the specified port in the application I/O interface.
KtNA_ControlSignalGetConfig Reads the Configuration for external triggering in the VNA.
KtNA_ControlSignalKDMIGetChannelFunction Read the function for the specified port and channel in the main of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_ControlSignalKDMIGetFunction Read the function for the specified port in the main c of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_ControlSignalKDMIGetFunctionCatalog Read the list of the available function for the specified port in the main control of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_ControlSignalKDMIGetInputLevel Read the level of the specified INPUT port of the I/O adapter main side
KtNA_ControlSignalKDMIGetPortCount Read the number of ports in the main control port of the I/O connector interface. Default 6.
KtNA_ControlSignalKDMISetChannelFunction Set the function for the specified port and channel in the main of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_ControlSignalKDMISetFunction Set the function for the specified port in the main c of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_ControlSignalSetConfig Configures external triggering in the VNA.
KtNA_ControlWriteCalpodCommand Sends commands that control a Calpod module.
KtNA_Disable Quickly places the instrument in a state where it has no, or minimal, effect on the external system to which it is connected. This state is not necessarily a known state.
KtNA_DisplayArrangeWindows Places EXISTING measurements into pre-configured window arrangements.
KtNA_DisplayClearLog Clears the message region in the status bar.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetBackground Return the background color for the inactive windows on the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetBackgroundForActive Return the background color for the active window on the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetFailedTraceLimitLine Return the limit line color of failed traces or failure indicators (dots) and the word Fail.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetGrid Return the inner lines of all grid in all windows, and the grid frame in inactive windows for the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetGridForActive Return the labels and grid frame colors in the active window for the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetMemoryTrace Return the memory trace color for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetMemoryTraceMarker Return the color of memory trace markers for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetTraceData Return the color of Data and Limit Lines for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetTraceMarker Return the color of data trace markers for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_DisplayColorGetWindowLabel Return the Inactive (not selected) Window Labels for the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_DisplayColorLoad Load a color theme from a disc file.
KtNA_DisplayColorReset Resets the current theme to the default VNA colors.
KtNA_DisplayColorSetBackground Set the background color for the active window on the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 0,0,24 (Black), Print = 255,255,255 (White).
KtNA_DisplayColorSetBackgroundForActive Set the background color for the inactive window on the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 0,0,0 (Black), Print = 255,255,255 (White).
KtNA_DisplayColorSetFailedTraceLimitLine Set the limit line color of failed traces or failure indicators (dots) and the word Fail. Default Display = 255,20,20, Print = 255,20,20.
KtNA_DisplayColorSetGrid Set the inner lines of all grid in all windows, and the grid frame in inactive windows for the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 100,100,100, Print = 50,50,50.
KtNA_DisplayColorSetGridForActive Set the labels and grid frame colors in the active window for the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 175,175,175, Print = 0,0,0 (Black).
KtNA_DisplayColorSetMemoryTrace Set the memory trace color for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_DisplayColorSetMemoryTraceMarker Set the color of memory trace markers for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_DisplayColorSetTraceData Set the color of Data and Limit Lines for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_DisplayColorSetTraceMarker Set the color of data trace markers for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_DisplayColorSetWindowLabel Set the Inactive (not selected) Window Labels for the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 160,160,160, Print = 0,0,0 (Black).
KtNA_DisplayColorStore Saves the current color theme to a disc file.
KtNA_DisplayGetExistingWindowNumbers Returns the existing Window numbers.
KtNA_DisplaySheetArrange This command arranges existing windows to sheets. Default One sheet per window.
KtNA_DisplaySheetGetCatalog This command reads and displays comma separated list of window numbers which the sheet contains. Default 1.
KtNA_DisplayUpdateImmediate Executes the display update once when the display update of the LCD screen is set to OFF.
KtNA_DisplayWindowAutoscaleAll Scales ALL of the traces to fit in the same window. This is equivalent to "Autoscale All" from the front panel.
KtNA_DisplayWindowCreateOrDelete Create or delete a window on the screen.
KtNA_DisplayWindowFindNextAvailableWindow Returns the first window which has room for another trace.
KtNA_DisplayWindowGetCatalog Returns the window numbers that are currently being used.
KtNA_DisplayWindowIsPresent Specifies whether a window is present.
KtNA_DisplayWindowMoveToSheet Feeds a specified window to the sheet.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceAutoScaleY Performs an Autoscale on the specified trace in the specified window, providing the best fit display.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceDelete Deletes the specified trace from the specified window. The measurement parameter associated with the trace is not deleted.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceFeedMeasurementName Creates a new trace and associates (feeds) a measurement to the specified window.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceFeedMeasurementNumber Creates a new trace for an existing measurement and associates (feeds) the measurement number to the specified window.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceGetActiveTrace Returns the active trace number. Default 1.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceGetCatalog Returns the trace numbers for the specified window.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceGetNextUnusedTraceNo Returns the next unused trace number.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceMove Moves a trace from one window to another window.
KtNA_DisplayWindowTraceSelect Activates the specified trace in the specified window for front panel use.
KtNA_error_message Translates the error return value from an IVI driver function to a user-readable string. The user should pass a buffer with at least 256 bytes for the ErrorMessage parameter.
KtNA_error_query Queries the instrument and returns instrument specific error information. This function can be used when QueryInstrumentStatus is True to retrieve error details when the driver detects an instrument error.
KtNA_GetAfrBandLimitationEnabled Gets the value of the AFR_BAND_LIMITATION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrCorrectionEnabled Gets the value of the AFR_CORRECTION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrCorrectionMatchEnabled Gets the value of the AFR_CORRECTION_MATCH_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrFixtureDataFileType Gets the value of the AFR_FIXTURE_DATA_FILE_TYPE attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrFixtureDataPort Gets the value of the AFR_FIXTURE_DATA_PORT attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrFixtureInput Gets the value of the AFR_FIXTURE_INPUT attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrLengthCorrectionEnabled Gets the value of the AFR_LENGTH_CORRECTION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrNumberOfFixtures Gets the value of the AFR_NUMBER_OF_FIXTURES attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrStandardAllOpenEnabled Gets the value of the AFR_STANDARD_ALL_OPEN_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrStandardAllShortEnabled Gets the value of the AFR_STANDARD_ALL_SHORT_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetAfrStandardImpedanceMethod Gets the value of the AFR_STANDARD_IMPEDANCE_METHOD attribute.
KtNA_GetAttributeViBoolean This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_GetAttributeViInt32 This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_GetAttributeViReal64 This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_GetAttributeViSession This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_GetAttributeViString This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_GetAuxConnectorName Returns the auxconnector name that corresponds to the one-based index that the user specifies.
KtNA_GetCalibrationSessionCalSetPrefix Gets the value of the CALIBRATION_SESSION_CAL_SET_PREFIX attribute.
KtNA_GetCalibrationSessionIfBandwidth Gets the value of the CALIBRATION_SESSION_IF_BANDWIDTH attribute.
KtNA_GetCalibrationSessionName Returns the calibrationsession name that corresponds to the one-based index that the user specifies.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersAbsoluteTonePower Gets the value of the ABSOLUTE_TONE_POWER attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersDisplayInterpolationEnabled Gets the value of the DISPLAY_INTERPOLATION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersRelativeTonePower Gets the value of the RELATIVE_TONE_POWER attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersSweepNoOfPhasePoint Gets the value of the NO_OF_PHASE_POINT attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersSweepNoOfPowerSteps Gets the value of the NO_OF_POWER_STEPS attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersSweepStartPower Gets the value of the START_POWER attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersSweepStopPower Gets the value of the STOP_POWER attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelActiveParametersTuningToneMode Gets the value of the TUNING_TONE_MODE attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelAveragingEnabled Gets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelAveragingFactor Gets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_FACTOR attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelAveragingIfBandwidth Gets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_IF_BANDWIDTH attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelAveragingMode Gets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_MODE attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelAveragingReduceIfBandwidthEnabled Gets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_REDUCE_IF_BANDWIDTH_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationIdentity Gets the value of the IDENTITY attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationInsituEnabled Gets the value of the IN_SITU_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationNumber Gets the value of the NUMBER attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationUserDescript Gets the value of the USER_DESCRIPTION attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationVnaDescript Gets the value of the VNA_DESCRIPTION attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalSetName Gets the value of the CHANNEL_CAL_SET_NAME attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalsetsDescription Gets the value of the DESCRIPTION3 attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCalsetsReceiver Gets the value of the RECEIVER attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionAsyncSweepingEnabled Gets the value of the ASYNC_SWEEPING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionCacheMode Gets the value of the CACHE_MODE attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionCalkitConnectorFamilyName Gets the value of the FAMILY_NAME attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionCalkitDescription Gets the value of the DESCRIPTION attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionCalkitName Gets the value of the NAME attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardCharImpedance Gets the value of the CHAR_IMPEDANCE attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardDescription Gets the value of the DESCRIPTION2 attribute.
KtNA_GetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardElectricalDelay Gets the value of the ELECTRICAL_DELAY attribute.

KtNA_GetECalModuleName Returns the ecalmodule name that corresponds to the one-based index that the user specifies.
KtNA_GetError This function retrieves and then clears the IVI error information for the session or the current execution thread. If the user specifies a valid IVI session for the Vi parameter, Get Error retrieves and then clears the error information for the session. If the user passes VI_NULL for the Vi parameter, Get Error retrieves and then clears the error information for the current execution thread. If the Vi parameter is an invalid session, the function does nothing and returns an error. Normally, the error information describes the first error that occurred since the user last called the Get Error or Clear Error function.

KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardAcquire Initiates the measurement of the specified calibration standard.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardAcquireWithSync Initiates the measurement of the specified calibration standard.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardGetLabel Returns the label for the complete standard used in the step. If the standard is a composite standard, the label is for the composite device.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardGetLabelWithStanNo Returns the label for the one of the standards used in the step.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardGetMeasParameterCatalog Returns a comma-delimited CSV string of measurement parameters (with parameter names) for STANn at State x.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardGetNoOfPorts Returns the number of ports on the standard used in the step.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardGetNoOfPortsWithStanNo Returns the number of ports on one of the standard used in the step.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardGetTestPortList Returns the list of VNA test ports to which the standard(s) in this step is attached.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardGetTestPortListWithStanNo Returns the number of ports on one of the standard used in the step.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardPreviewMeasurementSetup Show the Cal Window, and optionally one or more other specific windows before acquiring a Cal standard.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardQueryMeasurementData Returns the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardQueryType Returns the type of standard device used in the step.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardQueryTypeWithStanNo Returns the enumeration for the type of standard that describes one of the standard devices used in the step.
KtNA_GuidedCalibrationStepStandardSetMeasurementData Sets the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal
KtNA_init Opens the I/O session to the instrument. Driver methods and properties that access the instrument are only accessible after Initialize is called. Initialize optionally performs a Reset and queries the instrument to validate the instrument model.
KtNA_InitWithOptions Opens the I/O session to the instrument. Driver methods and properties that access the instrument are only accessible after Initialize is called. Initialize optionally performs a Reset and queries the instrument to validate the instrument model.
KtNA_InvalidateAllAttributes Invalidates all of the driver's cached values.
KtNA_LockSession Obtains a multithread lock on the driver after waiting until all other execution threads have released their locks on the instrument session.
KtNA_MeasurementBWLimitGetTestResult Read the bandwidth value of the bandwidth test, for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_MeasurementBWLimitIsPassing Get the bandwidth limit test results, for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_MeasurementCorrectionGetState Returns the error correction state for the selected measurement on the specified channel.
KtNA_MeasurementCreate Creates a measurement but does NOT display it, on an existing or new channel.
KtNA_MeasurementDelete Deletes the specified measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementDeleteAll Deletes all measurements on the VNA.
KtNA_MeasurementEquationEditorGetLibraryFunctions Returns the functions in the specified DLL.
KtNA_MeasurementEquationEditorImportLibrary Imports the functions in the specified DLL.
KtNA_MeasurementEquationEditorIsLibraryImported Returns whether the functions have been imported into the VNA.
KtNA_MeasurementEquationEditorIsValid Returns a boolean value to indicate if the current equation on the selected measurement for the specified channel is valid.
KtNA_MeasurementEquationEditorRemoveLibrary Removes an imported Equation Editor DLL from the VNA.
KtNA_MeasurementEquationIsValid Returns a boolean value to indicate if the current equation on the selected measurement for the specified channel is valid.
KtNA_MeasurementGainCompressionGetNoOfPoints In a SMART sweep, returns the max number of iterations that it took for ALL frequencies to converge.
KtNA_MeasurementGainCompressionQueryData Returns measurement data at all frequency and power data points for GCA SMART sweeps and 2D sweeps.
KtNA_MeasurementGainCompressionQueryDataImag For a specified data point, returns the imaginary part of the specified Gain Compression data.
KtNA_MeasurementGainCompressionQueryDataReal For a specified data point, returns the real part of the Gain Compression data.
KtNA_MeasurementGetActiveMeasName Returns the name of the active measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementGetActiveMeasNo Returns the active measurement number.
KtNA_MeasurementGetCatalog Returns measurement numbers from a specified channel.
KtNA_MeasurementGetNextAvailable Returns a string that is guaranteed to be unique and valid for use in adding new measurement for the specified channel.
KtNA_MeasurementGetParameter Gets a measurement parameter for the specified measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementGetParameterCatalog Returns the names and parameters of existing measurements for the specified channel.
KtNA_MeasurementGetRawParameterCatalog
KtNA_MeasurementGetSelectedMeasNo Returns the selected measurement for the channel using the Tr#.
KtNA_MeasurementGetTraceNumber Returns the trace number of the selected trace.
KtNA_MeasurementGetUnit Returns the units for the specified data format. Measurements with display formats other than those specified are not affected.
KtNA_MeasurementGetWindowNumber Returns the window number of the selected trace.
KtNA_MeasurementGetXData Returns the DC Source setting for the X-axis of the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementGetXUnit Returns the current units of the X-axis
KtNA_MeasurementGetYUnit Returns the current units of the Y-axis
KtNA_MeasurementHoldReset Resets the currently-stored data points to the live data trace and restarts the currently-selected Trace Hold type.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitDeleteData Deletes all limit line data for the selected measurement on the specified channel.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitGetNoOfFailedPoints Reads the number of the measurement points that failed the limit test, for the active trace of selected channel. Default 0.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitGetSegmentCount Returns the number of segments used in a limit test. All segments are counted, whether they are on or not.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitIsPassing Returns the Pass / Fail status of the limit line test. Returns 1 (Fail) if any data point fails for any limit segment.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitQueryData Returns data for limit segments.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitQueryTestResult Returns the test results (stimulus value, limit test result, upper limit value and lower limit value of all measurement points), for the selected trace.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitQueryXValuesOfFailedPoints Returns the stimulus values (frequency, power level or time) at all the measurement points that failed the limit test, for the selected trace.
KtNA_MeasurementLimitSetData Sets data for limit segments.
KtNA_MeasurementLinearRegressionQueryData This command calculates “Y = A*X + B” from current measurement trace (mnum trace) and return “A” or “B” value. Default "A".
KtNA_MeasurementLinearRegressionSave Save the linear regression line data to the memory trace.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerDisableAll Turns all markers off for selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerGetEnabled Returns the state of the specified marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerGetYPosition Reads the marker's Y-axis value.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerGetYPositionReal Reads the marker's Y-axis value.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerGetYReferencePosition Returns the absolute Y-axis value of the reference marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerModifyInstrumentSetting Sets the selected instrument setting to assume the value of the specified marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerQueryType Returns the type of the specified marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSABandDensityGetData Returns the band density level in dBm/Hz from the band density marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSABandPowerGetData Returns the band power level from the band power marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSAOccupiedBWGetCenterFrequency Returns the occupied bandwidth center frequency.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSAOccupiedBWGetPower Returns the occupied bandwidth power.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSAOccupiedBWGetSpan Sets and reads the frequency span of the band power marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchBWandNotchGetDisplayResultEnabled Specifies whether the bandwidth/notch search result display is ON or OFF, for the active trace of selected channel .
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchBWandNotchGetReference Returns the bandwidth/notch marker function reference.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchBWandNotchGetThreshold Returns the bandwidth/notch definition value (the value to define the pass-band of the filter) of marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchBWandNotchQueryResult Read the bandwidth/notch search result of marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchBWandNotchSetDisplayEnabled Turns ON or OFF the bandwidth/notch search result display, for the active trace of selected channel .
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchBWandNotchSetReference Sets the bandwidth/notch marker function reference.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchBWandNotchSetThreshold Sets the bandwidth/notch definition value (the value to define the pass-band of the filter) of marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchCompressionGetInputPower Read the input power at the marker compression level.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchCompressionGetOutputPower Read the output power at the marker compression level.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchExecute Immediately executes (performs) the specified search function.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchMultiSearchExecute Immediately executes (performs) the specified multi search function.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetBackOffGain Reads the power backoff gain value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetBackOffInput Reads the power backoff input value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetBackOffOutput Reads the power backoff output value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetCompression Reads the PNOP compression value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetGain Reads the PNOP gain value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetInput Reads the PNOP input value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetMaxCompression Reads the max compression value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetMaxGain Reads the max gain from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetMaxInput Reads the max input power from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetMaxOutput Reads the max output power from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPNOPGetOutput Reads the output power value of the offset marker from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetCompressionSat Reads the compression saturation value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetGain Reads the saturation gain value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetInput Reads the power saturation input value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetLinearGain Reads the linear gain value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetMaxCompression Reads the compression maximum value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetMaxGain Reads the maximum gain value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetMaxInput Reads the maximum input power from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetMaxOutput Reads the max back-off output power from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSearchPSATGetOutput Reads the back-off output power from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSetEnabled Turns ON or OFF the specified marker. Marker 16 is the Reference Marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSetType Sets the type of the specified marker.
KtNA_MeasurementMarkerSetYReferencePosition Sets the absolute Y-axis value of the reference marker.
KtNA_MeasurementModify Modifies a standard measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNGetAllanDeviation Returns the calculated Allan deviation using the measured average time and the measured cut-off frequency for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNGetAllanVariance Returns the calculated Allan variance using the measured average time and the measured cut-off frequency for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNGetCarrierFrequency Returns the measured carrier frequency.
KtNA_MeasurementPNGetCarrierPower Returns the measured carrier power.
KtNA_MeasurementPNGetJitter Returns the calculated Jitter using the measured average time and the measured cut-off frequency for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNIntegrationRangeQueryData Returns the specified data for the selected range number.
KtNA_MeasurementPNIntegrationRangeQueryType Gets the integration range type of the selected integration range.
KtNA_MeasurementPNIntegrationRangeSetType Sets the integration range type of the selected integration range. Default OFF.
KtNA_MeasurementPNQueryData Returns the dBc data array for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNQueryMemoryData Returns the dBc memory data for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNQuerySpuriousData Returns the spurious data (0 or 1) for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNQuerySpuriousMemoryData Returns the spurious memory data (0 or 1) for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSetData Sets the dBc data array for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSetMemoryData Sets the dBc memory data for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpotNoiseGetUserEnabled Returns the state of spot noise calculation for the specified user-defined offset frequency.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpotNoiseGetUserOffsetFrequency Returns the offset frequency on which the spot noise is calculated.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpotNoiseGetUserYValue Returns the spot noise y-axis value of the specified offset frequency.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpotNoiseQueryDecadeXValues Returns the spot noise x-axis array of all decade offset frequencies.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpotNoiseQueryDecadeYValues Returns the spot noise y-axis array of all decade offset frequencies.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpotNoiseSetUserEnabled Enables and disables spot noise calculation for the specified user-defined offset frequency. Default 1.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpotNoiseSetUserOffsetFrequency Sets the offset frequency on which the spot noise is calculated.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpuriousDeleteTableData Deletes the User Spur Table data which defines spurs to omit.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpuriousDeleteThresholdTable Deletes the spurious threshold table.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpuriousQueryData Returns a list of detected spurs. Data per spur includes frequency, power, and jitter.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpuriousQueryTableData Returns the User Spur Table data which defines spurs to omit.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpuriousQueryThresholdTableData Returns the spurious threshold table data.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpuriousSetTableData Sets the User Spur Table data which defines spurs to omit.
KtNA_MeasurementPNSpuriousSetThresholdTableData Sets the spurious threshold table data.
KtNA_MeasurementQueryData Reads Measurement data, Memory data, or Normalization Divisor data from the Data Access Map location.
KtNA_MeasurementQueryRawData
KtNA_MeasurementQueryReceiverData Returns receiver data for the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementQueryResponseValues Returns the Y-axis values for the selected measurement in the current units.
KtNA_MeasurementQuerySNPData Reads SnP data from the selected measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementQuerySNPDataForSpecifiedPorts Reads SNP data from the selected measurement for the specified ports.
KtNA_MeasurementQueryStimulusValues Returns the stimulus values for the selected measurement in the current units.
KtNA_MeasurementRippleLimitIsPassing Read the ripple test result for the active trace.
KtNA_MeasurementRippleLimitQueryData
KtNA_MeasurementRippleLimitQueryTestResult
KtNA_MeasurementRippleLimitSetData
KtNA_MeasurementSaveSNPData Saves SNP data from the selected measurement for the specified ports.
KtNA_MeasurementSaveSNPDataFast Saves SNP data from the selected measurement for the specified ports and reduce the saving time.
KtNA_MeasurementSelectByMeasNo Sets the selected measurement for the channel using the Tr#.
KtNA_MeasurementSetParameter Sets a measurement parameter for the specified measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementSetRawData
KtNA_MeasurementSetUnit Sets the units for the specified data format. Measurements with display formats other than those specified are not affected.
KtNA_MeasurementSetXData Sets the X-axis of the selected measurement to a DC Source.
KtNA_MeasurementTimeDomainTransformSetLowPassMode Sets the start frequencies in LowPass Mode.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceAutoScaleY Performs an Autoscale on the specified trace in the specified measurement, providing the best fit display.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceCreate This command creates a new trace in the specified window and connects the trace to measurement which results in the trace displaying the data from measurement.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceDelete Deletes the trace associated with the specified measurement number.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceMathStoreDataInMemory Puts the currently selected measurement trace into memory.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceMove Moves a trace associated with measurement number to the specified window. If the window is OFF, it will be turn ON.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceSelect Activates the specified measurement to be selected.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsExecuteAnalysis For the active trace of specified channel, executes the statistical analysis specified.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsGetData Returns the trace statistic data for the selected statistic type for the specified channel.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsGetRangeStart Returns the start of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsGetRangeStop Returns the stop value of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsQueryType Returns statistic type.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsSetRangeStart Sets the start of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsSetRangeStop Sets the stop value of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_MeasurementTraceStatisticsSetType Sets statistic type.
KtNA_MeasurementWriteData Writes Measurement data, Memory data, or Normalization Divisor data to the Data Access Map location.
KtNA_MemoryCopy Copies source file to destination file.
KtNA_MemoryCreateDirectory Makes a folder.
KtNA_MemoryDelete Deletes the specified file.
KtNA_MemoryDownloadData Transfers data FROM the remote PC - TO the VNA.
KtNA_MemoryGetCatalog Returns a comma-separated string of all file names that are in the specified folder. All file types (even unknown types) are listed.
KtNA_MemoryGetCatalogOfSpecifiedFileType Returns a comma-separated string of file names that are in the specified folder.
KtNA_MemoryGetCurrentDirectory Returns the current folder name.
KtNA_MemoryLoadFile Loads the specified file.
KtNA_MemoryLoadFileOfSpecifiedFileType Loads the specified file.
KtNA_MemoryLoadLimitTestData Loads limit test data of the active trace of the active channel from a CSV file.
KtNA_MemoryLoadRippleLimitTestData Loads ripple limit test data of the active trace of the active channel from a CSV file.
KtNA_MemoryQueryDateTime Returns the (year, month, day) and (hour, minute, second) that the specified file was last saved.
KtNA_MemoryRemoveDirectory Removes the specified folder.
KtNA_MemoryRename Renames source file to destination file.
KtNA_MemorySaveLimitTestData Saves limit test data of the active trace of the active channel into a CSV file.
KtNA_MemorySaveRippleLimitTestData Saves ripple limit test data of the active trace of the active channel into a CSV file.
KtNA_MemorySaveScreenDump Stores the specified file as a bitmap file (.bmp).
KtNA_MemorySaveTraceData Stores trace data to the following file types: *.prn, *.cti, *.csv, *.mdf.
KtNA_MemorySelectDirectory Changes the folder name.
KtNA_MemoryStoreFile Stores the specified file (.sta, .cal, .cst, .csa, .snp, s2px).
KtNA_MemoryStoreFileOfSpecifiedFileType Stores the specified file (.sta, .cal, .cst, .csa, .snp, s2px).
KtNA_MemoryUploadData Transfers data FROM the VNA - TO a remote PC.
KtNA_reset Places the instrument in a known state and configures instrument options on which the IVI specific driver depends (for example, enabling/disabling headers). For an IEEE 488.2 instrument, Reset sends the command string *RST to the instrument.
KtNA_ResetWithDefaults Does the equivalent of Reset and then, (1) disables class extension capability groups, (2) sets attributes to initial values defined by class specs, and (3) configures the driver to option string settings used when Initialize was last executed.
KtNA_revision_query Retrieves revision information from the instrument.
KtNA_self_test Performs an instrument self test, waits for the instrument to complete the test, and queries the instrument for the results. If the instrument passes the test, TestResult is zero and TestMessage is 'Self test passed'.
KtNA_SetAfrBandLimitationEnabled Sets the value of the AFR_BAND_LIMITATION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrCorrectionEnabled Sets the value of the AFR_CORRECTION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrCorrectionMatchEnabled Sets the value of the AFR_CORRECTION_MATCH_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrFixtureDataFileType Sets the value of the AFR_FIXTURE_DATA_FILE_TYPE attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrFixtureDataPort Sets the value of the AFR_FIXTURE_DATA_PORT attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrFixtureInput Sets the value of the AFR_FIXTURE_INPUT attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrLengthCorrectionEnabled Sets the value of the AFR_LENGTH_CORRECTION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrNumberOfFixtures Sets the value of the AFR_NUMBER_OF_FIXTURES attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrStandardAllOpenEnabled Sets the value of the AFR_STANDARD_ALL_OPEN_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrStandardAllShortEnabled Sets the value of the AFR_STANDARD_ALL_SHORT_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetAfrStandardImpedanceMethod Sets the value of the AFR_STANDARD_IMPEDANCE_METHOD attribute.
KtNA_SetAttributeViBoolean This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_SetAttributeViInt32 This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_SetAttributeViReal64 This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_SetAttributeViSession This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_SetAttributeViString This routine is used to access low-level settings of the instrument. See the attributeID parameter for a link to all attributes of the instrument.
KtNA_SetCalibrationSessionCalSetPrefix Sets the value of the CALIBRATION_SESSION_CAL_SET_PREFIX attribute.
KtNA_SetCalibrationSessionIfBandwidth Sets the value of the CALIBRATION_SESSION_IF_BANDWIDTH attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersAbsoluteTonePower Sets the value of the ABSOLUTE_TONE_POWER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersDisplayInterpolationEnabled Sets the value of the DISPLAY_INTERPOLATION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersRelativeTonePower Sets the value of the RELATIVE_TONE_POWER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersSweepNoOfPhasePoint Sets the value of the NO_OF_PHASE_POINT attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersSweepNoOfPowerSteps Sets the value of the NO_OF_POWER_STEPS attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersSweepStartPower Sets the value of the START_POWER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersSweepStopPower Sets the value of the STOP_POWER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelActiveParametersTuningToneMode Sets the value of the TUNING_TONE_MODE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelAveragingEnabled Sets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelAveragingFactor Sets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_FACTOR attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelAveragingIfBandwidth Sets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_IF_BANDWIDTH attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelAveragingMode Sets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_MODE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelAveragingReduceIfBandwidthEnabled Sets the value of the CHANNEL_AVERAGING_REDUCE_IF_BANDWIDTH_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationIdentity Sets the value of the IDENTITY attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationInsituEnabled Sets the value of the IN_SITU_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationNumber Sets the value of the NUMBER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationUserDescript Sets the value of the USER_DESCRIPTION attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalkitEcalModuleCharacterizationVnaDescript Sets the value of the VNA_DESCRIPTION attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalSetName Sets the value of the CHANNEL_CAL_SET_NAME attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalsetsDescription Sets the value of the DESCRIPTION3 attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCalsetsReceiver Sets the value of the RECEIVER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionAsyncSweepingEnabled Sets the value of the ASYNC_SWEEPING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCacheMode Sets the value of the CACHE_MODE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitConnectorFamilyName Sets the value of the FAMILY_NAME attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitDescription Sets the value of the DESCRIPTION attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitName Sets the value of the NAME attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardCharImpedance Sets the value of the CHAR_IMPEDANCE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardDescription Sets the value of the DESCRIPTION2 attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardElectricalDelay Sets the value of the ELECTRICAL_DELAY attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardInsertionLoss Sets the value of the INSERTION_LOSS attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardLabel Sets the value of the LABEL attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardMaxFrequency Sets the value of the MAX_FREQUENCY attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardMedia Sets the value of the MEDIA attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardMinFrequency Sets the value of the MIN_FREQUENCY attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardTreal Sets the value of the T_REAL attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitStandardTzImag Sets the value of the TZ_IMAG attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitTrlLossCorrEnabled Sets the value of the TRL_LOSS_CORR_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitTrlReferenceImpedance Sets the value of the TRL_REFERENCE_IMPEDANCE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalkitTrlReferencePlane Sets the value of the TRL_REFERENCE_PLANE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionCalMethod Sets the value of the CAL_METHOD attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionConfidenceCheckParameter Sets the value of the PARAMETER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionEnabled Sets the value of the CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionEnrNoiseSourceSerialNo Sets the value of the ENR_NOISE_SOURCE_SERIAL_NO attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionEnrTableId Sets the value of the ENR_TABLEID attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionErrorTermModel Sets the value of the ERROR_TERM_MODEL attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionForwardCalEnabled Sets the value of the FORWARD_CAL_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionGcCalkit Sets the value of the GC_CAL_KIT attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionGcConnectorType Sets the value of the GC_CONNECTOR_TYPE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionGcPowerLevel Sets the value of the GC_POWER_LEVEL attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionInterpolationEnabled Sets the value of the INTERPOLATION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionIsolAveragingIncrement Sets the value of the ISOL_AVERAGING_INCREMENT attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionIsolEnabled Sets the value of the ISOL_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionNoiseEnrDeembeddingEnabled Sets the value of the ENR_DEEMBEDDING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionNoisePowerSensorDeembeddingEnabled Sets the value of the POWER_SENSOR_DEEMBEDDING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionNoiseSourceTemp Sets the value of the NOISE_SOURCE_TEMP attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionNoiseThruDeembeddingEnabled Sets the value of the THRU_DEEMBEDDING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionPortSubsetEnabled Sets the value of the ENABLED8 attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionPreferenceCalsetSave Sets the value of the CALSET_SAVE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionPreferenceEcalOrientationEnabled Sets the value of the E_CAL_ORIENTATION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionPreferenceEcalOverrangeEnabled Sets the value of the E_CAL_OVERRANGE_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionReceiverPowerOffset Sets the value of the RECEIVER_POWER_OFFSET attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionSystemImpedance Sets the value of the SYSTEM_IMPEDANCE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionTwoStandardsEnabled Sets the value of the TWO_STANDARDS_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionVelocityFactor Sets the value of the VELOCITY_FACTOR attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionWaveCorrMethod Sets the value of the WAVE_CORR_METHOD attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelCorrectionWaveNormMethod Sets the value of the WAVE_NORM_METHOD attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqCoupleDivisor Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_DIVISOR attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqCoupleId Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_ID attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqCoupleMultiplier Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_MULTIPLIER attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqCoupleOffset Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_OFFSET attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqFrequencyRangeCouplingEnabled Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLING_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqFrequencyRangeIfbw Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_IFBW attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqFrequencyRangeNo Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_NO attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqFrequencyRangeStart Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_START attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqFrequencyRangeStop Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_STOP attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDiqUpConversionEnabled Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DIQ_UP_CONVERSION_ENABLED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDistortionAdcFilterType Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DISTORTION_ADC_FILTER_TYPE attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDistortionAmplifierGain Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DISTORTION_AMPLIFIER_GAIN attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDistortionAttenuatorIncluded Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DISTORTION_ATTENUATOR_INCLUDED attribute.
KtNA_SetChannelDistortionBandTableDisplayFont Sets the value of the CHANNEL_DISTORTION_BAND_TABLE_DISPLAY_FONT attribute.

KtNA_SetXSystemCalibrateAllCalibrationNo Sets the value of the X_SYSTEM_CALIBRATE_ALL_CALIBRATION_NO attribute.
KtNA_SetXSystemCalibrateAllCsetPrefix Sets the value of the X_SYSTEM_CALIBRATE_ALL_CSET_PREFIX attribute.

KtNA_SetXSystemCapabilityHwPowerPort Sets the value of the X_SYSTEM_CAPABILITY_HW_POWER_PORT attribute.

KtNA_SetXSystemCapabilityHwPowerType Sets the value of the X_SYSTEM_CAPABILITY_HW_POWER_TYPE attribute.
KtNA_SetXSystemUPresetFPanel Sets the value of the X_SYSTEM_U_PRESET_F_PANEL attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryAuxConnector Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_AUX_CONNECTOR attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryChannelNo Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_CHANNEL_NO attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryEnable Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_ENABLE attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryInputDelay Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_DELAY attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryInputHandshake Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_HANDSHAKE attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryInputPolarity Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_POLARITY attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryInputRoute Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_ROUTE attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryOutputDelay Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_OUTPUT_DELAY attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerChannelAuxiliaryOutputDuration Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_OUTPUT_DURATION attribute.

KtNA_SetXTriggerReadySourceManualEnable Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_READY_SOURCE_MANUAL_ENABLE attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerRouteInput Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_ROUTE_INPUT attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerRouteReady Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_ROUTE_READY attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerScope Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_SCOPE attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerSlope Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_SLOPE attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerSource Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_SOURCE attribute.
KtNA_SetXTriggerType Sets the value of the X_TRIGGER_TYPE attribute.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetCount Read the highest dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetDCSourceEnabled Read the specified DC source's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetDCSourceEnabledWithPortNo Read the specified DC source’s ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetDCSourceOrder Read the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetDCSourceOrderWithPortNo Read the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetPointCount Read the point count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetRepeatCount Read the repeat count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepGetSourceDomainCatalog Read the names of source domains in the multi-dimensional sweep whose state is ON and whose dimension order is the specified dimension order.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepSetDCSourceEnabled Set the specified DC source's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepSetDCSourceEnabledWithPortNo Set the specified DC source’s ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepSetDCSourceOrder Set the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepSetDCSourceOrderWithPortNo Set the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepSetPointCount Set the point count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KtNA_SourcePortMultiDimensionalSweepSetRepeatCount Set the repeat count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlGetInternalPortCatalog Returns the available internal ports that the external port can be set to.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlGetModeCatalog Returns the available phase control modes for the specified port.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlGetParameterCatalog Returns the available parameters that are set.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlGetReferencePortCatalog Returns the available ports that can be used as phase control reference ports for the phase controlled port.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlPowerOffsetQueryCorrectionData Read a ratio amplitude offset array.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlPowerOffsetSetCorrectionData Write a ratio amplitude offset array.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlQueryCorrectionData Reads an array of phase offsets.
KtNA_SourcePortPhaseControlSetCorrectionData Write an array of phase offsets.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerALCGetCatalog Returns a list of valid ALC modes for the specified channel and port number.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerALCReceiverGetRatio Returns the receiver ratio to be used with receiver leveling.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionAbort Aborts a source power calibration sweep that is in progress.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionAcquire Initiates a source power cal acquisition sweep using the power sensor attached to the specified channel (A or B) on the power meter, using a USB power sensor, or using the specified VNA receiver.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionAcquireWithSync Initiates a source power cal acquisition sweep using the power sensor attached to the specified channel (A or B) on the power meter, using a USB power sensor, or using the specified VNA receiver.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionGetFrequencyRange Returns the frequency range over which the power sensors connected to the specified channels (A and B) of the power meter can be used (minimum frequency, maximum frequency).
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionGetPowerMeter Returns the type and location of the power meter to be used in a source power calibration.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionGetReferenceCalFactor Specifies the reference cal factor for the power sensor connected to channel A or B of the power meter. If the power meter has only a single channel, that channel is considered channel A.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionIsPowerMeterChannelUsedWithFreq Returns a boolean 1 or 0 (ON or OFF) indicating whether the sensor is to be used at the specified frequency.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionQueryCalibrationData Reads source power calibration data.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionQueryPriorCalibrationData Reads power correction values from the previous iteration of the source power cal.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionSave Applies the array of correction values after a source power calibration sweep has completed.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionSelectPowerMeterChannel Sets and returns the power sensor channel (A or B) to be used.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionSetCalibrationData Writes source power calibration data.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionSetFrequencyRange Specifies the frequency range over which the power sensors connected to the specified channels (A and B) of the power meter can be used (minimum frequency, maximum frequency).
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionSetPowerMeter Specifies the type and location of the power meter to be used in a source power calibration.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionSetPriorCalibrationData Writes power correction values from the previous iteration of the source power cal.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionSetReferenceCalFactor Specifies the reference cal factor for the power sensor connected to channel A or B of the power meter. If the power meter has only a single channel, that channel is considered channel A.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionTableGetNoOfSegments Returns the number of segments that are currently in the selected table. Default 0.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionTableGetSelected Returns Selected table you want to write to or read from.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionTableQueryData Read data into the selected table.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionTableQueryFrequencies Read frequency values for the selected table (cal factor table for a power sensor, or the loss compensation table).
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionTableSelect Selects which table you want to write to or read from.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionTableSetData Write data into the selected table.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrectionTableSetFrequencies Write frequency values for the selected table (cal factor table for a power sensor, or the loss compensation table).
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrGuidedSensorAdd Adds a power sensor to be used during a Guided Power Calibration.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrGuidedSensorGetCount Returns the number of configured power sensors to be used during a Guided Power Calibration.
KtNA_SourcePortPowerCorrGuidedSensorRemove Deletes a power sensor from the sensors to be used during a Guided Power Calibration.
KtNA_StandardStimulusSweepFrequencySetSpanForFullRange Sets the frequency span to the entire frequency range of the analyzer. Default Maximum frequency span of the analyzer.
KtNA_StandardStimulusSweepPulseGetPulseShapeCatalog Returns the list of available pulse shape type.
KtNA_StatusClear Clears all event registers and the error message queue. Enable and any transition registers are unaffected.
KtNA_StatusDisableServiceRequestEvents Disables ServiceRequestEvent callbacks. SRQ events are not supported on non-488.2 connections.
KtNA_StatusEnableServiceRequestEvents Enables ServiceRequestEvent callbacks. SRQ events are not supported on non-488.2 connections.
KtNA_StatusIsReadyForHardwareTrigger Checks if the VNA is ready for a hardware trigger.
KtNA_StatusOperationReadConditionRegister Read the Operation Condition register (16 bit). Conditions which are part of the instrument's normal operation. Condition bits represent the current instrument state. Reading a Condition register does not change the value of the bits.
KtNA_StatusOperationReadEventRegister Read the Operation Event register (16 bit). Conditions which are part of the instrument's normal operation. Event bits capture changes in Condition bits and remain set until cleared. Reading an event register clears it.
KtNA_StatusPreset Sets the standard SCPI enable registers and transition filters.
KtNA_StatusQuestionableReadConditionRegister Read the Questionable Condition register (16 bit). Conditions which are part of the instrument's normal operation. Condition bits represent the current instrument state. Reading a Condition register does not change the value of the bits.
KtNA_StatusQuestionableReadEventRegister Read the Questionable Event register (16 bit). Conditions which are part of the instrument's normal operation. Event bits capture changes in Condition bits and remain set until cleared. Reading an event register clears it.
KtNA_StatusReadStatusByteRegister Queries the StatusByte register.
KtNA_StatusSerialPoll Serial poll the instrument status byte. Not supported on non-488.2 connections.
KtNA_StatusStandardEventReadEventRegister Read the Standard Event Status register (8 bit). Conditions defined by IEEE 488.2. Event bits remain set until cleared. Reading the StandardEvent register clears it.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetFeatureCatalog Returns the list of licensed features.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetIFBandwidthCatalog Returns the list of supported IFBW values.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetIMSResolutionBWCatalog Returns the list of supported Resolution BW values for the IMSpectrum channel.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetLicenseCatalog Returns the list of licenses.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxFrequency Returns the maximum frequency of the analyzer, including any over-sweep. Over-sweep frequencies can be set but are not specified.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxIFBandwidth Returns the maximum IFBW for the standard IF filter.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxLeveledSourcePower Returns the maximum leveled source power setting in dB.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxNoOfChannels Returns the maximum possible number of channels.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxNoOfPoints Returns the maximum number of points.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxNoOfTracesPerWindow Returns the maximum number of traces per window.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxNoOfWindows Returns the maximum number of windows.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxPresetFrequency Returns the maximum specified frequency of the analyzer. Does not include any over-sweep.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMaxTriggerDelay Returns the maximum trigger delay of the analyzer.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMinFrequency Returns the minimum frequency of the analyzer, including any under-sweep. Under-sweep frequencies can be set but are not specified.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMinIFBandwidth Returns the minimum IFBW for the standard IF filter.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMinLeveledSourcePower Returns the minimum leveled source power setting in dB with 0 dB attenuation.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMinNoOfPoints Returns the minimum number of points.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMinPresetFrequency Returns the minimum specified frequency of the analyzer. Does not include any under-sweep.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetMinTriggerDelay Returns the minimum trigger delay of the analyzer.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetNBWCatalogWithNAReceiver Returns the list of supported Noise Bandwidth values when using the NA receiver for noise measurements
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetNBWCatalogWithNoiseReceiver Returns the list of supported Noise Bandwidth values when using a noise receiver
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesGetSAResolutionBWCatalog Returns the list of supported Resolution BW values for the SA channel.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetDCReceiverCatalog Returns a list of names of the internal DC receivers.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetDCSourceCatalog Returns a list of names of the internal DC sources.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetInternalPortCatalog Returns a list of internal test port names.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetInternalPortCount Returns the number of internal test ports.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetInternalSourcePortCatalog Returns a list of internal source port names.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetInternalSourcePortCount Returns the number of internal source ports.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetMaxDiscretePower Returns a single max leveled power value (in dBm) indicating the most restrictive maximum for all discrete maximum powers (the minimum of all max leveled powers).
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetMaxPowerRange Returns the minimum of all max leveled power values (in dBm) from range start frequency to stop frequency (inclusive).
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetMaxReceiverAttenuation Returns the maximum amount of receiver attenuation on the specified port.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetMaxSourceAttenuation Returns the maximum amount of source attenuation on the specified port.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetMinDiscretePower Returns a single minimum power value (in dBm) indicating the most restrictive minimum for all discrete minimum powers (the maximum of all minimum powers).
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetMinPowerRange The maximum of all min power values (in dBm) from range start frequency to stop frequency (inclusive).
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetNoOfDCReceiver Returns the number of internal DC receivers in the analyzer.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetNoOfDCSource Returns the number of internal DC sources in the analyzer.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetPortCatalog Returns a list of test port names including external testset ports.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetPortCount Returns the number of test ports including external testset ports.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetPortNo Returns the port number associated with the specified port name.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetReceiverAttenuatorStepSize Returns the step size of the receiver attenuator on the specified port.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetReceiverCount Returns the number of receivers in the analyzer.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetRFPathElement Returns the name of the value for the given path element name.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetRFPathElementCatalog Returns a string with the names of all valid RF path configuration elements.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetRFPathElementValueCatalog Returns all valid values for the given path configuration element.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetSourceAttenuatorStepSize Returns the step size of the source attenuator on the specified port.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetSourceCount Returns the number of source ports, including any configured external sources.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetSourcePortCatalog Returns a list of source port names, including any configured external sources.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareGetSourcePortCount Returns the number of source ports, including any configured external sources.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareIsDirectReceiverAccessPresent Returns whether or not the analyzer has direct receiver access (front-panel jumpers).
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareIsGainCouplingControllable Returns whether or not the gain coupling can be changed.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareIsLFExtensionPresent Returns whether or not the VNA has the low frequency extension (LFE) installed.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareIsReceiverAttenuatorPresent Returns whether or not there is a receiver attenuator on the specified port.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareIsReferenceBypassSwitchPresent Returns whether or not the specified port number has a reference bypass switch.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareQueryDiscreteFrequencies Returns the list of discrete frequencies corresponding to the powers returned by the discrete min and max power list functions.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareQueryMaxDiscretePowerList Returns an array of max leveled power values (in dBm), where each element corresponds to the maximum leveled power possible for CW stimulus at the corresponding frequency
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareQueryMinDiscretePowerList Returns an array of minimum power values (in dBm), where each element corresponds to the minimum power possible for CW stimulus at the corresponding frequency set
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareResetPower Resets all power range properties to default values, as if the instrument had been preset.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareSetDiscreteFrequencies Sets the list of discrete frequencies corresponding to the powers returned by the discrete min and max power list functions.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesHardwareSetRFPathElement Sets the value of a path element.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesIsDwellTimeSupported Returns whether a given IF Bandwidth value supports dwell time
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesIsFeatureEnabled Returns if the specified feature is enabled or disabled.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesIsFOMPresent Returns whether or not the analyzer has FOM installed.
KtNA_SystemCapabilitiesIsReducedIFBWSupported Returns whether the VNA supports the Reduce IF BW at Low Frequencies feature.
KtNA_SystemClearIO Performs an IEEE 488.1-style clear of the device.
KtNA_SystemCopySettings Copies settings only, or settings and measurements, traces, markers, and limit lines from an existing channel, to a new channel.
KtNA_SystemFactoryPreset Performs a standard Preset, then deletes the default trace, measurement, and window. The VNA screen becomes blank.
KtNA_SystemGetActiveChannel Returns the number of the active channel.
KtNA_SystemGetActiveMeasName Returns the name of the active measurement.
KtNA_SystemGetActiveMeasNo Returns the active measurement number.
KtNA_SystemGetActiveSheetNo Returns the active sheet number.
KtNA_SystemGetActiveSourcePort Gets the active source port number.
KtNA_SystemGetActiveTestPort Gets the active test port number.
KtNA_SystemGetActiveTrace Returns the active trace number. Default 1.
KtNA_SystemGetReceiverTemperature Returns the temperature on the Receiver microcircuit.
KtNA_SystemPreset Deletes all traces, measurements, and windows. In addition, resets the analyzer to factory defined default settings and creates a S11 measurement named "CH1_S11_1".
KtNA_SystemQueryDateTime Returns the system date (Comma separated numbers representing year, month, day) and time (Comma separated numbers representing hours, minutes, seconds).
KtNA_SystemReadIEEEBlockR4 Reads a complete response from the instrument and returns it as a float array.
KtNA_SystemReadIEEEBlockR8 Reads a complete response from the instrument and returns it as a double array.
KtNA_SystemRegisterEventHandler Registers a driver application event handler callback function to be called when the specified event type occurs.
KtNA_SystemSetLocalState Sets the local or remote state to local.
KtNA_SystemSync Sync number of Channels, Measurements, Windows and Traces instances in the driver with instrument's current state.
KtNA_SystemTracingFlush Appends the contents of the logging buffer to the file specified by the FileName property. Default file is 'KtNA_LogOutput.txt' in the folder where the driver application is running.
KtNA_SystemTracingWrite Writes a message to the logging buffer at the current Level if Enabled is true.
KtNA_SystemUnregisterEventHandler Unregisters a previously registered driver application callback function to not be called when the specified event type occurs.
KtNA_SystemUserPresetExecute Performs a User Preset.
KtNA_SystemUserPresetRecallState Loads an existing instrument state file (.sta or .cst) to be used for User Preset. Subsequent execution of User preset will cause the VNA to assume this instrument state.
KtNA_SystemUserPresetSaveState Saves the current instrument settings as UserPreset.sta. Subsequent execution of User preset will cause the VNA to assume this instrument state.
KtNA_SystemWaitForOperationComplete Does not return until all previously started instrument operations complete or throws exception if maxTime has expired.
KtNA_SystemWriteIEEEBlockR4 Writes float array to the instrument.
KtNA_SystemWriteIEEEBlockR8 Writes double array to the instrument.
KtNA_TriggerGetNoOfAuxConnectors Returns the number of AUX trigger input / output connector pairs in the instrument.
KtNA_UnlockSession Releases a previously obtained mutlithread lock.
KtNA_viRead Reads a complete response from the instrument.
KtNA_viWrite Write an array of bytes to the device. Must end with TerminationCharacter (\n) for SOCKET or ASRL connections.
KtNA_xAbort Stops all sweeps - then resume per current trigger settings.
KtNA_xAFRFixturePreview Refreshes preview data.
KtNA_xAFRFixturePreviewDataMarkerY Reads the impedance profile of the calculated fixture model at a specified position.
KtNA_xAFRFixturePreviewDataQuery Reads the impedance profile of the calculated fixture model.
KtNA_xAFRFixtureRefZ Chooses the calibration reference Z0 after fixture removal.
KtNA_xAFRFixtureRefZQuery Returns the the calibration reference Z0 type.
KtNA_xAFRFixtureRefZWithUserInput Chooses the calibration reference Z0 after fixture removal.
KtNA_xAFRInitialize Restores the default AFR settings.
KtNA_xAFRSaveFilename Specifies the file paths of saved fixture data.
KtNA_xAFRSaveFilenameQuery Returns the file paths of saved fixture data.
KtNA_xAFRStandardDataMarkerY This command reads the impedance of the measured standard at a specified position.
KtNA_xAFRStandardDataQuery Reads the impedance profile of the measured standard.
KtNA_xAFRStandardEditFLength For the selected fixture, this method sets the fixture length for 1X AFR.
KtNA_xAFRStandardEditFLengthQuery For the selected fixture, this method reads the fixture length for both 1X or 2X AFR.
KtNA_xAFRStandardEditGate Sets the gate position for the selected fixture.
KtNA_xAFRStandardEditGateQuery Reads the gate position for the selected fixture.
KtNA_xAFRStandardEditImpedance Sets the impedance for the selected impedance term.
KtNA_xAFRStandardLoad Loads the calibration standards data from a file.
KtNA_xAFRStandardLoadQuery Returns the file path of existing measurement data.
KtNA_xAFRStandardThru Specifies fixture thru settings.
KtNA_xAFRStandardThruQuery Specifies fixture thru settings.
KtNA_xAFRStandardThruWithThruLength Specifies fixture thru settings.
KtNA_xAFRStandardUse Chooses the calibration standards.
KtNA_xAFRStandardUseQuery Returns the string of used standards, separated by commas.
KtNA_xAFRStandardUseWithEnable Chooses the calibration standards.
KtNA_xCalculateDTopology
KtNA_xCalculateDTopologyQuery
KtNA_xCalculateEquationLibraryFunctions Returns the functions in the specified DLL.
KtNA_xCalculateEquationLibraryImport Imports the functions in the specified DLL.
KtNA_xCalculateEquationLibraryImportQuery Returns whether the functions have been imported into the VNA.
KtNA_xCalculateEquationLibraryRemove Removes an imported Equation Editor DLL from the VNA.
KtNA_xCalculateEquationValidQuery Returns a boolean value to indicate if the current equation on the selected measurement for the specified channel is valid.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorApply Copies the draft fixture to active fixture.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortOffsetPhase Sets the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortOffsetPhaseQuery Returns the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortOffsetPower Sets the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortOffsetPowerQuery Returns the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortStimulusTrueState Sets the True Mode state for a specified balanced port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortStimulusTrueStateQuery Reads the True Mode state for a specified balanced port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortSweepPhaseStart Sets the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortSweepPhaseStartQuery Returns the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortSweepPhaseStop Sets the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunBPortSweepPhaseStopQuery Returns the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortOffsetPhase Sets the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortOffsetPhaseQuery Returns the phase offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortOffsetPower Sets the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortOffsetPowerQuery Returns the power offset between the two balanced stimulus ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortSweepPhaseStart Sets the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortSweepPhaseStartQuery Returns the start value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortSweepPhaseStop Sets the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunLPortSweepPhaseStopQuery Returns the stop value for a phase sweep.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunParameter Selects the measurement parameter for the specified trace.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunParameterCatalogQuery This query returns the list of measurement parameters available for the currently selected device type and topology.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunParameterQuery Returns the measurement parameter for the specified trace. Default Sdd11.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunTopology Sets the mapping of the VNA ports to the DUT ports for the specified Balanced measurement device.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorBalunTopologyQuery Returns the mapping of the VNA ports to the DUT ports for the specified Balanced measurement device.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitCatalogQuery Returns a comma-separated list of circuit numbers created in the draft circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitDevicePortsQuery Returns the Device ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitDevicePortsReverseQuery Returns whether or not the ports on an existing S2P file are reversed.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitEmbedTypeQuery Returns whether the circuit is embedded or de-embedded.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitFileExtrapolateQuery Returns whether or not extrapolation is allowed
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitFileModifyQuery Returns the current state of the Modify setting.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitFileQuery Returns the filename.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterCQuery Returns the capacitance circuit element for the specified circuit. Default 0.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterDelayQuery Returns the delay value in time.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterGQuery Returns the conductance circuit element for the specified circuit. Default 0.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterLossValueQuery Returns the loss at DC.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterLQuery Returns the inductance circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterRInQuery Returns the resistance (R) value at input of transformer (real only).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterROutQuery Returns the resistance (R) value at output of transformer (real only).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitParameterRQuery Returns the resistance circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitStateQuery Returns the circuit ON or OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorCircuitVNAPortsQuery Returns the VNA ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftApply Copies the draft fixture to active fixture.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitAdd Create a block of the specified block type with the specified fixture port count.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitCatalogQuery
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitDelete Deletes the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitDevicePorts Sets the Device ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitDevicePortsQuery Returns the Device ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitDevicePortsReverse Sets whether or not to reverse the ports on an existing S2P file.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitDevicePortsReverseQuery Returns whether or not the ports on an existing S2P file are reversed .
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitEmbedType Sets whether the circuit should be embedded or de-embedded.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitEmbedTypeQuery Sets whether the circuit should be embedded or de-embedded.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitFile Sets the filename.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitFileExtrapolate Sets whether or not extrapolation is allowed.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitFileExtrapolateQuery Returns whether or not extrapolation is allowed.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitFileModify Sets all reflection and crosstalk parameters on the DUT side to zero.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitFileModifyQuery Returns reflection and crosstalk parameters modify setting on the DUT side.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitFileQuery Returns the filename.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterC Sets the capacitance (C) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterCQuery Returns the capacitance (C) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterDelay Sets port extension delay in time.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterDelayQuery Returns port extension delay in time.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterG Sets the conductance (G) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterGQuery Returns the conductance (G) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterL Sets the inductance (L) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterLossValue Sets the loss at DC.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterLossValueQuery Returns the loss at DC.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterLQuery Returns the inductance (L) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterR Sets the resistance (R) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterRIn Sets the resistance (R) value at input of transformer (real only).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterRInQuery Returns the resistance (R) value at input of transformer (real only).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterROut Sets the resistance (R) value at output of transformer (real only).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterROutQuery Returns the resistance (R) value at output of transformer (real only).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterRQuery Returns the resistance (R) circuit element for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterZ0 Sets the impedance (Z0) for the ideal block (scalar value).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitParameterZ0Query Returns the impedance (Z0) for the ideal block (scalar value).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitReset Resets the circuit section to preset values
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitState Turns the circuit ON and OFF.
