KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitStateQuery Returns the circuit ON and OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitVNAPorts Sets the VNA ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftCircuitVNAPortsQuery Returns the VNA ports for the specified circuit.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftDiscard Copies the active fixture into scratch/draft fixture (discards changes on scratch/draft fixture)
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDCLossValue Sets and returns the Port Loss at DC value for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDCLossValueQuery Returns the Port Loss at DC value for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDelay Sets the delay value in time at the specified port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDelayQuery Returns the delay value in time at the specified port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDistanceUnit Sets the units for specifying port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDistanceUnitQuery Returns the units for specifying port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDistanceValue Sets the port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortDistanceValueQuery Returns the port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortEnd
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortLossFrequency Sets the frequency for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortLossFrequencyQuery Returns the frequency for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortLossState Sets the ON or OFF state for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortLossStateQuery Returns the ON or OFF state for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortLossValue Sets the Loss value for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortLossValueQuery Returns the Loss value for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortMedium Sets the media type of the added fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortMediumQuery Returns the media type of the added fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortState Sets and returns the state of port extension for the specified port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortStateQuery Returns the state of port extension for the specified port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortVelocityCouple Sets the state of coupling with the system Velocity Factor value.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortVelocityCoupleQuery Returns the state of coupling with the system Velocity Factor value.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortVelocityFactor Sets the velocity factor of the fixture or added transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortVelocityFactorQuery Sets the velocity factor of the fixture or added transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortWaveguideCouple Sets the state of coupling with the system waveguide value.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortWaveguideCoupleQuery Returns the state of coupling with the system waveguide value.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortWaveguideFCutOff Sets the cuttoff (minimum) frequency of the added waveguide fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftExtensionPortWaveguideFCutOffQuery Returns the cuttoff (minimum) frequency of the added waveguide fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftSave Saves SNP file corresponding to the entire scratch or draft fixture.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionBPortComplex Sets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionBPortComplexQuery Gets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionBPortScalar Sets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionBPortScalarQuery Gets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionLPortComplex Sets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionLPortComplexQuery Gets the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionLPortScalar Sets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionLPortScalarQuery Gets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionSendedPortComplex Sets the complex impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionSendedPortComplexQuery Returns the complex impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionSendedPortScaler Sets the real part of impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionSendedPortScalerQuery Gets the real part of impedance value for the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionSendedPortState Sets the single-ended impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionSendedPortStateQuery Returns the state of the specified port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionState Returns the specified port impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorDraftZConversionStateQuery Returns the specified port impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortDCLossValueQuery Returns the Port Loss at DC value for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortDelayQuery Returns the delay value in time at the specified port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortDistanceUnitQuery Returns the units for specifying port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortDistanceValueQuery Returns the port extension delay in physical length (distance).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortLossFrequencyQuery Returns the frequency for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortLossStateQuery Returns the ON or OFF state for the Freq and Loss pair number and for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortLossValueQuery Returns the Loss value for the specified port number.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortMediumQuery Reurns the media type of the added fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortStateQuery Returns the state of port extension for the specified port.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortVelocityCoupleQuery Returns the state of coupling with the system Velocity Factor value.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortVelocityFactorQuery Returns the velocity factor of the fixture or added transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortWaveguideCoupleQuery Returns the state of coupling with the system waveguide value.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorExtensionPortWaveguideFCutOffQuery Returns the cuttoff (minimum) frequency of the added waveguide fixture or transmission line.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorLegacyQuery Returns 1 if user is only using legacy SCPI fixture commands. If the user has used the GUI or new SCPI commands to create a fixture, it will return 0. Default 1
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorPowerPortCompensate Sets power compensation for the active fixture
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorPowerPortCompensateQuery Returns on power compensation for the active fixture.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorSave Saves SNP file corresponding to the entire active fixture.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorSectionCircuitEnableQuery Returns all circuits ON or OFF for all ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorSectionExtensionEnableQuery Returns the port extensions ON or OFF for all ports.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorSectionZConversionEnableQuery Returns all ZConversions ON or OFF (both SE and BAL).
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorTopologyLoad Loads an active fixture from a file.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorTopologySave Saves the current active fixture topology to a file.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionBPortComplexQuery Returns the complex impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionBPortScalarQuery Returns the real part of impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionLPortComplexQuery Returns the complex impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionLPortScalarQuery Returns the real part of impedance value for the differential or common mode port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionSendedPortComplexQuery Returns the complex impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionSendedPortScalerQuery Returns the real part of impedance value for the single-ended port impedance conversion function.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionSendedPortStateQuery Returns the single-ended impedance conversion function ON or OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateFSimulatorZConversionStateQuery Returns the differential or commonmode port impedance conversion function ON/OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureBlimitFailQuery Get the bandwidth limit test results, for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureBlimitReportDataQuery Read the bandwidth value of the bandwidth test, for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureCorrectionIndicatorQuery Returns the error correction state for the selected measurement on the specified channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataQuery Reads Measurement data, Memory data, or Normalization Divisor data from the Data Access Map location.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataRaw
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataRawCatalogQuery
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataRawQuery
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataSet Writes Measurement data, Memory data, or Normalization Divisor data to the Data Access Map location.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataSNPPortsQuery Reads SNP data from the selected measurement for the specified ports.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataSNPQuery Reads SnP data from the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataSNPSave Saves SNP data from the selected measurement for the specified ports.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataSNPSaveFast Saves SNP data from the selected measurement for the specified ports and reduce the saving time.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataXAxis Sets the X-axis of the selected measurement to a DC Source.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataXAxisQuery Returns the DC Source setting for the X-axis of the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDataXValuesQuery Returns the stimulus values for the selected measurement in the current units.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDefine Creates a measurement but does NOT display it, on an existing or new channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDelete Deletes the specified measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureDeleteAll Deletes all measurements on the VNA.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureEquationValidQuery Returns a boolean value to indicate if the current equation on the selected measurement for the specified channel is valid.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFormatUnit Sets the units for the specified data format. Measurements with display formats other than those specified are not affected.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFormatUnitQuery Returns the units for the specified data format. Measurements with display formats other than those specified are not affected.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionDataQuery Returns the trace statistic data for the selected statistic type for the specified channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionDomainUserStart Sets the start of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionDomainUserStartQuery Returns the start of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionDomainUserStop Sets the stop value of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionDomainUserStopQuery Returns the stop value of the specified user-domain range.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionExecute For the active trace of specified channel, executes the statistical analysis specified.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionType Sets statistic type.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureFunctionTypeQuery Returns statistic type.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureGCDataDataQuery Returns measurement data at all frequency and power data points for GCA SMART sweeps and 2D sweeps.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureGCDataImagQuery For a specified data point, returns the imaginary part of the specified Gain Compression data.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureGCDataIterationsQuery In a SMART sweep, returns the max number of iterations that it took for ALL frequencies to converge.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureGCDataRealQuery For a specified data point, returns the real part of the Gain Compression data.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureHoldClear Resets the currently-stored data points to the live data trace and restarts the currently-selected Trace Hold type.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitData Sets data for limit segments.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitDataDelete Deletes all limit line data for the selected measurement on the specified channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitDataQuery Returns data for limit segments.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitFailQuery Returns the Pass / Fail status of the limit line test. Returns 1 (Fail) if any data point fails for any limit segment.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitReportAll Returns the test results (stimulus value, limit test result, upper limit value and lower limit value of all measurement points), for the selected trace.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitReportDataQuery Returns the stimulus values (frequency, power level or time) at all the measurement points that failed the limit test, for the selected trace.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitReportPointsQuery Reads the number of the measurement points that failed the limit test, for the active trace of selected channel. Default 0.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLimitSegmentCountQuery Returns the number of segments used in a limit test. All segments are counted, whether they are on or not.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLregressionDataQuery This command calculates “Y = A*X + B” from current measurement trace (mnum trace) and return “A” or “B” value. Default "A".
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureLregressionLineMemory Save the linear regression line data to the memory trace.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerAOff Turns all markers off for selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerBWidthOrNotchDataQuery Read the bandwidth/notch search result of marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerBWidthOrNotchRef Sets the bandwidth/notch marker function reference.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerBWidthOrNotchRefQuery Returns the bandwidth/notch marker function reference.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerBWidthOrNotchState Turns ON or OFF the bandwidth/notch search result display, for the active trace of selected channel .
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerBWidthOrNotchStateQuery Specifies whether the bandwidth/notch search result display is ON or OFF, for the active trace of selected channel .
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerBWidthOrNotchThreshold Sets the bandwidth/notch definition value (the value to define the pass-band of the filter) of marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerBWidthOrNotchThresholdQuery Returns the bandwidth/notch definition value (the value to define the pass-band of the filter) of marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerFunctionCompressionPInQuery Read the input power at the marker compression level.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerFunctionCompressionPOutQuery Read the output power at the marker compression level.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerFunctionExecute Immediately executes (performs) the specified search function.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerFunctionMultiExecute Immediately executes (performs) the specified multi search function.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPBackoffGainQuery Reads the power backoff gain value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPBackoffPinquery Reads the power backoff input value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPBackoffPoutQuery Reads the power backoff output value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPCompressionMaximumQuery Reads the max compression value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPCompressionQuery Reads the PNOP compression value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPGainMaximumQuery Reads the max gain from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPGainQuery Reads the PNOP gain value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPPinMaximumQuery Reads the max input power from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPPinQuery Reads the PNOP input value from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPPoutMaximumQuery Reads the max output power from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPNOPPoutQuery Reads the output power value of the offset marker from a PNOP marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationCompressionMaximumQuery Reads the compression maximum value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationCompressionSaturationQuery Reads the compression saturation value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationGainLinearQuery Reads the linear gain value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationGainMaximumQuery Reads the maximum gain value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationGainQuery Reads the saturation gain value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationPinMaximumQuery Reads the maximum input power from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationPinQuery Reads the power saturation input value from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationPoutMaximumQuery Reads the max back-off output power from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerPSaturationPoutQuery Reads the back-off output power from a PSAT marker search.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerReferenceY Sets the absolute Y-axis value of the reference marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerReferenceYQuery Returns the absolute Y-axis value of the reference marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerSet Sets the selected instrument setting to assume the value of the specified marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerType Sets the type of the specified marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerTypeQuery Returns the type of the specified marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerYQuery Reads the marker's Y-axis value.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMarkerYRealQuery Reads the marker's Y-axis value.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureMathMemorize Puts the currently selected measurement trace into memory.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureParameter Sets a measurement parameter for the specified measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureParameterQuery Gets a measurement parameter for the specified measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNAvarianceDeviationQuery Returns the calculated Allan deviation using the measured average time and the measured cut-off frequency for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNAvarianceJitterQuery Returns the calculated Jitter using the measured average time and the measured cut-off frequency for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNAvarianceVarianceQuery Returns the calculated Allan variance using the measured average time and the measured cut-off frequency for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNCarrierFrequencyQuery Returns the measured carrier frequency.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNCarrierLevelQuery Returns the measured carrier power.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNDataPdata Sets the dBc data array for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNDataPdataQuery Returns the dBc data array for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNDataPmemory Sets the dBc memory data for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNDataPmemoryQuery Returns the dBc memory data for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNDataSpdataQuery Returns the spurious data (0 or 1) for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNDataSpmemoryQuery Returns the spurious memory data (0 or 1) for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNIntegralRangeDataQuery Returns the specified data for the selected range number.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNIntegralRangeType Sets the integration range type of the selected integration range. Default OFF.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNIntegralRangeTypeQuery Gets the integration range type of the selected integration range.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSNoiseDecadesXQuery Returns the spot noise x-axis array of all decade offset frequencies.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSNoiseDecadesYQuery Returns the spot noise y-axis array of all decade offset frequencies.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSNoiseUserState Enables and disables spot noise calculation for the specified user-defined offset frequency. Default 1.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSNoiseUserStateQuery Returns the state of spot noise calculation for the specified user-defined offset frequency.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSNoiseUserX Sets the offset frequency on which the spot noise is calculated.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSNoiseUserXQuery Returns the offset frequency on which the spot noise is calculated.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSNoiseUserYQuery Returns the spot noise y-axis value of the specified offset frequency.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSpuriousDataQuery Returns a list of detected spurs. Data per spur includes frequency, power, and jitter.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSpuriousOsspurData Sets the User Spur Table data which defines spurs to omit.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSpuriousOsspurDataQuery Returns the User Spur Table data which defines spurs to omit.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSpuriousOsspurDelete Deletes the User Spur Table data which defines spurs to omit.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSpuriousThresholdTableData Sets the spurious threshold table data.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSpuriousThresholdTableDataQuery Returns the spurious threshold table data.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasurePNSpuriousThresholdTableDelete Deletes the spurious threshold table.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureRDataQuery Returns receiver data for the selected measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureRlimitData
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureRlimitDataQuery
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureRlimitFailQuery Read the ripple test result for the active trace.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureRlimitReportDataQuery
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureSAMarkerBdensityDataQuery Returns the band density level in dBm/Hz from the band density marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureSAMarkerBpowerDataQuery Returns the band power level from the band power marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureSAMarkerOCCBandCenterQuery Returns the occupied bandwidth center frequency.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureSAMarkerOCCBandPowerQuery Returns the occupied bandwidth power.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureSAMarkerOCCBandSpanQuery Sets and reads the frequency span of the band power marker.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureTransformTimeLPFrequency Sets the start frequencies in LowPass Mode.
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureXAxisUnitQuery Returns the current units of the X-axis
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureYAxisUnitQuery Returns the current units of the Y-axis
KtNA_xCalculateMeasureYvaluesQuery Returns the Y-axis values for the selected measurement in the current units.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterCatalogExtendedQuery Returns the names and parameters of existing measurements for the specified channel.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterDeleteAll Deletes all measurements on the VNA.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterMNumberSelect Sets the selected measurement for the channel using the Tr#.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterMNumberSelectQuery Returns the selected measurement for the channel using the Tr#.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterModifyExtended Modifies a standard measurement.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterTagNext Returns a string that is guaranteed to be unique and valid for use in adding new measurement for the specified channel.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterTNumberQuery Returns the trace number of the selected trace.
KtNA_xCalculateParameterWNumberQuery Returns the window number of the selected trace.
KtNA_xControlAuxiliaryFootswitchStateQuery Reads the Auxiliary connector Footswitch Input. Default 0.
KtNA_xControlAuxiliaryInputVoltageQuery Reads voltage on the Power I/O connector.
KtNA_xControlAuxiliaryOutputMode This command sets the mode of the selected "Analog Out" line on the Power I/O connector.
KtNA_xControlAuxiliaryOutputModeQuery This command reads the mode of the selected "Analog Out" line on the Power I/O connector.
KtNA_xControlAuxiliaryOutputVoltage Sets voltage on the Power I/O connector AnalogOut1|2 (PNA), AUX Out 1|2 (E5080B). Default 0.
KtNA_xControlAuxiliaryOutputVoltageQuery Reads voltage on the Power I/O connector AnalogOut1|2 (PNA), AUX Out 1|2 (E5080B).
KtNA_xControlAuxiliaryPassfailStatusQuery Returns the most recent pass/fail status value.
KtNA_xControlCalpodCommand Sends commands that control a Calpod module.
KtNA_xControlCalpodCommandQuery Reads query versions Calpod commands.
KtNA_xControlDCInputCurrentQuery Return the current measurement for DC sources.
KtNA_xControlDCOutputVoltage Set the voltage immediate one time DC current measurement. This function is not available on Soft Front Panel.
KtNA_xControlDCOutputVoltageQuery Gets the voltage immediate one time DC current measurement.
KtNA_xControlECalModulePathCountQuery Returns the number of unique states that exist for the specified path name on the selected ECal module.
KtNA_xControlECalModulePathState Number of the state to set.
KtNA_xControlExternalTestsetData Writes 13 bits of data to the specified address using the AD0 through AD12 lines of the external test set connector.
KtNA_xControlExternalTestsetDataQuery Writes 13 bits of data to the specified address using the AD0 through AD12 lines of the external test set connector.
KtNA_xControlExternalTestsetInterruptQuery Reads the boolean state of the Interrupt In line (pin 13) on the external test set connector.
KtNA_xControlExternalTestsetSweepholdoffQuery Reads the Sweep Holdoff Iine (pin 2) on the external test set connector.
KtNA_xControlHandlerData Writes data on the specified port.
KtNA_xControlHandlerDataQuery Reads data on the specified port.
KtNA_xControlHandlerInputQuery Reads a hardware latch that captures high to low transitions on Input1 of the Material Handler IO.
KtNA_xControlHandlerOutputData Sets the specified output line. Default 0 - Low.
KtNA_xControlHandlerOutputDataQuery Reads the specified output line.
KtNA_xControlHandlerOutputUserData Sets the specified USER output line. Default 0 - Low.
KtNA_xControlHandlerOutputUserDataQuery Reads the specified USER output line.
KtNA_xControlHandlerPassfailStatusQuery Returns the most recent pass/fail status value.
KtNA_xControlInterfaceControlConfigRecallState Recalls an Interface Control configuration file.
KtNA_xControlMultiplexerOutputData Sets the output port data for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set. Default 0.
KtNA_xControlMultiplexerOutputDataQuery Reads the output port data for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set.
KtNA_xControlMultiplexerOutputVoltage Sets the output voltage for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set. Default 0.
KtNA_xControlMultiplexerOutputVoltageQuery Reads the output voltage for specified group with id of the E5092A multiport test set.
KtNA_xControlMultiplexerPort Sets the multiport test set port.
KtNA_xControlPhaseCountQuery Reads the number of phase reference modules connected.
KtNA_xControlPhaseModuleDataStore Reads the calibration data from the phase reference of the specified module (x), and writes the data to the Path.
KtNA_xControlPhaseModuleModelQuery Reads the model number of the specified module (x).
KtNA_xControlPhaseModuleSerialQuery Reads the serial number of the specified module (x).
KtNA_xControlPhaseModuleSetup Turns on the phase reference, and sets the divide number.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINChannelFunction Set the function for the selected pin on the Application I/O connector. Default High.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINChannelFunctionCatalogQuery Read the catalog of the functions assignable to the pin on the Application I/O connector.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINChannelFunctionQuery Read the function for the selected pin on the Application I/O connector.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINCountQuery Read the total number of pin on the application I/O. Default 15.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINFunction Set the function for the specified port in the application I/O interface.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINFunctionCatalogQuery Read the list of the available function for the specified pin in the application I/O.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINFunctionQuery Read the function for the specified port in the application I/O interface.
KtNA_xControlSignalAIOPINInputLevelQuery Read the level of the specified INPUT pin of the application I/O.
KtNA_xControlSignalKDMIChannelFunction Set the function for the specified port and channel in the main of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_xControlSignalKDMIChannelFunctionQuery Read the function for the specified port and channel in the main of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_xControlSignalKDMICountQuery Read the number of ports in the main control port of the I/O connector interface. Default 6.
KtNA_xControlSignalKDMIFunction Set the function for the specified port in the main c of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_xControlSignalKDMIFunctionCatalogQuery Read the list of the available function for the specified port in the main control of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_xControlSignalKDMIFunctionQuery Read the function for the specified port in the main c of the I/O adapter interface.
KtNA_xControlSignalKDMIInputLevelQuery Read the level of the specified INPUT port of the I/O adapter main side
KtNA_xControlSignalQuery Reads the Configuration for external triggering in the VNA.
KtNA_xControlSignalSet Configures external triggering in the VNA.
KtNA_xCSetCatalogQuery Returns the names of Cal Sets stored on the VNA.
KtNA_xCSetCopy Creates a new Cal Set and copies the current Cal Set data into it.
KtNA_xCSetDAll Deletes ALL Cal Sets from the VNA, including phase reference and Global Delta Match Cal Sets.
KtNA_xCSetDateQuery Returns the Date (year/month/day) that the specified Cal Set was last saved.
KtNA_xCSetDelete Deletes the specified Cal Set from the VNA.
KtNA_xCSetETermCatalogQuery Returns a list of error term names for the given Cal Set.
KtNA_xCSetETermData Sets the error term data (real, imaginary pairs) for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_xCSetETermDataQuery Returns the error term data (real, imaginary pairs) for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_xCSetETermXValues Sets the x-axis frequencies for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_xCSetETermXValuesQuery Returns the x-axis frequencies for the given Cal Set and error term name.
KtNA_xCSetExistsQuery Returns whether or not the specified Cal Set exists on the VNA.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureCascade Combines the losses and phase shift of two S2P files into a single S2P file.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureCharacterize Characterizes a fixture based on two Cal Sets.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureCharacterizeWithPhasePivot Characterizes a fixture based on two Cal Sets.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureDeembed De-embeds a fixture from an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureDeembedWithExtrapolationEnable De-embeds a fixture from an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureEmbed Embeds a fixture (usually a matching network) into an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureEmbedWithExtrapolationEnable Embeds a fixture (usually a matching network) into an existing Cal Set based on an S2P file.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureENREmbed Generate a new ENR file by embedding an adapter to an existing ENR file.
KtNA_xCsetFixtureZero Creates a new S4P file.
KtNA_xCSetItemCatalogQuery The catalog query returns a list of item names contained in the specific Cal Set being queried.
KtNA_xCSetItemDataQuery Returns the VNA Measurement Class or Channel that created the specific Cal Set item.
KtNA_xCSetTimeQuery Returns the Time(hour:minute:second) that the specified Cal Set was last saved.
KtNA_xCSetValidateQuery This query compares the stimulus of "channelNo" with the stimulus stored in the specified calset.
KtNA_xDisplayArrange Places EXISTING measurements into pre-configured window arrangements.
KtNA_xDisplayCatalogQuery Returns the existing Window numbers.
KtNA_xDisplayColorAbackground Set the background color for the inactive window on the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 0,0,0 (Black), Print = 255,255,255 (White).
KtNA_xDisplayColorAbackgroundQuery Return the background color for the active window on the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_xDisplayColorBackground Set the background color for the active window on the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 0,0,24 (Black), Print = 255,255,255 (White).
KtNA_xDisplayColorBackgroundQuery Return the background color for the inactive windows on the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_xDisplayColorGrat1 Set the labels and grid frame colors in the active window for the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 175,175,175, Print = 0,0,0 (Black).
KtNA_xDisplayColorGrat1Query Return the labels and grid frame colors in the active window for the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_xDisplayColorGrat2 Set the inner lines of all grid in all windows, and the grid frame in inactive windows for the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 100,100,100, Print = 50,50,50.
KtNA_xDisplayColorGrat2Query Return the inner lines of all grid in all windows, and the grid frame in inactive windows for the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_xDisplayColorIlabel Set the Inactive (not selected) Window Labels for the VNA display or hardcopy print. Default Display = 160,160,160, Print = 0,0,0 (Black).
KtNA_xDisplayColorIlabelQuery Return the Inactive (not selected) Window Labels for the VNA display or hardcopy print.
KtNA_xDisplayColorLim1 Set the limit line color of failed traces or failure indicators (dots) and the word Fail. Default Display = 255,20,20, Print = 255,20,20.
KtNA_xDisplayColorLim1Query Return the limit line color of failed traces or failure indicators (dots) and the word Fail.
KtNA_xDisplayColorLoad Load a color theme from a disc file.
KtNA_xDisplayColorReset Resets the current theme to the default VNA colors.
KtNA_xDisplayColorStore Saves the current color theme to a disc file.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceData Set the color of Data and Limit Lines for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceDataQuery Return the color of Data and Limit Lines for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceMarker Set the color of data trace markers for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceMarkerQuery Return the color of data trace markers for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceMemory Set the memory trace color for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceMemoryQuery Return the memory trace color for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceMmarker Set the color of memory trace markers for nth trace in a window. Default Varies for each trace.
KtNA_xDisplayColorTraceMmarkerQuery Return the color of memory trace markers for nth trace in a window.
KtNA_xDisplayMeasureDelete Deletes the trace associated with the specified measurement number.
KtNA_xDisplayMeasureFeed This command creates a new trace in the specified window and connects the trace to measurement which results in the trace displaying the data from measurement.
KtNA_xDisplayMeasureMove Moves a trace associated with measurement number to the specified window. If the window is OFF, it will be turn ON.
KtNA_xDisplayMeasureSelect Activates the specified measurement to be selected.
KtNA_xDisplayMeasureYScaleAuto Performs an Autoscale on the specified trace in the specified measurement, providing the best fit display.
KtNA_xDisplaySheetArrange This command arranges existing windows to sheets. Default One sheet per window.
KtNA_xDisplaySheetCatalogQuery This command reads and displays comma separated list of window numbers which the sheet contains. Default 1.
KtNA_xDisplayStatusLogClear Clears the message region in the status bar.
KtNA_xDisplayUpdateImmediate Executes the display update once when the display update of the LCD screen is set to OFF.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowCatalogQuery Returns the trace numbers for the specified window.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowFeed Feeds a specified window to the sheet.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowNextNumber Returns the first window which has room for another trace.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowTraceDelete Deletes the specified trace from the specified window. The measurement parameter associated with the trace is not deleted.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowTraceFeedMNumber Creates a new trace for an existing measurement and associates (feeds) the measurement number to the specified window.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowTraceFeedName Creates a new trace and associates (feeds) a measurement to the specified window.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowTraceMove Moves a trace from one window to another window.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowTraceNextNumberQuery Returns the next unused trace number.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowTraceSelect Activates the specified trace in the specified window for front panel use.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowTraceYScaleAuto Performs an Autoscale on the specified trace in the specified window, providing the best fit display.
KtNA_xDisplayWindowYAuto Scales ALL of the traces to fit in the same window. This is equivalent to "Autoscale All" from the front panel.
KtNA_xInitiate Stops the current sweeps and immediately sends a trigger.
KtNA_xMMemoryCatalogQuery Returns a comma-separated string of all file names that are in the specified folder. All file types (even unknown types) are listed.
KtNA_xMMemoryCatalogQueryWithFileType Returns a comma-separated string of file names that are in the specified folder.
KtNA_xMMemoryCDirectory Changes the folder name.
KtNA_xMMemoryCDirectoryQuery Returns the current folder name.
KtNA_xMMemoryCopy Copies source file to destination file.
KtNA_xMMemoryDateQuery Returns the date (year/month/day) that the specified file was last saved.
KtNA_xMMemoryDelete Deletes the specified file.
KtNA_xMMemoryLoad Loads the specified file.
KtNA_xMMemoryLoadLimit Loads limit test data of the active trace of the active channel from a CSV file.
KtNA_xMMemoryLoadRLimit Loads ripple limit test data of the active trace of the active channel from a CSV file.
KtNA_xMMemoryLoadWithFileType Loads the specified file.
KtNA_xMMemoryMDirectory Makes a folder.
KtNA_xMMemoryMove Renames source file to destination file.
KtNA_xMMemoryRDirectory Removes the specified folder.
KtNA_xMMemoryStore Stores the specified file (.sta, .cal, .cst, .csa, .snp, s2px).
KtNA_xMMemoryStoreData Stores trace data to the following file types: *.prn, *.cti, *.csv, *.mdf.
KtNA_xMMemoryStoreLimit Saves limit test data of the active trace of the active channel into a CSV file.
KtNA_xMMemoryStoreRLimit Saves ripple limit test data of the active trace of the active channel into a CSV file.
KtNA_xMMemoryStoreSScreen Stores the specified file as a bitmap file (.bmp).
KtNA_xMMemoryStoreWithFileType Stores the specified file (.sta, .cal, .cst, .csa, .snp, s2px).
KtNA_xMMemoryTimeQuery Returns the Time (hour:minute:second) that the specified file was last saved.
KtNA_xMMemoryTransfer Transfers data FROM the remote PC - TO the VNA.
KtNA_xMMemoryTransferQuery Transfers data FROM the VNA - TO a remote PC.
KtNA_xSenseActiveDisplayTraceIpwer Set a fixed trace input power level.
KtNA_xSenseActiveDisplayTraceIpwerQuery Reads a fixed trace input power level.
KtNA_xSenseActiveSweepType Set the sweep type. Default LIN.
KtNA_xSenseActiveSweepTypeQuery Reads the sweep type.
KtNA_xSenseAverageClear Clears and restarts averaging of the measurement data. Does NOT apply to point averaging.
KtNA_xSenseClassNameQuery Returns the measurement class name of the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCcheckAcquire Reads the 'confidence data' associated with the specified ECal module and puts it into memory.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCcheckAcquireWithCharacterization Reads the 'confidence data' associated with the specified ECal module and puts it into memory.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCcheckDone Concludes the Confidence Check and sets the ECal module back into the idle state.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitClear Deletes installed cal kits.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitCountQuery Returns the number of installed cal kits.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeAcquire Initiates the measurement of the ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeConnectorCatalogQuery Returns a list of connector names that are valid for use with user-characterized ECal modules.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeConnectorPort Specifies a connector type name for every ECal module port used during the user characterization. Default No "Adapter".
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeConnectorPortQuery Returns a connector type name for every ECal module port used during the user characterization.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeDescriptionPort Sets the description of the adapters, cable, or fixture to be included in the user characterization. Default "Empty String".
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeDescriptionPortQuery Reads the description of the adapters, cable, or fixture to be included in the user characterization.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeDescriptionStepQuery Returns the connection description for the specified step of the ECal user characterization process.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeDmemorySave Completes an ECal user characterization by writing the characterization data to the VNA disk.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeInitiate Initiates an ECal User Characterization.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeInitiateWithEcalMemory Initiates an ECal User Characterization.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeInsituEnableQuery Returns whether the device is a CalPod module, which is capable of being characterized as an in-situ device.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeSave Completes an ECal user characterization by writing the characterization data to the ECal module memory.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalCharacterizeStepsQuery Returns the number of steps required to measure the ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalClistQuery Returns a list of characterizations stored in the specified ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalDmemoryClear Deletes user characterizations from VNA disk memory.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalDmemoryImport After the VNA disk memory is Exported to a file, use this command to Import the file into VNA disk memory, which allows the User Characterization to be used with the VNA and ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalExport Saves an existing ECal characterization to a file.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalInformationQuery Reads the identification and characterization information from the specified ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalKnameInformationQuery Reads the identification and characterization information from the specified ECal module or VNA disk memory.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalListQuery Returns a list of index numbers for ECal modules that are currently attached to the VNA.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalOrientQuery Returns the ECal port that is connected to the specified VNA port.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalPathCountQuery Returns the number of unique states that exist for the specified path name on the selected ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitEcalPathDataQuery Returns the data for a state from the memory of the selected ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitExport Saves an existing ECal characterization to a file.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitImport After the VNA disk memory is Exported to a file, use this command to Import the file into VNA disk memory, which allows the User Characterization to be used with the VNA and ECal module.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitInitialize Restores default factory installed cal kits.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCkitLoad Loads the specified collection of cal kits from a .wks file.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectAcquire For UNGUIDED calibration, measures the specified standards from the selected calibration kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectAcquireWithSync For UNGUIDED calibration, measures the specified standards from the selected calibration kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectApply Applies error terms to the measurement that is selected.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitCatalogQuery Returns the names of the first 95 mechanical cal kits in your VNA that can be used for unguided calibrations.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitClabel Defines the label for the standard classes.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitClabelQuery Returns the label for the standard classes.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitClist Assigns the calibration class for the standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitClistQuery Returns the calibration class for the standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitConnectorAdd Creates a new connector. The connector is automatically added to the list of available connectors for the currently selected cal kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitConnectorCatalogQuery Returns a comma-separated list of all connectors defined within the currently selected cal kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitConnectorDelete Deletes the primary connector family name from the selected kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitConnectorSName Assigns a family name to the currently selected standard from the currently selected kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitConnectorSNameQuery Returns a family name to the currently selected standard from the currently selected kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitPort Sets the name of the Cal Kit to use for Unguided cal. Default Last kit selected.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitPortQuery Returns the name of the Cal Kit to use for Unguided cal.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitSelect Selects (makes active) a calibration kit for performing an UNGUIDED calibration or for modifying standards. Default Last kit selected.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitSelectQuery Returns (makes active) a calibration kit for performing an UNGUIDED calibration or for modifying standards.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardC Sets the C0, C1, C2 and C3 value (the first, second, third and fourth capacitance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardCQuery Returns the C0, C1, C2 and C3 value (the first, second, third and fourth capacitance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardDataLoad Loads response (and optionally accuracy) data from a file for the selected database standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardL Sets the L0, L1, L2 and L3 value (the first, second, third and fourth inductance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardLQuery Returns the L0, L1, L2 and L3 value (the first, second, third and fourth inductance value) for the selected standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardRemove Deletes the selected standard from the selected cal kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardSelect Selects the calibration standard. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardSelectQuery Returns the calibration standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardType Sets the type for the selected standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectCkitStandardTypeQuery Returns the type for the selected standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectDisplayWindowAoff Clears the flags for windows to be shown during calibrations.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectDisplayWindowState Set the 'show' state of the window to be displayed during a calibration to view the measurements/channels. Default off.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAbort Aborts the acquiring of a guided calibration that has been initialized but has not yet been concluded using the save command.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAcquire Initiates the measurement of the specified calibration standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAcquireWithSync Initiates the measurement of the specified calibration standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAdapterCountQuery
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAdapterCountZero
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAdapterCreateQuery
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAdapterDelay
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAdapterDelayWithCoax
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAdapterDelayWithWGPhase
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedAdapterDescription
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedCKitCatalogQuery Returns a comma-separated list of valid kits that use the specified connector type.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedCKitPortSelect Specifies the calibration kit (mechanical or ECal) for each port to be used during a guided calibration. An unused port does NOT need to have a specified Cal Kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedCKitPortSelectQuery Returns the calibration kit (mechanical or ECal) for each port to be used during a guided calibration. An unused port does NOT need to have a specified Cal Kit.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedConnectorCatalogQuery Returns a list of valid connectors based on the connector descriptions of the available cal kits.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedConnectorPortSelect Specifies a DUT connector type for every port during the Guided Calibration procedure.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedConnectorPortSelectQuery Returns a DUT connector type for every port during the Guided Calibration procedure.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedData Sets the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDataCatalogQuery Returns a comma-delimited CSV string of measurement parameters (with parameter names) for STANn at State x.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDataForECal Sets the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal and for a specific state of an ECal.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDataQuery Returns the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDataQueryForECal Returns the measurement data for a specified measurement parameter of a particular step of a guided cal and for a specific state of an ECal.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDescriptionQuery Returns the connection description for the specified calibration step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDMatchApply Specifies a Delta Match Cal Set to be used for delta match correction.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDMatchApplyInitiate Initiates a global delta match calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedDMatchApplyPortsQuery Returns the port numbers for which delta match correction is required.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedECALAcquire Execute the Ecal calibration with specified Ecal.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedETermsCompute Computes the error correction terms, turns Correction ON, and saves the calibration to an existing, specified Cal Set.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedETermsLoad Loads 1-port error terms from a Cal Set into the current Guided Cal sequence.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedETermsLoadWithFromPortNo Loads 1-port error terms from a Cal Set into the current Guided Cal sequence.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedInitiate Initiates a guided calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedInitiateWithMatch Initiates a guided calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedInitiateWithMatchAndSync Initiates a guided calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedIsolationPaths Specifies the paths (port pairs) to make isolation measurements on during a guided calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedIsolationPathsQuery Returns the paths (port pairs) to make isolation measurements on during a guided calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedIsolationPathsWithPortPairs Specifies the paths (port pairs) to make isolation measurements on during a guided calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedIterationsCountQuery Designed to be used for an iterative cal standard such as a sliding load, this command returns the number of iterative measurement acquisitions that has been made for the specified step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedIterationsMinimumQuery Designed to be used for an iterative cal standard such as a sliding load, this command returns the minimum number of required iterative measurement acquisitions for the specified step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedIterationsReset Resets the specified guided cal connection step as unmeasured. This clears all previous measurements made for that step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListCountQuery Returns the number of measurement steps required to complete the current guided calibration. Default 0.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepCountQuery Returns the number of standards for step[n]. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepDescriptionQuery Returns the step description.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepLabelQuery Returns the label for the complete standard used in the step. If the standard is a composite standard, the label is for the composite device.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepPortsQuery Returns the number of ports on the standard used in the step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepStandardLabelQuery Returns the label for the one of the standards used in the step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepStandardPortsQuery Returns the number of ports on one of the standard used in the step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepStandardSTypeQuery Returns the enumeration for the type of standard that describes one of the standard devices used in the step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepStandardTPortsQuery Returns the number of ports on one of the standard used in the step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepSTypeQuery Returns the type of standard device used in the step.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedListStepTPortsQuery Returns the list of VNA test ports to which the standard(s) in this step is attached.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPAcquire Show the Cal Window, and optionally one or more other specific windows before acquiring a Cal standard.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPathCMethod Specifies the calibration method for each port pair.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPathCMethodQuery Returns the calibration method for each port pair.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPathTMethod Specifies the calibration THRU method for each port pair.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPathTMethodQuery Returns the calibration THRU method for each port pair.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPortsQuery Returns the list of ports being calibrated by an active calibration session.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPSensorMultAdd Adds a power sensor to be used during a Guided Power Calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPSensorMultCountQuery Returns the number of configured power sensors to be used during a Guided Power Calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedPSensorMultRemove Deletes a power sensor from the sensors to be used during a Guided Power Calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedSave Completes the guided cal by computing the error correction terms, turning Correction ON, and saving the calibration to a Cal Set.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedSaveCSet Completes the guided cal by computing the error correction terms, turning Correction ON, and saving the calibration to an existing, specified Cal Set.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedSaveWithMode Completes the guided cal by computing the error correction terms, turning Correction ON, and saving the calibration to a Cal Set.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedStatesCatalogQuery Returns an array of ecal states used for the standard number.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedStepsQuery Returns the number of measurement steps required to complete the current guided calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedThruPorts For calibrating more than 2-ports ONLY. Specifies the port pairs for the Thru connections of the calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectGuidedThruPortsQuery For calibrating more than 2-ports ONLY. Returns the port pairs for the Thru connections of the calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectNoiseLOPCalState Enables and disables LO power calibration for NFX.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectNoiseLOPCalStateQuery Return the state of LO power calibration for NFX.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectSave For UNGUIDED calibrations ONLY.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectSweepChannelAoff Clears ALL flags for channels to sweep during calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCollectSweepChannelState Specifies an alternate channel (other than the calibration channel) to be viewed while using the calibration wizard. Default 0.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCSetActivate Selects and applies a Cal Set to the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCSetActivateQuery Returns the name of the Cal Set that is applied to the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetCopy Creates a new Cal Set and copies the current Cal Set data into it.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetCreate Creates an empty Cal Set and attaches it to the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetCreateDefault Creates a unity Cal Set useful for debugging or to quickly test a prototype of automation software.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetData Write a specific error term from/to the Cal Set currently attached to the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetDataQuery Reads a specific error term from/to the Cal Set currently attached to the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetDeactivate Unselects a Cal Set from the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetEtermCatalogQuery Returns a list of error term names found in the current Cal Set that is applied to the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetEtermData Sets error term data for all VNA measurements.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetEtermDataQuery Returns error term data for all VNA measurements.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetFlatten This command saves the modified Cal Set to the VNA hard drive so that it can be reused.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetItemCatalogQuery Returns the names of the items n the Cal Set.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetItemDataQuery Read the value of the Cal Set item.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetSave Saves the channel's Cal Set to the VNA hard drive.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetSaveWithUser Saves the channel's Cal Set to the VNA hard drive.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetStandardCatalogQuery Returns a list of available standard name found in the current Cal Set that is applied to the specific channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetStandardData Sets standard data.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetStandardDataQuery Returns standard data.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetStimulusQuery Returns the source or response stimulus values for the Cal Set that is currently used by channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetStimulusQueryWithFrequencyRange Returns the source or response stimulus values for the Cal Set that is currently used by channel.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetTsetAllportsQuery Reads the port mapping used for the specified Cal Set.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetTsetTypeQuery Reads the test set type (model) used for the specified Cal Set.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionCsetTypeCatalogQuery Returns a list of Cal Sets.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionENRCalTableData Set and read the ENR (Excess Noise Ratio) calibration data.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionENRCalTableDataQuery Read the ENR (Excess Noise Ratio) calibration data.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionMethodsPortSubsetFullValue Specify the ports allowed to participate in a multiport calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionMethodsPortSubsetFullValueQuery Specify the ports allowed to participate in a multiport calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionMethodsPortSubsetReset Reset the the full and response list of the port subset correction.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionMethodsPortSubsetResponseValue Specify the ports that can be corrected using lesser corrections (enhanced response).
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionMethodsPortSubsetResponseValueQuery Returns the ports that can be corrected using lesser corrections (enhanced response).
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionPreferenceEcalPmap This command specifies the port mapping (which ports of the module are connected to which ports of the VNA) prior to performing ECal calibrations. Default Null String.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionPreferenceEcalPmapQuery This command returns the port mapping (which ports of the module are connected to which ports of the VNA) prior to performing ECal calibrations.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionPreferenceTrigFree Sets the preference for the trigger behavior during a calibration. Default OFF for both calibration types.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionPreferenceTrigFreeQuery Returns the preference for the trigger behavior during a calibration.
KtNA_xSenseCorrectionTypeCatalogQuery Lists the Cal Types in the VNA by either GUID or registered name.
KtNA_xSenseDCCurrentRange Sets the range (in Amps) used for sensing current, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_xSenseDCCurrentRangeQuery Reads the range (in Amps) used for sensing current, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_xSenseDCSamplesDPoint Sets the trigger offset in the measurement sweep.
KtNA_xSenseDCSamplesDPointQuery Reads the trigger offset in the measurement sweep.
KtNA_xSenseDCSamplesPoints Sets the DC measurement number of sample counts per one point measurement.
KtNA_xSenseDCSamplesPointsQuery Reads the DC measurement number of sample counts per one point measurement.
KtNA_xSenseDCSamplesTime Sets the DC measurement time per one point measurement .
KtNA_xSenseDCSamplesTimeQuery Reads the DC measurement time per one point measurement .
KtNA_xSenseDCVoltageRange Sets the range (in Volts) used for sensing voltage, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_xSenseDCVoltageRangeQuery Reads the range (in Volts) used for sensing voltage, which must be higher than the maximum current you expect to measure.
KtNA_xSenseDIQFrequencyRangeAdd Adds a frequency range using the next available range name.
KtNA_xSenseDIQFrequencyRangeCountQuery Returns the number of frequency ranges in the DIQ channel. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseDIQFrequencyRangeDelete Deletes the specified frequency range.
KtNA_xSenseDIQLoad Recalls the list of parameters and frequency ranges settings from a previously-saved .xml file.
KtNA_xSenseDIQLoadWithSetting Recalls the list of parameters and frequency ranges settings from a previously-saved .xml file.
KtNA_xSenseDIQParameterCatalogQuery Returns a list of all existing parameters.
KtNA_xSenseDIQParameterDefine Create a new parameter for Differential IQ channel.
KtNA_xSenseDIQParameterDelete Deletes the named parameter.
KtNA_xSenseDIQSave Stores the list of parameters and frequency ranges settings to an .xml file for recall at a later time.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionFrequencyTuneImmediate Auto tunes all measurement bands for the modulation distortion channel.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionMeasureBandAdd Adds a new distortion measurement band.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionMeasureBandAutofill Automatically fills in the measurement settings for all bands from the currently active modulation file loaded in the source.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionMeasureBandCountQuery Queries the total number of distortion measurement bands.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionMeasureBandDelete Deletes the specified distortion measurement band.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionMeasureBandInitialize This command ignores any specified band number and deletes all existing bands and adds a single default band back into the Measurement Band Table.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionSweepPowerCarrierListAdd Adds a new row to the power sweep list table.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionSweepPowerCarrierListDelete Deletes the specified row from the power sweep list table.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionSweepPowerCarrierListLoad Specifies the file path to recall a previous power sweep list file.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionSweepPowerCarrierListSave Specifies the file path to save a power sweep list file.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionTableCatalogQuery Returns a list of existing band names from the Measurement Band Table.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionTableDataCatalogQuery Returns a list of data parameter names corresponding to the currently specified Measurement Type.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionTableDataValueQuery Returns a list of data values from the Distortion Table for the specified band and parameter name.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionTableDisplayCatalogQuery Returns the currently displayed Distortion Table parameters.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionTableDisplayDelete Deletes the specified parameter from the Distortion Table.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionTableDisplayFeed Adds the specified parameter to the Distortion Table.
KtNA_xSenseDistortionTableDisplaySave Specifies the file path to save a modulation distortion table file.
KtNA_xSenseFOMCatalogQuery Returns a comma-separated list of available range names in the VNA.
KtNA_xSenseFOMCountQuery Returns the number of valid range numbers in the VNA.
KtNA_xSenseFOMRangeNameQuery Returns the name of range.
KtNA_xSenseFOMRNumQuery Returns the number of a specified range name.
KtNA_xSenseFrequencySpanFull Sets the frequency span to the entire frequency range of the analyzer. Default Maximum frequency span of the analyzer.
KtNA_xSenseGCSetupPMap Set the DUT-to-VNA port mapping for the Gain Compression measurement.
KtNA_xSenseGCSetupPMapPInputQuery Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Input. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseGCSetupPMapPOutputQuery Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Output. Default 2.
KtNA_xSenseGCSetupSFailuresQuery Returns a comma-separated list of the frequency indexes that were out of tolerance for SMART Sweep mode, or at the power limit for 2D acquisition modes.
KtNA_xSenseIFFilterErrorsQuery Returns the error string associated with the digital filters.
KtNA_xSenseIFFilterStage3CatalogQuery Returns a list of strings for the currently supported filter types that can be used for the stage 3 filter.
KtNA_xSenseIFFilterStage3PCatalogQuery Returns a list of the available parameters for the currently selected filter type.
KtNA_xSenseIFFilterStageCoefficients Sets the digital filter coefficients of the specified stage.
KtNA_xSenseIFFilterStageCoefficientsQuery Returns the digital filter coefficients of the specified stage.
KtNA_xSenseIFFilterStageCountQuery Returns the number of taps in the digital filter of the specified stage.
KtNA_xSenseIMDHOProductActiveQuery Returns the highest order product measured by SweptIMD.
KtNA_xSenseIMDHOProductQuery Returns the highest order product that can be measured by SweptIMD. Default 9.
KtNA_xSenseIMDPMap Sets the input port and output port of an IMD or IMDx channel. Default 1,2.
KtNA_xSenseIMDPMapInputQuery Returns the VNA test port to be connected to the DUT input for an IMD or IMDx channel. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseIMDPMapOutputQuery Returns the VNA test port to be connected to the DUT output for an IMD or IMDx channel. Default 2.
KtNA_xSenseIMDSOrderActiveQuery Returns the state of whether or not 2nd order parameters are measured. A "1" or "ON" indicates 2nd order parameters are measured.
KtNA_xSenseMixerApply Applies the mixer setup settings and turns the channel ON.
KtNA_xSenseMixerCalculate Calculates the Input, IF, or Output frequencies of the mixer setup and updates the channel settings.
KtNA_xSenseMixerDiscard Cancels changes that have been made to the Converter setup and reverts to the previously-saved setup.
KtNA_xSenseMixerLoad Loads a previously-configured mixer attributes file (.mxr)
KtNA_xSenseMixerPMap Sets the VNA to DUT port map for FCA measurements.
KtNA_xSenseMixerPMapInputQuery Returns the VNA port that is mapped to the DUT input. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseMixerPMapOutputQuery Returns the VNA port that is mapped to the DUT output. Default 2.
KtNA_xSenseMixerSave Saves the settings for the mixer , converter test setup to a mixer attributes file.
KtNA_xSenseNoisePMap Set the DUT-to-VNA port mapping for Noise Figure.
KtNA_xSenseNoisePMapInputQuery Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Input. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseNoisePMapOutputQuery Read the VNA port number to be connected to the DUT Output. Default 2.
KtNA_xSenseNoiseSNPQuery Returns S-parameter and noise parameter data for vector noise figure measurements.
KtNA_xSenseNoiseSNPSave Saves the S-parameters and vector noise parameters to an S2P file. For NFX channels, mixer setup information is included as comments at the beginning of the file.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigCatalogQuery Returns a list of configuration names stored in the VNA.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigCopy Copies the mechanical switch and attenuator settings from the specified channel to current selected channel.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigDelete Deletes the specified configuration name from the VNA.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigElement Write the setting of a specified element in the current configuration.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigElementCatalogQuery Returns the names of configurable elements as a comma-delimited list of strings.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigElementQuery Read the setting of a specified element in the current configuration.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigElementValueCatalogQuery Returns the list of valid settings that can be used with the specified element.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigNameQuery Returns the name of the current configuration only if NO individual element settings had been changed since selecting or storing a configuration.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigSelect Loads the named configuration onto the specified channel.
KtNA_xSensePathConfigStore Saves the path configuration currently associated with channel to the specified configuration name.
KtNA_xSensePNBasebandDischarge Executes the Dischage DC Block C.
KtNA_xSensePNPowerInputCorrectionData Sets the power correction data.
KtNA_xSensePNPowerInputCorrectionDataQuery Returns the power correction data.
KtNA_xSensePNPowerInputCorrectionLoad Sets and returns the power correction data from correction definition file.
KtNA_xSensePNSegmentCountQuery Returns the number of phase noise segments currently defined.
KtNA_xSensePNSegmentFrequencyStartQuery Returns the start frequency for each phase noise segment.
KtNA_xSensePNSegmentFrequencyStopQuery Returns the stop frequency for each phase noise segment.
KtNA_xSensePulseCatalogQuery Returns the string names of internal and configured external pulse generators.
KtNA_xSensePulseDelay Sets the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_xSensePulseDelayQuery Returns the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_xSensePulseDelayQueryWithNo Returns the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_xSensePulseDelayWithNo Sets the pulse delay. The amount of time before a new pulse begins.
KtNA_xSensePulseDIncrement Sets the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_xSensePulseDIncrementQuery Returns the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_xSensePulseDIncrementQueryWithNo Returns the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_xSensePulseDIncrementWithNo Sets the pulse delay increment.
KtNA_xSensePulseHDelayADCQuery Returns the ADC delay for pulse measurements.
KtNA_xSensePulseHDelayModulator Sets the time lag between the pulse drive signal and the actual RF output.
KtNA_xSensePulseHDelayModulatorQuery Returns the time lag between the pulse drive signal and the actual RF output.
KtNA_xSensePulseHDelayState Enables or disables modulator and ADC delays for pulse measurements.
KtNA_xSensePulseHDelayStateQuery Get Enable or disable state of modulator and ADC delays for pulse measurements.
KtNA_xSensePulseInvert Sets whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_xSensePulseInvertQuery Returns whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_xSensePulseInvertQueryWithNo Returns whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_xSensePulseInvertWithNo Sets whether to invert the polarity of the pulse.
KtNA_xSensePulseMTimingDevice Sets the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_xSensePulseMTimingDeviceQuery Reads the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_xSensePulseMTimingDeviceQueryWithNo Reads the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_xSensePulseMTimingDeviceWithNo Sets the device being controlled by the pulse generator output.
KtNA_xSensePulsePeriod Sets the pulse-period for ALL pulse generators.
KtNA_xSensePulsePeriodQuery Returns the pulse-period for ALL pulse generators.
KtNA_xSensePulseState Turns the pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_xSensePulseStateQuery Returns the state pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_xSensePulseStateQueryWithNo Returns the state pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_xSensePulseStateWithNo Turns the pulse output ON and OFF.
KtNA_xSensePulseSubpointTrig Enables or Disables subpoint triggering. When enabled and performing Point Averaging, Each rising edge of P0 triggers a subpoint (one of N acquisitions in an N point average).
KtNA_xSensePulseSubpointTrigQuery Returns the state of subpoint triggering. When enabled and performing Point Averaging, Each rising edge of P0 triggers a subpoint (one of N acquisitions in an N point average).
KtNA_xSensePulseTType Sets the type of trigger signal to which the internal pulse generators will respond when being externally triggered at the PulseSyncIn pin.
KtNA_xSensePulseTTypeQuery Returns the type of trigger signal to which the internal pulse generators will respond when being externally triggered at the PulseSyncIn pin.
KtNA_xSensePulseWidth Sets the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_xSensePulseWidthQuery Returns the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_xSensePulseWidthQueryWithNo Returns the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_xSensePulseWidthWithNo Sets the pulse width. The amount of time that the pulse is ON.
KtNA_xSenseROscillatorSourceCatalogQuery Reads the list of available reference oscillator.
KtNA_xSenseROscillatorSourceConditionQuery Reads the Reference Oscillator 'locked' condition.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCACQTimeQuery Returns the LO acquisition time.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCOverloadCountQuery Read the count of ADCs or receivers in overload status for the previous sweep.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCOverloadListQuery Read the list of measured receivers in overload status for the previous sweep.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCRangePercentMinimumQuery Read the minimum ADC percentage range of all receivers in use.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCRangePercentQuery Read the maximum ADC percentage range of all receivers in use.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCRangePercentReceiverQuery Read the ADC percentage range for the specified receiver.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCRecordSizeMaxQuery Read the current maximum available ADC record size.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCRecordSizeMinQuery Read the current minimum available ADC record size.
KtNA_xSenseSAADCRecordSizeValueQuery Read ADC record size value.
KtNA_xSenseSABandwidthResolutionCatalogQuery Read the list of all Resolution Bandwidth values currently supported with spectrum analyzer current settings.
KtNA_xSenseSABandwidthVideoAverageCountQuery Reads the number of Video bandwidth sweeps that are averaged together. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherenceLOFThruMonitorLastFailed Return the last monitor result of LO feedthru monitor.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherenceLOFThruMonitorLastValueQuery Return the last monitor value of LO feedthru monitor.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherenceMultitoneValidQuery Read the current multitone settings and determine if they are valid or not.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherencePulseSearchExecute Executes the pulse search.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherencePulseSearchInitialize Sets all the search parameters to their default values.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherencePulseSearchItemCountQuery Returns the number of possible pulse configurations found.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherencePulseSearchItemPeriodQuery Returns the pulse period for found pulse configuration number num.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherencePulseSearchItemSelect Selects the found configuration number num, and applies it to the measurements.
KtNA_xSenseSACoherencePulseSearchItemWidthQuery Returns the pulse width for found pulse configuration number num.
KtNA_xSenseSADataBinsCountQuery Read the number of DFT points to be exported across the total RF span.
KtNA_xSenseSADataIQAutofillQuery Fill in the IQ settings automatically.
KtNA_xSenseSADataIQDurationQuery Read the IQ record duration.
KtNA_xSenseSADataIQErrorQuery Read the IQ error code to indicate whether the IQ settings are valid or not.
KtNA_xSenseSADataIQErrorTextQuery Read the error text to determine if the IQ settings are valid or not.
KtNA_xSenseSADataIQGetQuery Gets the raw IQ data as a Visa arbitrary binary block of data.
KtNA_xSenseSADataIQGetQueryWithPosition Gets the raw IQ data as a Visa arbitrary binary block of data.
KtNA_xSenseSADataKeepFrequenciesCountQuery Read the number of frequency domain points in memory.
KtNA_xSenseSADataKeepReceiversCountQuery Read the number of receivers that have been stored in memory.
KtNA_xSenseSADataKeepReceiversQuery Read the current list of receivers that have been stored in memory.
KtNA_xSenseSADataKeepScalarGetQuery Read the scalar data. Scalar data is amplitude only values, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_xSenseSADataKeepScalarGetQueryWithPosition Read the scalar data. Scalar data is amplitude only values, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_xSenseSADataKeepVectorGetQuery Read the vector data. Vector data is amplitude and phase, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_xSenseSADataKeepVectorGetQueryWithPosition Read the vector data. Vector data is amplitude and phase, when the Compute phase mode is not turned on.
KtNA_xSenseSADataReceiversCountQuery Read the number of currently exported receivers.
KtNA_xSenseSADataReceiversQuery Read the list of receivers that will be exported to a data file.
KtNA_xSenseSADataSizeBinQuery Read the byte size of one data bin in binary mode.
KtNA_xSenseSADataSizeHighQuery Read the most significant bytes (MSB) of the byte size of the data to be exported.
KtNA_xSenseSADataSizeLowQuery Read the least significant bytes (LSB) of the byte size of the data to be exported.
KtNA_xSenseSADataSizeQuery Read the byte size of the data to be exported in binary mode.
KtNA_xSenseSADataStartQuery Read the frequency of the first RF bin.
KtNA_xSenseSADataWFactor Read the windowing factor for band power computation. This factor is derived from the window type (Gaussian, flat top, etc.).
KtNA_xSenseSADFTRecordSizeQuery Read the current DFT record size.
KtNA_xSenseSADFTResolutionQuery Read the DFT resolution.
KtNA_xSenseSAFFTResolutionQuery Read the FFT resolution.
KtNA_xSenseSAFrequencyTuneImmediate Auto tunes and zooms in on a signal within a SA sweep.
KtNA_xSenseSAFrequencyTuneImmediateWithSync Auto tunes and zooms in on a signal within a SA sweep.
