KtNA_xSenseSALOCountQuery Returns the number of LO acquisitions determined by the Image Reject selection and the span.
KtNA_xSenseSASpanBinsCountQuery Read the number of DFT points to be exported across the total RF span.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentAdd Adds a segment.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentCountQuery Queries the number of segments that exist in the specified channel. Default 1.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentDelete Deletes the specified sweep segment.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentDeleteAll Deletes all sweep segments.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentList Writes the entire list of values in the segment sweep table.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentListQuery Reads the entire list of values in the segment sweep table.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentPower Set the Port Power level for the specified sweep segment. Default 0.
KtNA_xSenseSegmentPowerQuery Get the Port Power level for the specified sweep segment. Default 0.
KtNA_xSenseSourceReceiverGain Sets the gain settings to a specified port.
KtNA_xSenseSourceReceiverGainAll Sets the gain settings to all ports.
KtNA_xSenseSourceReceiverGainAllQuery Set and read the setting for receiver gain coupling for all port in the specified channel.
KtNA_xSenseSourceReceiverGainCatalogQuery Reads a list of valid state for the receiver gain on the specified port.
KtNA_xSenseSourceReceiverGainCouplingStateQuery
KtNA_xSenseSourceReceiverGainListQuery
KtNA_xSenseSourceReceiverGainQuery Returns the gain settings to a specified port.
KtNA_xSenseSweepBlockedQuery Reads whether the specified channel is currently 'blocked' from sweeping.
KtNA_xSenseSweepPulseShapeCatalogQuery Returns the list of available pulse shape type.
KtNA_xSenseSweepTimeStartQuery
KtNA_xSenseSweepType Sets the type of analyzer sweep mode.
KtNA_xSenseSweepTypeQuery Returns the type of analyzer sweep mode.
KtNA_xSenseTemperatureQuery Returns the temperature on the Receiver microcircuit.
KtNA_xSenseTRPowerInputCorrectionData Sets the power correction data.
KtNA_xSenseTRPowerInputCorrectionDataQuery Returns the power correction data.
KtNA_xSenseTRPowerInputCorrectionLoad Sets and returns the power correction data from correction definition file.
KtNA_xSenseVCOPowerInputCorrectionData Sets the power correlation data.
KtNA_xSenseVCOPowerInputCorrectionDataQuery Returns the power correction data.
KtNA_xSenseVCOPowerInputCorrectionLoad Sets and returns the power correction data from correction definition file.
KtNA_xSenseVCOSourceDCAfterState Set the DC voltage level after sweep.
KtNA_xSenseVCOSourceDCAfterStateQuery Read the DC voltage level after sweep.
KtNA_xSenseVCOSourceDCAfterUser Set the DC voltage level for user after sweep.
KtNA_xSenseVCOSourceDCAfterUserQuery Read the DC voltage level for user after sweep.
KtNA_xSourceCatalogQuery Returns a list of valid port names that can be controlled. Some ports only have string names, NOT numbers.
KtNA_xSourceDCAFCImmediate Tune the frequency one time.
KtNA_xSourceDCCatalogQuery Returns the names of the configured and active DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_xSourceDCCenter Sets center DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCCenterQuery Returns center DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCCurrentClampNegative Sets the negative current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default -3.06.
KtNA_xSourceDCCurrentClampNegativeQuery Returns the negative current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default -3.06.
KtNA_xSourceDCCurrentClampPositve Sets the positive current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default 3.06.
KtNA_xSourceDCCurrentClampPositveQuery Returns the positive current limit (in Amps) when output regulation is in voltage priority mode. Default 3.06.
KtNA_xSourceDCCurrentRange Sets a current output range in Amps. Default (SMU) 3, (M9341B) 0.05.
KtNA_xSourceDCCurrentRangeQuery Returns a current output range in Amps.
KtNA_xSourceDCData Sets the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCDataQuery Returns the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCDataQueryWithPortNo Returns the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCDataWithPortNo Sets the DC stimulus values per point to be sent from the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionOrder Set the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionOrderQuery Read the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionOrderQueryWithPortNo Read the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionOrderWithPortNo Set the order for the specified DC source in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionState Set the specified DC source's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionStateQuery Read the specified DC source's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionStateQueryWithPortNo Read the specified DC source's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_xSourceDCDimensionStateWithPortNo Set the specified DC source's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KtNA_xSourceDCLimitMaximum Sets the Max DC limit value for a DC source. Default 10.
KtNA_xSourceDCLimitMaximumQuery Returns the Max DC limit value for a DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCLimitMinimum Sets the Min DC limit value for a DC source. Default -10.
KtNA_xSourceDCLimitMinimumQuery Returns the Min DC limit value for a DC source. Default -10.
KtNA_xSourceDCLockOutputRelayClosed Sets the locked-down state of the output relays on SMU units with output relays. Default 0.
KtNA_xSourceDCLockOutputRelayClosedQuery Returns the locked-down state of the output relays on SMU units with output relays.
KtNA_xSourceDCNamesQuery Reads the DC source names.
KtNA_xSourceDCParallel Sets Parallel Mode. This command is to make a single aggregate port out of two power ports - specifying whether one result is same.
KtNA_xSourceDCParallelQuery Returns Parallel Mode. This command is to make a single aggregate port out of two power ports - specifying whether one result is same.
KtNA_xSourceDCProtectionCatalogQuery Returns the module list or name of DC source in which protection function is activated due to over current or voltage.
KtNA_xSourceDCProtectionEnable Sets the DC output protection state. Default 1.
KtNA_xSourceDCProtectionEnableQuery Reads the DC output protection state.
KtNA_xSourceDCProtectionLevel Sets the protection voltage level for the DC output. Default 14.4.
KtNA_xSourceDCProtectionLevelQuery Returns the protection voltage level for the DC output.
KtNA_xSourceDCProtectionReset Resets the instrument's output protection circuit after a protection condition occurs.
KtNA_xSourceDCSpan Sets span value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCSpanQuery Returns span value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCStart Sets start DC value for the specified DC source. Default 5.
KtNA_xSourceDCStartQuery Returns start DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCStartQueryWithPortNo Returns start DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCStartWithPortNo Sets start DC value for the specified DC source. Default 5.
KtNA_xSourceDCState Sets the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_xSourceDCStateQuery Returns the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_xSourceDCStateQueryWithPortNo Returns the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel.
KtNA_xSourceDCStateWithPortNo Sets the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel. Default 1.
KtNA_xSourceDCStop Sets stop DC value for the specified DC source. Default 0.
KtNA_xSourceDCStopQuery Returns stop DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCStopQueryWithPortNo Returns stop DC value for the specified DC source.
KtNA_xSourceDCStopWithPortNo Sets stop DC value for the specified DC source. Default 0.
KtNA_xSourceDCType Sets the output regulation mode. Default Voltage.
KtNA_xSourceDCTypeQuery Returns the output regulation mode.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageBandwidth Sets a voltage bandwidth to optimize the output response time with capacitive loads. Default "Low".
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageBandwidthQuery Returns a voltage bandwidth to optimize the output response time with capacitive loads.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageCalibrateDateQuery Returns the date of execution output voltage calibration.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageCalibrateExecute Execute the output voltage calibration for both AO1 and AO2.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageCalibrateTimeQuery Returns the time of execution output voltage calibration.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageClamp Sets the positive voltage limit in Volts when output regulation is in current priority mode. Default 6.12.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageClampQuery Returns the positive voltage limit in Volts when output regulation is in current priority mode.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageRange Sets a voltage output range in Volts. Default 6.
KtNA_xSourceDCVoltageRangeQuery Returns a voltage output range in Volts. Default 6.
KtNA_xSourceDimensionCatalogQuery Read the names of source domains in the multi-dimensional sweep whose state is ON and whose dimension order is the specified dimension order.
KtNA_xSourceDimensionCountQuery Read the highest dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KtNA_xSourceDimensionPoints Set the point count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KtNA_xSourceDimensionPointsQuery Read the point count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_xSourceDimensionRepeatCount Set the repeat count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_xSourceDimensionRepeatCountQuery Read the repeat count for the specified dimension order in the multi-dimensional sweep.
KtNA_xSourcePhaseCorrectionData Write an array of phase offsets.
KtNA_xSourcePhaseCorrectionDataQuery Reads an array of phase offsets.
KtNA_xSourcePhaseExternalCatalogQuery Returns the available internal ports that the external port can be set to.
KtNA_xSourcePhaseModeCatalogQuery Returns the available phase control modes for the specified port.
KtNA_xSourcePhaseParameterCatalogQuery Returns the available parameters that are set.
KtNA_xSourcePhasePoffsetCorrectionData Write a ratio amplitude offset array.
KtNA_xSourcePhasePoffsetCorrectionDataQuery Read a ratio amplitude offset array.
KtNA_xSourcePhaseReferenceCatalogQuery Returns the available ports that can be used as phase control reference ports for the phase controlled port.
KtNA_xSourcePortNumQuery Returns a port number for a named source. To convert a string name to a port number use this command.
KtNA_xSourcePowerALCCatalogQuery Returns a list of valid ALC modes for the specified channel and port number.
KtNA_xSourcePowerALCReceiverRatioQuery Returns the receiver ratio to be used with receiver leveling.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectAbort Aborts a source power calibration sweep that is in progress.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectAcquire Initiates a source power cal acquisition sweep using the power sensor attached to the specified channel (A or B) on the power meter, using a USB power sensor, or using the specified VNA receiver.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectAcquireWithSync Initiates a source power cal acquisition sweep using the power sensor attached to the specified channel (A or B) on the power meter, using a USB power sensor, or using the specified VNA receiver.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectSave Applies the array of correction values after a source power calibration sweep has completed.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectSensorFrange Specifies the frequency range over which the power sensors connected to the specified channels (A and B) of the power meter can be used (minimum frequency, maximum frequency).
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectSensorFrangeQuery Returns the frequency range over which the power sensors connected to the specified channels (A and B) of the power meter can be used (minimum frequency, maximum frequency).
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectSensorRcfactor Specifies the reference cal factor for the power sensor connected to channel A or B of the power meter. If the power meter has only a single channel, that channel is considered channel A.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectSensorRcfactorQuery Specifies the reference cal factor for the power sensor connected to channel A or B of the power meter. If the power meter has only a single channel, that channel is considered channel A.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectSensorSelect Sets and returns the power sensor channel (A or B) to be used.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectSensorSelectQueryWithFreq Returns a boolean 1 or 0 (ON or OFF) indicating whether the sensor is to be used at the specified frequency.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectTableData Write data into the selected table.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectTableDataQuery Read data into the selected table.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectTableFrequency Write frequency values for the selected table (cal factor table for a power sensor, or the loss compensation table).
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectTableFrequencyQuery Read frequency values for the selected table (cal factor table for a power sensor, or the loss compensation table).
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectTablePointsQuery Returns the number of segments that are currently in the selected table. Default 0.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectTableSelect Selects which table you want to write to or read from.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionCollectTableSelectQuery Returns Selected table you want to write to or read from.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionData Writes source power calibration data.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionDataPrior Writes power correction values from the previous iteration of the source power cal.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionDataPriorQuery Reads power correction values from the previous iteration of the source power cal.
KtNA_xSourcePowerCorrectionDataQuery Reads source power calibration data.
KtNA_xSourcePulseModulatorExistsQuery Checks if pulse source exists.
KtNA_xSystemActiveChannelQuery Returns the number of the active channel.
KtNA_xSystemActiveMeasurementNumberQuery Returns the active measurement number.
KtNA_xSystemActiveMeasurementQuery Returns the name of the active measurement.
KtNA_xSystemActivePortSourceQuery Gets the active source port number.
KtNA_xSystemActivePortTestQuery Gets the active test port number.
KtNA_xSystemActiveSheetQuery Returns the active sheet number.
KtNA_xSystemActiveTraceQuery Returns the active trace number. Default 1.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllChannelPorts For each channel to be calibrated, sets the ports to be calibrated. Specify port numbers ONLY for standard channels.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllChannelPortsQuery For each channel to be calibrated, returns the ports to be calibrated. Specify port numbers ONLY for standard channels.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllCSetCatalogQuery Returns the User Cal Set or cal register names that were produced by the cal all session.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllGuidedChannelListQuery Returns all cal all guided calibration channels.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllGuidedChannelQuery Returns the primary guided calibration channel number if more than one channel exists; otherwise, this command returns the one value.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllGuidedPortsQuery Returns the ports to be calibrated during the Cal All Channels calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateCatalogQuery This command queries how many ranges are included in the calibration for source port..
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangeAdd This command adds a power cal range for a specific port.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangeClear This command resets all ranges for the given source port
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangeCountQuery This command queries how many ranges are included in the calibration for source port.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangePoints This command sets the number of points for given range for source port
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangePointsQuery This command gets the number of points for given range for source port.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangeStart This command sets the start frequency for given range for source port.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangeStartQuery This command gets the start frequency for given range for source port.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangeStop This command sets the stop frequency for given range for source port
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllIndependentSourceCalibrateRangeStopQuery This command gets the stop frequency for given range for source port.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllMClassPropertyNameCatalogQuery Returns the unique, settable properties for the current cal all session.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllMClassPropertyValue Sets the property value for a specific property name.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllMClassPropertyValueCatalogQuery Returns the valid property values for a specific property name.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllMClassPropertyValueQuery Returns the property value for a specific property name.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPathConfigureElement Sets the Path Configuration settings for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPathConfigureElementQuery Returns the Path Configuration settings for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortReceiverAtten Sets the Receiver Attenuator setting for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortReceiverAttenQuery Returns the Receiver Attenuator setting for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortSourcePowerAtten Sets the Source Attenuator setting for the Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortSourcePowerAttenQuery Returns the Source Attenuator setting for the Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortSourcePowerOffset Sets the power offset value for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortSourcePowerOffsetQuery Returns the power offset value for a Cal All calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortSourcePowerValue Sets the power level at which a Cal All calibration is to be performed.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllPortSourcePowerValueQuery Returns the power level at which a Cal All calibration is to be performed.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllReset Resets all properties associated with the Cal All session to their default values.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllSelect Sets the list of channels to be calibrated during the Cal All session.
KtNA_xSystemCalibrateAllSelectQuery Returns the list of channels to be calibrated during the Cal All session.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityALCPowerMaximumQuery Returns the maximum leveled source power setting in dB.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityALCPowerMinimumQuery Returns the minimum leveled source power setting in dB with 0 dB attenuation.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityChannelsMaximumQuery Returns the maximum possible number of channels.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityDelayTriggerMaxQuery Returns the maximum trigger delay of the analyzer.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityDelayTriggerMinQuery Returns the minimum trigger delay of the analyzer.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityFOMExistsQuery Returns whether or not the analyzer has FOM installed.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityFrequencyMaximumQuery Returns the maximum frequency of the analyzer, including any over-sweep. Over-sweep frequencies can be set but are not specified.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityFrequencyMinimumQuery Returns the minimum frequency of the analyzer, including any under-sweep. Under-sweep frequencies can be set but are not specified.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWAttenuatorReceiverExistsQuery Returns whether or not there is a receiver attenuator on the specified port.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWAttenuatorReceiverMaximumQuery Returns the maximum amount of receiver attenuation on the specified port.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWAttenuatorReceiverStepQuery Returns the step size of the receiver attenuator on the specified port.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWAttenuatorSourceMaximumQuery Returns the maximum amount of source attenuation on the specified port.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWAttenuatorSourceStepQuery Returns the step size of the source attenuator on the specified port.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWDCReceiverInternalCatalogQuery Returns a list of names of the internal DC receivers.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWDCReceiverInternalCountQuery Returns the number of internal DC receivers in the analyzer.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWDCSourceInternalCatalogQuery Returns a list of names of the internal DC sources.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWDCSourceInternalCountQuery Returns the number of internal DC sources in the analyzer.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWLFExtensionExistsQuery Returns whether or not the VNA has the low frequency extension (LFE) installed.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsCatalogQuery Returns a list of test port names including external testset ports.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsCountQuery Returns the number of test ports including external testset ports.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsInternalCatalogQuery Returns a list of internal test port names.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsInternalCountQuery Returns the number of internal test ports.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsPNumberQuery Returns the port number associated with the specified port name.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsSourceCatalogQuery Returns a list of source port names, including any configured external sources.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsSourceCountQuery Returns the number of source ports, including any configured external sources.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsSourceInternalCatalogQuery Returns a list of internal source port names.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPortsSourceInternalCountQuery Returns the number of internal source ports.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerDiscreteFrequencyList Sets the list of discrete frequencies corresponding to the powers returned by the discrete min and max power list functions.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerDiscreteFrequencyListQuery Returns the list of discrete frequencies corresponding to the powers returned by the discrete min and max power list functions.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerDiscreteMaximumListQuery Returns an array of max leveled power values (in dBm), where each element corresponds to the maximum leveled power possible for CW stimulus at the corresponding frequency
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerDiscreteMaximumQuery Returns a single max leveled power value (in dBm) indicating the most restrictive maximum for all discrete maximum powers (the minimum of all max leveled powers).
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerDiscreteMinimumListQuery Returns an array of minimum power values (in dBm), where each element corresponds to the minimum power possible for CW stimulus at the corresponding frequency set
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerDiscreteMinimumQuery Returns a single minimum power value (in dBm) indicating the most restrictive minimum for all discrete minimum powers (the maximum of all minimum powers).
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerPathConfigElement Sets the value of a path element.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerPathConfigElementCatalogQuery Returns a string with the names of all valid RF path configuration elements.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerPathConfigElementQuery Returns the name of the value for the given path element name.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerPathConfigElementValueCatalogQuery Returns all valid values for the given path configuration element.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerRangeMaximumQuery Returns the minimum of all max leveled power values (in dBm) from range start frequency to stop frequency (inclusive).
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerRangeMinimumQuery The maximum of all min power values (in dBm) from range start frequency to stop frequency (inclusive).
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWPowerReset Resets all power range properties to default values, as if the instrument had been preset.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWRBSwitchExistsQuery Returns whether or not the specified port number has a reference bypass switch.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWReceiverDAccessQuery Returns whether or not the analyzer has direct receiver access (front-panel jumpers).
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWReceiverGainCoupControlQuery
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWReceiverInternalCountQuery Returns the number of receivers in the analyzer.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityHWSourceCountQuery Returns the number of source ports, including any configured external sources.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityIFBWCatalogQuery Returns the list of supported IFBW values.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityIFBWMaximumQuery Returns the maximum IFBW for the standard IF filter.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityIFBWMinimumQuery Returns the minimum IFBW for the standard IF filter.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityLicensesCatalogQuery Returns the list of licenses.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityLicensesFeatureCatalogQuery Returns the list of licensed features.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityLicensesFeatureEnableQuery Returns if the specified feature is enabled or disabled.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityNBWNoiseCatalogQuery Returns the list of supported Noise Bandwidth values when using a noise receiver
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityNBWSTDCatalogQuery Returns the list of supported Noise Bandwidth values when using the NA receiver for noise measurements
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityPointsMaximumQuery Returns the maximum number of points.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityPointsMinimumQuery Returns the minimum number of points.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityPresetFrequencyMaximumQuery Returns the maximum specified frequency of the analyzer. Does not include any over-sweep.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityPresetFrequencyMinimumQuery Returns the minimum specified frequency of the analyzer. Does not include any under-sweep.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityRBWIMSCatalogQuery Returns the list of supported Resolution BW values for the IMSpectrum channel.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityRBWSACatalogQuery Returns the list of supported Resolution BW values for the SA channel.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilitySupportDwellQuery Returns whether a given IF Bandwidth value supports dwell time
KtNA_xSystemCapabilitySupportRIFBWQuery Returns whether the VNA supports the Reduce IF BW at Low Frequencies feature.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityWindowsMaximumQuery Returns the maximum number of windows.
KtNA_xSystemCapabilityWindowsTracesMaximumQuery Returns the maximum number of traces per window.
KtNA_xSystemChannelsCatalogQuery Returns the channel numbers currently in use.
KtNA_xSystemChannelsDelete Deletes the specified channel.
KtNA_xSystemCommunicatePSensor Specifies the type and location of the power meter to be used in a source power calibration.
KtNA_xSystemCommunicatePSensorQuery Returns the type and location of the power meter to be used in a source power calibration.
KtNA_xSystemDateQuery Returns the system date (year/month/day).
KtNA_xSystemFPreset Performs a standard Preset, then deletes the default trace, measurement, and window. The VNA screen becomes blank.
KtNA_xSystemLocal Sets the local or remote state to local.
KtNA_xSystemMacroCopyChannel Copies ALL settings from the selected channel to another channel.
KtNA_xSystemMacroCopyChannelState Copies settings only, or settings and measurements, traces, markers, and limit lines from an existing channel, to a new channel.
KtNA_xSystemMeasureCatalogQuery Returns ALL measurement numbers.
KtNA_xSystemMeasureCatalogQueryWithChannelNo Returns measurement numbers from a specified channel.
KtNA_xSystemPreset Deletes all traces, measurements, and windows. In addition, resets the analyzer to factory defined default settings and creates a S11 measurement named "CH1_S11_1".
KtNA_xSystemTimeQuery Returns the system time (hours:minutes:seconds).
KtNA_xSystemUPreset Performs a User Preset.
KtNA_xSystemUPresetLoad Loads an existing instrument state file (.sta or .cst) to be used for User Preset. Subsequent execution of User preset will cause the VNA to assume this instrument state.
KtNA_xSystemUPresetSave Saves the current instrument settings as UserPreset.sta. Subsequent execution of User preset will cause the VNA to assume this instrument state.
KtNA_xSystemWindowsCatalogQuery Returns the window numbers that are currently being used.
KtNA_xTriggerAuxiliaryCountQuery Returns the number of AUX trigger input / output connector pairs in the instrument.
KtNA_xTriggerChannelAuxiliaryInputType Sets the type of Aux input detection that the VNA will employ.
KtNA_xTriggerChannelAuxiliaryInputTypeQuery Returns the type of Aux input detection that the VNA will employ.
KtNA_xTriggerChannelTRVideoNarrowType Set the trigger type for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default Power.
KtNA_xTriggerChannelTRVideoNarrowTypeQuery Gets the trigger type for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default Power.
KtNA_xTriggerStatusReadyQuery Checks if the VNA is ready for a hardware trigger.
Top

Attributes

Name Description
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_BAND_LIMITATION_ENABLED Selects whether the fixture is band limited or not.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_CORRECTION_ENABLED Selects whether to use DUT correction or not when the characterization fixture is not equal to the DUT measurement fixture.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_CORRECTION_MATCH_ENABLED Selects Fixture Match A not equal to B correction.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_FIXTURE_DATA_FILE_TYPE Sets the file type to save fixture data.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_FIXTURE_DATA_PORT Assigns the ports for saved fixture data in several formats.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_FIXTURE_INPUT Describes the fixture inputs (single ended or differential).
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_LENGTH_CORRECTION_ENABLED Selects Fixture Length A not equal to B correction.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_NUMBER_OF_FIXTURES Selects the number of fixtures to be characterized.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_STANDARD_ALL_OPEN_ENABLED Selects all OPEN standards.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_STANDARD_ALL_SHORT_ENABLED Selects all SHORT standards.
KTNA_ATTR_AFR_STANDARD_IMPEDANCE_METHOD Sets the impedance method.
KTNA_ATTR_AUXCONNECTOR_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_CACHE Drivers may choose to always cache some instrument settings, never cache others, and optionally cache others, to avoid unnecessary I/O to the instrument. If True, the driver caches optionally cached instrument settings.
KTNA_ATTR_CALIBRATION_SESSION_CAL_SET_PREFIX Sets and returns the prefix to be used when saving User Cal Sets that result from the Cal All session.
KTNA_ATTR_CALIBRATION_SESSION_IF_BANDWIDTH Sets and returns the IFBW in Hz for a Cal All calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_CALIBRATIONSESSION_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_ABSOLUTE_TONE_POWER Set and read the absolute tone power level. Default -5dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_DISPLAY_INTERPOLATION_ENABLED Sets whether or not interpolation is on for display. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_RELATIVE_TONE_POWER Set and read the tone power relative to the input power (dBc). Default -15dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_SWEEP_NO_OF_PHASE_POINT Set and read the number of phase points. Default 8.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_SWEEP_NO_OF_POWER_STEPS Set and read the number of power steps for a 3D sweep. Default 201.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_SWEEP_START_POWER Set and read the start power level for a 3D sweep. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_SWEEP_STOP_POWER Set and read the stop power level for a 3D sweep. 0dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_ACTIVE_PARAMETERS_TUNING_TONE_MODE Set and read the tuning tone mode. Default Absolute.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_AVERAGING_ENABLED Turns trace averaging ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_AVERAGING_FACTOR Sets the number of measurements to combine for an average.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_AVERAGING_IF_BANDWIDTH Sets or returns the bandwidth (in Hz) of the digital IF filter to be used in the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_AVERAGING_MODE Sets the type of averaging to perform.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_AVERAGING_REDUCE_IF_BANDWIDTH_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of the Reduce IF BW at Low Frequencies feature.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CAL_SET_NAME Sets or queries the name of the Cal Set currently applied to the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CALKIT_ECAL_MODULE_CHARACTERIZATION_IDENTITY Selects the model and serial number of the ECal module to be characterized. Default "Empty String".
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CALKIT_ECAL_MODULE_CHARACTERIZATION_INSITU_ENABLED Sets or returns whether the device (CalPod module) will be characterized as an in situ device.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CALKIT_ECAL_MODULE_CHARACTERIZATION_NUMBER Sets and reads the number to which the User Characterization will be stored in the ECal module. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CALKIT_ECAL_MODULE_CHARACTERIZATION_USER_DESCRIPT Sets and reads the description of the person and/or company who is producing the ECal user characterization. Default "Empty String".
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CALKIT_ECAL_MODULE_CHARACTERIZATION_VNA_DESCRIPT Sets and reads a description of the Vector Network Analyzer used to perform the User Characterization. Default "Empty String".
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CALSETS_DESCRIPTION Sets or returns the descriptive string assigned to the selected Cal Set.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CALSETS_RECEIVER This command converts the selected Cal Set from an S-parameter Cal Set to an S-parameter+Power Cal Set.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ASYNC_SWEEPING_ENABLED This command enables/disables asynchronous sweeping during a calibration acquisition. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CACHE_MODE Set this mode at ON for SNP file fast saving. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CAL_METHOD For UNGUIDED calibration, sets the calibration method (also known as 'Calibration Type' on calibration dialog box.)
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_CONNECTOR_FAMILY_NAME Replaces the primary connector family name from the selected kit with a new connector family name.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_DESCRIPTION Modifies the cal kit description field of the selected kit.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_NAME Sets the label for the calibration class designated by class.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_CHAR_IMPEDANCE Sets the characteristic impedance for the selected standard. Default 50.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_DESCRIPTION Modifies the description of the selected standard of the selected kit.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_ELECTRICAL_DELAY Sets the electrical delay value for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_INSERTION_LOSS Sets the insertion loss for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_LABEL Sets the label for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_MAX_FREQUENCY Sets the maximum frequency for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_MEDIA Sets the media type of the selected calibration standard. Default Coax.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_MIN_FREQUENCY Sets the minimum frequency for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_TREAL Sets the TZReal component value of the Terminal Impedance for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_STANDARD_TZ_IMAG Sets the TZImag component value of the Terminal Impedance for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_TRL_LOSS_CORR_ENABLED This setting ONLY applies if an LRL Cal Kit is being modified AND Testport Reference Plane is set to THRU AND the TRL Thru class standard and the TRL Line/Match class standard both have the same values for Offset Z0 and Loss. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_TRL_REFERENCE_IMPEDANCE Sets the reference impedance when using this TRL cal kit. Default Line.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CALKIT_TRL_REFERENCE_PLANE Sets the reference impedance when using this cal kit. Default Thru.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_CONFIDENCE_CHECK_PARAMETER Specifies an existing measurement to be used for the Confidence Check.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ENABLED Turns error correction ON and OFF for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ENR_NOISE_SOURCE_SERIAL_NO Sets and returns the serial number of noise source.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ENR_TABLE_ID Sets and returns ID of ENR table.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ERROR_TERM_MODEL Sets and returns the error term model. Default Term10.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_FORWARD_CAL_ENABLED Sets the direction a calibration will be performed when only one set of standards is used. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_GC_CALKIT Set and read the cal kit to be used for calibrating at the port 1 reference plane when the power sensor connector is different from the DUT port 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_GC_CONNECTOR_TYPE Set and read the power sensor connector type which is used to perform the Source Power Cal portion of a Gain Compression Calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_GC_POWER_LEVEL Set and read the power level at which to perform the Source Power Cal portion of a Gain Compression (Opt S93086A/B) Calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_INTERPOLATION_ENABLED Turns correction interpolation ON or OFF. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ISOL_AVERAGING_INCREMENT Specifies amount to increment (increase) the channel averaging factor during isolation measurement of the ECal module during an unguided ECal calibration. Default 8.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_ISOL_ENABLED Specifies whether or not the isolation state of the ECal module will be measured as part of an unguided ECal calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_NOISE_ENR_DEEMBEDDING_ENABLED Set and read the state of ENR Adapter de-embedding. Default O - OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_NOISE_POWER_SENSOR_DEEMBEDDING_ENABLED Set and read the state of power sensor adapter de-embedding. Default O - OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_NOISE_SOURCE_TEMP Sets and returns the temperature of the noise source connector.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_NOISE_THRU_DEEMBEDDING_ENABLED Set and read the state of the thru adapter de-embedding. Default O - OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_PORT_SUBSET_ENABLED Enabling the port subset correction.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_PREFERENCE_CALSET_SAVE Specifies the default manner in which calibrations that are performed using SCPI or COM are to be stored. Default CalRegister.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_PREFERENCE_ECAL_ORIENTATION_ENABLED Specifies whether or not the VNA should perform orientation of the ECal module during calibration. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_PREFERENCE_ECAL_OVERRANGE_ENABLED Sets and returns the ECAL over range state. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_RECEIVER_POWER_OFFSET Adjusts a receiver power cal to account for components or adapters that are added between the source port and receiver while performing this cal. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_SYSTEM_IMPEDANCE Sets and returns the system impedance value for the analyzer. Default 50.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_TWO_STANDARDS_ENABLED Specifies the acquisition of calibration data using ONE or TWO sets of standards. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_VELOCITY_FACTOR Sets the velocity factor to be used with Electrical Delay and Port Extensions. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_WAVE_CORR_METHOD Sets and returns the wave correction method. Default MATC.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_CORRECTION_WAVE_NORM_METHOD Sets and returns the wave normalization method. Deafult POW.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_DIVISOR Sets and reads the value by which the coupled range will be divided to achieve the frequency range specified.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_ID Sets and reads the frequency range to couple settings to. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_MULTIPLIER Sets and reads the value by which the coupled range will be multiplied to achieve the frequency range specified
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_COUPLE_OFFSET Sets and reads the frequency range number to be used as an offset.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLING_ENABLED Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of frequency range coupling.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_IFBW Sets and reads the receiver IF bandwidth setting in Hz. Default 1e5.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_NO Frequency range number. It starts from 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_START Sets and reads the start value for the specified frequency range.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_STOP Sets and reads the stop value for the specified frequency range.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DIQ_UP_CONVERSION_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of the Up or Down conversion setting.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_ADC_FILTER_TYPE Selects between a narrow and wide IF filter anti-aliasing path.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_AMPLIFIER_GAIN Sets and returns the nominal gain of an external source amplifier. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_ATTENUATOR_INCLUDED Enables or disables the external modulated source to pass through the attenuator of the specified PNA source and the attenuator setting is used to calculate the power levels.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_BAND_TABLE_DISPLAY_FONT Selects between a small and medium sized font displayed below the trace area of the display. Default Small.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_BAND_TABLE_SORT_METHOD Selects between sorting the modulation distortion table by band or by power. Default Band.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the carrier center frequency. Default 1.5GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_NBW_MODE Selects the noise bandwidth mode in the power sweep list table. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_NO_OF_POINTS Sets and returns the number of power points to measure for the power sweep list measurement. Default 11.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_NOISE_BW Sets and returns the noise bandwidth setting used for the specified row in the power sweep list table. Default 100Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_NOISE_BW_AUTO_ENABLED Enable or disable increasing noise bandwidth at high powers automatically for faster measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_POWER_LEVEL Sets and returns the power level used for the specified row in the power sweep list table. Default -10 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_POWER_LEVEL_FOR_TEST Sets and returns the carrier power level used for the distortion test at either the input or output of the DUT. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_RAMP_POINTS Sets and returns the number of power points to measure for the power sweep ramp measurement. Default 11.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_RAMP_START Sets and returns the starting power level for the power sweep ramp measurement. Default -20dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_RAMP_STOP Sets and returns the stop power level for the power sweep ramp measurement. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_RECEIVER_ATTENUATION Sets and returns the receiver attenuation for the specified row in the power sweep list table. 0dB.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_RECEIVER_ATTENUATION_MODE Selects the receiver attenuation mode in the power sweep list table. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_SOURCE_ATTENUATION Sets and returns the source attenuation for the specified row in the power sweep list table. Default 0dB.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_SOURCE_ATTENUATION_MODE Selects the source attenuation mode in the power sweep list table. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_SWEEP_NO Power sweep row number. If unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_CARRIER_SWEEP_TYPE Selects between a ramp type power sweep or a list of power values to define a power sweep. Default Ramp.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_DUT_GAIN Sets and returns the nominal DUT gain. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_DUT_INPUT_PORT_NO Sets and returns the VNA port number connected to the DUT input. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_DUT_MODE Set and read where to apply power to the DUT (input or output). Default DIN1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_DUT_NOISE_FIGURE Sets and returns the nominal DUT noise figure. This value is used by the EVM measurement. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_DUT_OUTPUT_PORT_NO Sets and returns the VNA port number connected to the DUT output. Default 2.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_EVM_SCALING_FACTOR Sets and returns the scaling factor applied to the EVM measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_NAME Assigns a name to the specified distortion measurement band. Default "NewBand".
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_NO Band number from 1 - 100. If unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_TYPE Set and read the modulation distortion type.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_CARRIER_IBW Sets and returns the carrier (Signal) integration bandwidth (IBW) for the distortion measurement. Default 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_CARRIER_OFFSET Sets and returns the carrier offset (Signal). Offsets the Carrier integration bandwidth relative to the Carrier LO used to generate the modulation signal. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_CORRELATION_APERTURE Sets and returns the frequency span window used for modeling the DUT's gain and distortion. Default 500000.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_CORRELATION_APERTURE_AUTO_ENAB Enable or disable automatic calculation of the frequency span window used for modeling the DUT's gain and distortion.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_FILTER_ALPHA_FACTOR Sets and returns the Alpha factor of the measurement filter.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_FILTER_SYMBOL_RATE Sets and returns the Symbol Rate of the filter.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_FILTER_TYPE Sets the measurement filter to either None (default) or RRC (root-raised-cosine filter) for EVM and ACP measurements only. Default None.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_LOWER_ACP_IBW Sets and returns the integration bandwidth (IBW) of the lower ACP measurement. Default 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_LOWER_ACP_OFFSET Sets and returns the lower ACP measurement offset. Default -100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_NOTCH_IBW Sets and returns the notch integration bandwidth (IBW) for an NPR Notch modulation measurement. Default 10MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_NOTCH_OFFSET Sets and returns the notch offset for an NPR Notch modulation measurement. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_SYMBOL_RATE_AUTO_ENABLED Enables or disables using the symbol rate from the file.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_UPPER_ACP_IBW Sets and returns the integration bandwidth (IBW) of the upper ACP measurement. Defqault 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MEASURE_UPPER_ACP_OFFSET Sets and returns the upper ACP measurement offset. Default 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_MOD_SOURCE_NAME Sets and returns the distortion modulation source name.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_NOISE_FIGURE_INCLUDED Include or exclude the nominal DUT noise figure value. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_RECEIVER_TIMING_AUTO_ENABLED Enables or disables receiver timing auto generation from the source pulse timing.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_SPARAMETER_BW Sets and returns the IF bandwidth for the linear S21 sweep. Default 1 kHz
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_SPARAMETER_ENABLED Enable or disable S-parameter sweep. If disabled, curve fitting (smoothing) is used instead of the S-parameter sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_SPARAMETER_POWER_LEVEL Sets and returns the power level used to measure the DUT S-parameters when operating in its linear region. Default -30dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_SPARAMETER_REUSE_ENABLED Enable or disable the re-use of the previous linear S-parameter measurements if available and skip sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_SPARAMETER_STEP_SIZE Sets and returns the step size for the linear S21 sweep. Default 1 MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_SWEEP_DELAY Sets and returns the delay in seconds before the test signal to allow the RF source to settle. Default 0s.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DISTORTION_SWEEP_TYPE Selects between a fixed or power sweep type of sweep. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DSP_FILTER_ADC_CAPTURE_MODE_ENABLED Sets and returns the ADC capture mode modeled as a 2-pole switch in the above diagram.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DSP_FILTER_AUTO_ENABLED Sets and returns whether the VNA configures the 3-stage digital filter settings or they will be configured manually. When making manual settings.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DSP_FILTER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the IF frequency for ALL receiver paths being used for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DSP_FILTER_FREQUENCY_AUTO_ENABLED Sets and returns the method for specifying the way the IF Frequency is determined.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DSP_FILTER_SHAPE Sets and returns the IF bandwidth filter shape.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DSP_FILTER_STAGE1_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the Numerically Controlled Oscillator (NCO) frequency. Default Nominal IF Frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_DSP_FILTER_STAGE3_TYPE Sets and returns the Stage 3 filter type. Default Tukey.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_DEVICE_TYPE Selects the device type for the balanced measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_PHASE_OFFSET_FIXT_ENAB Sets and reads the state of "Phase Offset - Offset as Fixture" with True Mode balanced measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_PHASE_SWEEP_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_PHASE_SWEEP_FIXT_ENAB Sets and reads the state of "Phase Sweep - Offset as Fixture" (labeling on GUI).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_PHASE_SWEEP_PORT For a Balanced device type, specifies which balanced port the phase will be swept.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_POWER_OFFSET_FIXT_ENAB Sets and reads the state of "Power Offset - Offset as Fixture" with True Mode balanced measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_STIMULUS_MODE Sets the stimulus mode of the VNA source. Default SE.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_BAL_MEAS_TRANSFORM_ENABLED Turns balanced transform ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_DRAFT_CIRCUITS_ALL_ENABLED Turns all circuits ON or OFF for all ports.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_DRAFT_PORT_EXTENSIONS_ENABLED Turns port extensions ON or OFF for all ports.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_DRAFT_ZCONV_ALL_ENABLED Turns all ZConversions ON or OFF (both SE and BAL).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_ENABLED Turns all three fixturing functions (de-embedding, port matching, impedance conversion) ON or OFF for all ports on the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FIXTURE_SIMULATOR_PORT_EXT_POWER_COMP_MODE Adjust the source power compensation for gain or loss. Default All.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_DISPLAY_RANGE Select the range to be displayed on the VNA x-axis. All traces in the channel have this same x-axis scaling. Default "Receivers".
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_ENABLED Turns Frequency Offset ON and OFF. Frequency offset settings are not enabled until this setting is ON.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_COUPLING_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of coupling (ON or OFF) of the specified range to the primary range.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_CW_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the CW frequency (in Hz).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_DIVISOR Sets and returns the divisor value. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_MULTIPLIER Sets and returns the multiplier value to be used when coupling this range to the primary range. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_NO Range number. If unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_OFFSET Sets and returns the offset value to be used when coupling this range to the primary range. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_START Sets and returns the Start value of frequency range (in Hz). Default - Minimum frequency of the VNA.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_STOP Sets and returns the Stop value of frequency range (in Hz). Default - Maximum frequency of the VNA.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_FOM_RANGE_SWEEP_TYPE Sets and returns the sweep type to be used with the specified range. Default Linear
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_ACQUISITION_MODE Set and read the method by which gain compression data is acquired. Default SmartSweep
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_ALGO_METHOD Set and read the algorithm method used to compute gain compression. Default LinearGain.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_BACKOFF Set and read value for the BackOff compression algorithm in dB.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_COARSE_POWER_ADJUSTMENT Set and read the Safe Sweep COARSE power adjustment in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_DC_DEVICE_MAX_LIMIT Set and read the maximum limit of the external DC device. Default -5.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_DC_DEVICE_NAME Set and read the name of the external DC device.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_DELTA_X Set and read the 'X' value in the delta X or Y compression algorithm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_DELTA_Y Set and read the 'Y' value in the delta X or Y compression algorithm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_END_OF_SWEEP This setting is used to protect a sensitive device from too much power during the sweep retrace. Default Standard.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_FINE_POWER_ADJUSTMENT Set and read the Safe Sweep FINE power adjustment in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_INTERPOLATION_ENABLED Sets whether or not interpolation should be performed on 2D measured compression data.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_LEVEL Set and read the desired gain reduction (from reference gain).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_LINEAR_GAIN_INPUT_POWER Set and read the input power at which Linear Gain and all S-parameters are measured.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_LINEAR_INPUT_POWER_APERTURE Set and read the aperture to use when computing the linear input power.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_MAX_POWER_LIMIT When the VNA port that is connected to the DUT Output measures this value, the input power to the DUT is no longer incremented at that frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_NO_OF_FREQUENCY_POINTS Set and read the number of data points in each frequency sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_NO_OF_POWER_POINTS Set and read the number of data points in each power sweep. Default 21.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_PHASE_LEVEL Set and read the desired phase to measure compression.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_PHASE_MODE Set and read compression format to be either magnitude, phase, or magnitude and phase. Default Magnitude.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_POWER_SMOOTHING_APERTURE Set and read the power smoothing aperture in percent. Default 25.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_POWER_SMOOTHING_ENABLED Set and read the state of the power smoothing.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_REVERSE_POWER Set and read the reverse power level to the DUT.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SAFE_SWEEP_ENABLED Set and read the (ON or OFF) state of Safe Sweep mode.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SAFE_THRESHOLD Set and read the compression level in which Safe Sweep changes from the COARSE power adjustment to the FINE power adjustment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SAME_PATH_CONFIG_ENABLED This function is used when GCX channels with a reference mixer and one GCA channel without a reference mixer are set up simultaneously and you want to use the same path configuration for all channels. This remaps the source port to Port 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SATURATION_LEVEL Set and read the deviation dB from the maximum Pout. This is the point of saturation.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SMART_SWEEP_DC_READING_ENABLED Set and read the DC readings at the compression point in the last iteration of a smart sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SMART_SWEEP_MAX_NO_OF_ITERATION Set and read the maximum permitted number of iterations which SMART Sweep may utilize to find the desired compression level, to within the specified tolerance.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SMART_SWEEP_RESULTS_ENABLED Set and read enable for showing intermediate results for each iteration of SMART Sweep
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SMART_SWEEP_SETTLING_TIME Set and read the amount of time SMART Sweep will dwell at the first point where the input power changes by the Backoff or X level.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_SMART_SWEEP_TOLERANCE Set and read the acceptable range SMART Sweep will allow for the measured compression level.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_START_POWER Set and read the start power level.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GAIN_COMPRESSION_STOP_POWER Set and read the stop power level.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GUIDED_CALIBRATION_ADVANCED_ECAL_CAL_KIT Specifies the Ecal Kit for Ecal Calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GUIDED_CALIBRATION_CHANNEL_MODE Determines whether or not to honor the channel argument in guided calibration SCPI commands.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GUIDED_CALIBRATION_ISOLATION_AVERAGING_INCREMENT Specifies amount to increment (increase) the channels averaging factor during measurement of isolation standards in a guided calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GUIDED_CALIBRATION_MATCH_CORRECTION_ENABLED Turns match-correction ON or OFF. Use this command AFTER performing an Guided Power Cal. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_GUIDED_CALIBRATION_SLIDING_LOAD_PREFERENCE Specifies the behavior for guided cal steps that involve a sliding load in a cal that is about to be performed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F1_TONE Sets and returns the frequency of the F1 tone. Default 0.9995 GHz
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F1_TONE_POWER Sets and returns the power level of the F1 tone. Default -24dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F1_TONE_POWER_START Sets and returns the start power level of the F1 tone. Default -24 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F1_TONE_POWER_STOP Sets and returns the stop power level of the F1 tone. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F2_TONE Sets and returns the frequency of the F2 tone. Default 1.0005 GHz
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F2_TONE_POWER Sets and returns the power level of the F2 tone. Default -24 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F2_TONE_POWER_START Sets and returns the start power level of the F2 tone. Default -24 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_F2_TONE_POWER_STOP Sets and returns the stop power level of the F2 tone. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_INTERMODULATION_IFBW Sets and returns the IF Bandwidth for measurement of the intermodulation products. Default 1kHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_MAIN_TONE_CENTER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the sweep center frequency when sweeping the main tones. Default 13.255 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_MAIN_TONE_FREQUENCY_SPAN Sets and returns the frequency span when sweeping the main tones. 26.489 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_MAIN_TONE_FREQUENCY_START Sets and returns the start frequency when sweeping the main tones. Default 10.4 MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_MAIN_TONE_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets and returns the stop frequency when sweeping the main tones. Default 26.4995 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_MAIN_TONE_IFBW Sets and returns the IF Bandwidth for measurement of the main F1 and F2 tones. Default 1kHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_SWEEP_TYPE Sets and returns the sweep type for the IMD measurement. Default CenterFrequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_TONE_CENTER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the center frequency of the main tones. Default 1.0GHz
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_TONE_POWER_COUPLING_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of power coupling for F1 and F2.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_TONE_POWER_LEVELING_MODE Sets and returns the tone power leveling mode. Default None.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_TONE_SPACING Sets and returns fixed tone spacing. Default 1MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_TONE_SPACING_START Sets and returns the starting main tone separation for sweep type DFRequency (delta frequency). Default 1MHz
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_IMD_TONE_SPACING_STOP Sets and returns the stopping main tone separation for sweep type DFRequency (delta frequency). Default 10MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_ABSOLUTE_PHASE_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of SMC Phase measurements to use absolute phase
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_ELO_ENABLED Sets and returns the ON or OFF state of Embedded LO.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_IF_FREQ_SIDEBAND When two LO stages are used, sets or returns whether to select the sum or difference for the IF1 product.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_IF_FREQ_START Sets or returns the IF start frequency value of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_IF_FREQ_STOP Sets or returns the stop frequency value of the mixer IF frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_DENOMINATOR Sets or returns the denominator value of the Input Fractional Multiplier.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_FIXED_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the fixed frequency of the input.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_NUMERATOR Sets or returns the numerator value of the Input Fractional Multiplier.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_POWER Sets or returns the value of the Input Power.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_START_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the Input start frequency value of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_START_POWER Sets the input start power for a power sweep in a mixer channel like SMC. The value is only used when the sweep type is power sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_STOP_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the Input stop frequency value of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_STOP_POWER Sets the input stop power for a power sweep in a mixer channel . The value is only used when the sweep type is power sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_INPUT_SWEEP_MODE Sets or returns the Input sweep mode. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_DENOMINATOR Sets or returns the denominator value of the LO Fractional Multiplier. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_FIXED_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the fixed frequency of the specified mixer LO.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_GREATER_FREQUENCY_ENABLED Specifies whether to use the Input frequency that is greater than the LO or less than the LO.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_NUMERATOR Sets or returns the numerator value of the LO Fractional Multiplier.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_POWER Sets or returns the LO Power fixed value.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_SOURCE_NAME ets or returns the name of the VNA internal source or external source to use as the LO in a converter measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_STAGE_NO LO stage number. Choose 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_START_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the LO start frequency value.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_START_POWER For an LO power sweep, sets or returns the LO power start value. Default -20 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_STOP_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the LO stop frequency value.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_STOP_POWER For an LO power sweep, sets or returns the LO power stop value. Default -10 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_LO_SWEEP_MODE Sets or returns the LO sweep mode. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_NOMINAL_INCIDENT_POWER_ENABLED Toggles the Use Nominal Incident Power setting ON and OFF. This setting is ONLY to be used with SMC measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_NORMALIZATION_POINT Sets or returns the data point for normalizing the phase measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_OUTPUT_FIXED_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the output fixed frequency of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_OUTPUT_FREQ_SIDEBAND Specify whether to select the sum (High) or difference (Low) products.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_OUTPUT_START_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the Output start frequency of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_OUTPUT_STOP_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the Output stop frequency of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_OUTPUT_SWEEP_MODE Sets or returns the Output sweep mode. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_PHASE_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of SMC Phase measurements and calibrations.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_STAGE_COUNT Number of IF stages (LOs) used in the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_MIXER_X_PARAM Sets or returns the swept frequency range to display on the X-axis for the IMDx or NFx channel. Default Output.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_AMBIENT_TEMPERATURE Sets the temperature at which the current noise measurement is occurring. Default 295 Kelvin.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_AMBIENT_TEMPERATURE_AUTO_ENABLED If ON, will use 302K as the ambient temperature when vector correction is applied and the tuner is an ECal or internal tuner. If OFF, will use the specified ambient temperature.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_AVERAGING_ENABLED Turns noise averaging ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_AVERAGING_FACTOR Set and read the averaging factor for the noise receiver.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_BANDWIDTH Set and read the bandwidth of the noise receiver.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_GAIN Set and read the amount of gain for the noise receiver.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_IMPEDANCE_STATE_COUNT Sets the number of impedance states to use during calibrated measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_NARROWBAND_ENABLED Turns narrowband noise figure compensation ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_RECEIVER Sets and returns the noise receiver to use for noise measurements. Default Noise.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_SOURCE_PULL_ENABLED Enables and disables the use of source pull technique to compute S22.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_NOISE_THRESHOLD_CHECKING_ENABLED Turns noise threshold checking ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PATH_CONFIG_DESCRIPTIVE_TEXT Write and read descriptive text associated with the configuration.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_ATTENUATION Sets the attenuation level for the selected channel. The range is from 0 to 30 dB with the step size 1 dB. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_ATTENUATION_AUTO_ENABLED Enable and disable the automatic attenuation control. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_BASEBAND_GAIN Sets and returns the setting for baseband gain. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_BASEBAND_INPUT Sets and returns the setting for baseband input. Default ACLF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_CARRIER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the carrier frequency. Default 1 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_CARRIER_SEARCH_ENABLED Enables and disables a broadband carrier search within the range specified. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_CARRIER_SEARCH_THRESHOLD Sets and returns the threshold to use during a carrier search. Default -20dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_COMPOSITION_RANGE Choose the range of AM/PM composite measurement. Default R30.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_CROSS_CORRELATION_COUNT Sets and returns the cross correlation count number. Correlation count number from 1 to 100,000. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_DECOMPOSITION_MODEL Choose decomposition model of AM/PM composite measurement range. Default 4.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_FFT_AVERAGE_FACTOR Sets and returns the FFT average factor number. FFT average factor number from 1 to 10,000. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_NOISE Sets and returns the noise type to phase, residual or baseband noise. Default PhaseNoise.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_OFFSET_FREQUENCY_EXTENSION Sets and returns the Offset frequency extension status. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_POWER_CORRECTION_ENABLED Enable and disable the power correction. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_PULSE_ENABLED Enables or disables Pulse setup for phase noise measurement. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_PULSE_PERIOD Set or returns Pulse period for phase noise measurement. Default 100E-6.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_RESOLUTION_BW_RATIO Sets and returns the resolution bandwidth ratio, which is the specified resolution bandwidth percentage of every half decade offset frequency. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_SEGMENT_NO Set this property before using any PN segment command. Choose segment number either equal to or greater than 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_SEGMENT_RESOLUTION_BANDWIDTH Sets and returns the resolution bandwidth for each phase noise segment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_SEGMENT_X_CORRELATION_COUNT Sets and returns the cross correlation count number for each phase noise segment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_SWEEP_NOISE_MODE Sets and returns the sweep noise mode. Default Normal.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_SWEEP_TYPE Sets and returns the phase noise sweep type to logarithmic or segment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PN_X_CORRELATION_GAIN_INDICATOR_ENABLED This command turns the cross-correlation gain indicator on and off. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PULSE_GENERATOR_PULSE4_MODE Sets the specific PULSe4 behavior to either “All" ADC Activity or "Trace" ADC Activity. Default All.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PULSE_GENERATOR_PULSE4_OUTPUT_ENABLED Turns pulse4 output ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_PULSE_GENERATOR_TRIGGER_POLARITY
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_REF_OSCILLATOR_AUTO_ENABLED Enables selecting between locking to an external reference without the ability to change the reference frequency, or select internal or external reference with the ability to change the reference frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_REF_OSCILLATOR_EXTERNAL_FREQ Set and read Reference Oscillator frequency at the reference input connector. Default 1E+7.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_REF_OSCILLATOR_FREQ_AUTO_ENABLED When enabled, Reference Oscillator frequency is measured with internal hardware and set automatically.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_REF_OSCILLATOR_OUTPUT_FREQ Set and read Reference Oscillator frequency outputted from the reference output connector. Default 1E+7.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_REF_OSCILLATOR_STATE Set and read the Reference Oscillator state. Default Internal.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_CUT_OFF_FREQUENCY Set and read the ADC filter cutoff frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_DITHER_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of the FFT grid dither setting
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_FILTER_AUTO_ENABLED Set and read how the ADC filter is set. When ON, the ADC filter is set based on the start and stop frequencies and the ADC sampling frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_FIR_FILTER_ENABLED Set and read the FIR filter for 25 MHz decimation.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_FORCE_RECORD_SIZE_VALUE Set and read the integer size value for the force ADC record size feature.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_MULTIPLE_RECORDING_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of the multiple recording function.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_OVERLOAD_THRESHOLD Set and read the ADC overload threshold percentage. Default 80.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_RECORD_CHUNK_SIZE Set and read the size of the ADC record chunks.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_RECORD_CHUNK_WAIT_PERIOD Set and read the period to wait between ADC record chunks.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_RECORD_SIZE_MANUAL_ENABLED Set and read the ADC record size mode.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_SAMPLE_RATE Set and read the IQ sample rate.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_SAMPLE_RATE_AUTO_ENABLED Set and read the ADC sample rate mode.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_SAMPLE_STACKING_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of the ADC sample stacking.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_ADC_STACKING_VALUE Set and read the ADC stacking value.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_BASEBAND_ENABLED Enables and disables baseband sweep independent of the LO sweep to allow signals down to 1 Hz to be analyzed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_BW_RATIO Set and read the RBW or VBW ratio. Default 1.0
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_ADC_TRIGGER_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of a measurement trigger event that will occur whenever the ADC level is greater than the value specified
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_ADC_TRIGGER_LEVEL Set and read the ADC trigger level.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_IMAGE_REJECT_TRACES_ENABLED Set and read the show or hide state of the image reject traces in the measurement parameters dialog.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_LO_FEED_THRU_MONITOR_ENABLED Set and read the LO feedthru monitoring state.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_LO_FEED_THRU_MONITOR_RECEIVER Set and read the target receiver for LO Feedthru monitor. Select the reference receiver in most cases. Default "a1".
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_LO_FEED_THRU_MONITOR_TOLERANCE Set and read the threshold level for warning. Default -40.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_LO_FEED_THRU_MONITORING_TYPE Set and read the monitoring method for LO feedthru monitor. Default Band power.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_DATA_DISPLAY Set and read the data display mode. Default All.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_HARMONICS_REJECT_COUNT Set and read the number of test signal harmonics you want to be protected against. This adds constraints to the list of LOs used to cover the span. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_IMAGE_REJECTION_ENABLED Enables or disables multitone image rejection.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_NYQUIST_PROTECTION_LEVEL Sets and returns the Nyquist protection level. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_OFFSET_FREQUENCY Set and read the multitone image rejection offset frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_REPITITION_RATE Set and read the test signal repetition rate (in seconds). Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_SPACING Set and read the tone spacing of the multitone signal (in Hz). Default 1000000.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_COMPUTING_ENABLED Enables or disables phase computing.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_DISPLAY_LEVEL Set and read the phase display minimum level in dBm. Default -60 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_COMMON_ENABLED Enables or disables selected receiver, or receiver with highest energy in the overlap area, to drive the phase stitching for all receivers.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_ENABLED Enable or disable phase stitching.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_HW_TIMESTAMP_ENABLED Enables or disables phase stitching using hardware time stamps to determine the phase of each LO acquisition and stitch them back together with phase consistency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_LEVEL Set and read the minimum tone power level to perform phase stitching in dBm. Default -150 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_RECEIVER Assigns a specified receiver for phase stitching. Default R1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_RECEIVER_AUTO_ENABLED Set and read the receiver for stitching automatically.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_COUNT Set and read the maximum pulse search count. Default 100.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_DUTY_CYCLE_TOLERANCE Set and read the duty cycle tolerance.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_PERIOD Set and read the period starting point in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_PERIOD_TOLERANCE Set and read the period tolerance. Only solutions that ensure this tolerance will be accepted.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_PRIORITY Set and read the priority choice for the search algorithm. Default Width.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_WIDTH Set and read the width starting point in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_WIDTH_TOLERANCE Set and read the width tolerance. Only solutions that ensure this tolerance will be accepted.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_TRIGGER_PERIODIC_COUNTER_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of a measurement trigger event based on the specified period.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_TRIGGER_PERIODIC_COUNTER_VALUE Set and read the periodic counter value. This command initiates a measurement trigger event based on the specified period.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_VECTOR_AVERAGING_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of the vector averaging.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_COHERENCE_VECTOR_AVERAGING_VALUE Set and read the vector averaging value.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_ALL_MARKER_TEXT_FILE_ENABLED Enables or disables adding all marker data to the text file (.txt) output.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_BINARY_FILE_OUTPUT_ENABLED Enables or disables binary file (.bin) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_COMPUTING_TIME_DOMAIN_IQ_ENABLED Enable or disable computing time domain IQ.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_END_OF_SWEEP_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of the end of sweep processing.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_ERASE_FILE_ENABLED Enables or disables erasing output data files after each sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_EXPORT_ENABLED Enables or disables exporting frequency and data for text files.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_FIFO_ENABLED Enables or disables exporting data to the FIFO (First-IN, First-OUT) data buffer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_FILE_PREFIX Set and return the file name prefix for the data file.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_FORMAT Set and read the data format.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_IQ_BINARY_FILE_OUTPUT_ENABLED Enables or disables binary file (.bin) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_IQ_CARRIER_FREQUENCY Set and read the IQ carrier frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_IQ_SAMPLE_COUNT Set and read the number of IQ samples.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_IQ_SAMPLE_RATE Set and read the IQ sample rate.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_IQ_TEXT_FILE_OUTPUT_ENABLED Enables or disables text file (.txt) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_MARKER_TEXT_FILE_ENABLED Enables or disables adding marker data to the text file (.txt) output.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_MEMORY_SHARING_ENABLED Enables or disables exporting data to shared memory, which is the fastest way to transfer data between applications.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_RECEIVER_LIST_TO_EXPORT Set and read the list of receivers to export. The order set using this command will determine the order in which data will be exported to the FIFO data buffer.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_RECEIVERS_LIST_WITH_MEAS_STORED
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_RECOMPUTING_IQ_ENABLED Enable or disable recomputing the advanced IQ parameters (IQ center, IQ sample rate, IQ number of points) automatically if a SA sweep parameter change is performed.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_SHARED_MECHANISM_NAME Assigns a specified name to the Microsoft Windows shared data mechanism.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_TEXT_FILE_OUTPUT_ENABLED Enables or disables text file (.txt) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_THRESHOLD Set and read the threshold value (dBm). Default -60 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DATA_THRESHOLD_MODE_ENABLED Enables or disables data level threshold mode
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DETECTOR_BYPASS_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of the detector bypass setting.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DETECTOR_FUNCTION Set and read the detector type. Default Peak.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DFT_BANDWIDTH_AUTO_ENABLED Set and read the default values for DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_DFT_RECORD_SIZE_TYPE Set and return the DFT record size type. Default Radix.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FFT_DITHER_ENABLED Set and read the ON or OFF state of the FFT grid dither setting
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FORCE_LO_DIVIDER Set and read the divider in the equation for setting LO frequency. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FORCE_LO_ENABLED Set and read enable force LO to frequency mode.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FORCE_LO_FREQUENCY Set and read enable force LO to the specified frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FORCE_LO_MULTIPLIER Set and read the multiplier in the equation for setting LO frequency. Default1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FORCE_LO_SOURCE Set and read the source name in the equation for setting LO frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_DUAL_BAND_CONFIG_ENABLED Set and read the ON on OFF state of the dual band configuration for fast setting of the frequency converter DUT.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_INPUT_CENTER_FREQ Set and read the frequency converter DUT input center frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_INPUT_PORT Set and read the port number of the VNA connected to the input of the frequency converter DUT. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_INPUT_SOURCE Set and read the source name that generates the modulated signal. Default "None".
