KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_INVERTING_ENABLED Enable or disable inverting the spectrum (or mirror) by the frequency converter operation.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_LO_OFFSET Set and read the LO offset value in Hz. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_OUTPUT_CENTER_FREQ Set and read the frequency converter DUT output center frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQ_CONVERTER_OUTPUT_PORT Set and read the port number of the VNA connected to the output of the frequency converter DUT. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_FREQUENCY_SPAN Set and read the Frequency Span or RBW ratio.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_IMAGE_REJECT_MODE Set and read the image reject mode. Default Normal.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_IMAGE_REJECTION_STRENGTH Sets and returns the image rejection strength. Default Medium
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_LO_RANDOMIZE_ENABLED Set and read the LO randomize state.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_MAX_DFT_NARROW_BW Set and read the maximum value for narrow DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_MAX_DFT_WIDE_BW Set and read the maximum value for wide DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_MIN_DFT_NARROW_BW Set and read the minimum value for narrow DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_MIN_DFT_WIDE_BW Set and read the minimum value for wide DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_OCC_BW_MIN_SEARCH_FREQ Set and read the minimum search frequency to use during an Occupied BW search measurement. Default 250MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_RESOLUTION_BW Set and read the resolution bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_RESOLUTION_BW_AUTO_ENABLED Set and read how the resolution bandwidth is set. When ON, the resolution bandwidth is set based on Span or RBW ratio.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_RESOLUTION_BW_SHAPE Set and read the resolution bandwidth shape. Default Gaussian.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_VIDEO_BW Set and read the video bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_VIDEO_BW_AUTO_ENABLED Set and read how the video bandwidth is set. When ON, video bandwidth is set based on RBW or VBW ratio.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SA_VIDEO_BW_AVERAGING_TYPE Set and read the averaging type. Default Power.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_ARBITRARY_ENABLED Enables you to setup a segment sweep with arbitrary frequencies.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_BANDWIDTH_CONTROL_ENABLED Specifies whether the IF Bandwidth resolution can be set independently for each segment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_ENABLED Turns the specified sweep segment ON or OFF. At least ONE segment must be ON or Sweep Mode is automatically set to Linear.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_IF_BANDWIDTH Sets the IF Bandwidth for the specified segment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_NO Segment number to add, delete or modify.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_POWER_CONTROL_ENABLED Specifies whether Power Level can be set independently for each segment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_SWEEP_DWELL_TIME Sets or returns the sweep dwell time of the specified sweep segment. Default 0s.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_SWEEP_DWELL_TIME_CONTROL_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the sweep dwell time of the specified sweep segment.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_SEGMENT_X_SPACING Sets X-axis spacing ON or OFF. Default Linear.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_ENABLED Enable and disable the Auto Tune VControl voltage. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_FREQUENCY_BAND Selects the frequency band which include the target VCO frequency. Default R8G
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_MAX_LIMIT Set and read the maximum limit of VControl during Auto Tune sequence. Default 18.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_MAX_NO_OF_ITER Set and read the maximum number of readings to take at each data point for iterating the frequency. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_MIN_LIMIT Set and read the minimum limit of VControl during Auto Tune sequence. Default 0.5.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_SENSITIVITY Set and read the sensitivity of VCO (Hz/Volt). This value is used at the first loop of sequence. Default 50.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_TARGET_FREQUENCY Set and read the target frequency. Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_AFC_TOLERANCE Set and read the maximum desired deviation from the specified target frequency. Default 1E5.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_ALL_ENABLED Sets the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_LOW_NOISE_V_CONTROL Enable and disable the low noise V Control. Choose from 1 or 0. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_SEQ_SETTLING_TIME Sets and reads the DC output sequencing settling time. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_DC_SEQUENCING_ENABLED Sets and reads the DC output sequencing state. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_GAIN_COUP_ALL_SET Set and read the setting for receiver gain coupling for all port in the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CENTER Sets or returns the power sweep center power.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_COUP_ENABLED Turns Port Power Coupling ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ENABLED Turns RF power from the source ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_LEVEL Sets or returns the RF power output level in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_MODE Sets the state of VNA source for the specified port.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_SLOPE Sets the RF power slope value in in db/GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_SLOPE_ENABLED Turns Power Slope ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_SPAN Sets the power sweep span power in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_START Sets or returns the power sweep start power for ALL ports being used by the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_START_SPECIFIC Sets and reads the power sweep start power value in dBm for a specific port. This allows uncoupled forward and reverse power sweep ranges.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_STOP Sets or returns the power sweep stop power for ALL ports being used by the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_STOP_SPECIFIC Sets and reads the power sweep stop power value in dBm for a specific port. This allows uncoupled forward and reverse power sweep ranges.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SOURCE_PORT_PULSE_ENABLED Turns pulse on and off with an external modulation source.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_COUPLING_MODE Sets the sweep mode as Chopped or Alternate.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_CW_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the Continuous Wave (or Fixed) frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_DELAY Sets or returns the time in seconds to wait just before acquisition begins for each sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_DWELL_TIME Sets or returns the dwell time in seconds between each sweep point.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_DWELL_TIME_AUTO_ENABLED Specifies whether or not to automatically calculate and set the minimum possible dwell time.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FAST_CW_POINTS Enables Fast CW sweep and sets the number of data points for the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FAST_MODE Sets and returns the state of Fast Sweep mode.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_LF_EXTENSION_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF low frequency extension for extending the range down to 1 kHz start frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_MODE Sets sweep as Stepped or Analog.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_NUMBER_OF_POINTS Sets or returns the number of data points for the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_POINT_SWEEP_MODE_ENABLED Turns ON and OFF point sweep mode.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_SHIFT_LO_MAX_FREQUENCY Sets the Shift LO maximum frequency for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_SHIFT_LO_MODE_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the Shift LO mode for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_TIME Sets or Returns the time in seconds the analyzer takes to complete one sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_TIME_AUTO_ENABLED Turns the automatic sweep time function ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_TRIGGER_COUNT Sets the trigger count (groups) for the specified channel. Set trigger mode to group after setting this count.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_TRIGGER_MODE Sets the number of trigger signals the specified channel will ACCEPT.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRACE_COUNT Sets or gets the number of traces of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRACE_COUPLING_ENABLED Turns ON and OFF Time Domain Trace Coupling. All of the measurements in the specified channel are coupled.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_MAX_INPUT_LEVEL Set and read the maximum power input level.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_MODE Sets and read the transition mode, Wide-Narrow or Narrow-Narrow. Default WN.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_NARROW_BAND_CENTER_FREQUENCY Set and read the center frequency for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default 1G.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_NARROW_BAND_FREQUENCY_RANGE Set and read the frequency span of narrow band 1/2. Default R30.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_NARROW_BAND_NO Narrow Band number. Choose from 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_NARROW_BAND_OFFSET_TIME Set and read the offset time at the reference point for the narrow band 1 or 2. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_NARROW_BAND_REFERENCE_POSITION Set and read the position at the reference point of the narrow band 1 or 2. Default Center.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_NARROW_BAND_TIME_SPAN Set and read the time span of the narrow band 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_NARROW_BAND_VIDEO_BAND_WIDTH Sets and read the Video Band Width (VBW) for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default 1.7M.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_POWER_CORRECTION_ENABLED Enable and disable the power correction. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_TIME_COUPLING_ENABLED Enable and disable the time coupling for two measurements (Wide-Narrow or Narrow1-Narrow2). Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_WIDE_BAND_FREQUENCY_RANGE Set and read the frequency range for wide band. Default R8G.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_WIDE_BAND_OFFSET_TIME Set and read the time offset for wide band.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_WIDE_BAND_REFERENCE_POSITION Set and read the position at the reference point of wide band. Default Center.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_WIDE_BAND_TIME_SPAN Set and read the time span of wide band.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRANSIENT_WIDE_BAND_VIDEO_BAND_WIDTH Sets and read the Video Band Width (VBW) for Wide Band. Default 250E3.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_HANDSHAKING_ENABLED Turns handshake ON / OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_INPUT_DELAY Specifies the delay in seconds that should be applied by the VNA after the Aux trigger input is received and before the acquisition is made.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_INPUT_POLARITY Specifies the polarity of the trigger IN signal to which the VNA will respond.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_INPUT_SOURCE Specifies the auxiliary trigger input source.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_OUTPUT_DELAY Specifies the delay in seconds that should be applied by the VNA after the Aux trigger output is output and before the acquisition is made.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_OUTPUT_DURATION Specifies the width of the output pulse, which is the time that the Aux trigger output will be asserted.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_OUTPUT_ENABLED Turns ON / OFF the trigger output.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_OUTPUT_MODE Specifies how often a trigger output signal is sent.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_OUTPUT_POLARITY Specifies the polarity of the Aux Output signal being supplied by the VNA.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_AUX_CONNECTOR_OUTPUT_POSITION Specifies whether the aux trigger out signal is sent BEFore or AFTer the acquisition.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_DELAY Sets and reads the trigger delay in seconds for all measurements in the specified CHANNEL.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_MODE Sets and reads the trigger mode for the specified channel. This determines what EACH signal will trigger.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_ADJUSTMENT_TIME Set and read the adjustment time from the external trigger. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_ENABLED Enable and disable the video trigger for the Transient measurement. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_HOLD_OFF_TIME Set and read the holdoff time for Video Trigger in Narrow band. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_HYSTERESIS Set and read the hysteresis value (frequency) for video trigger in Narrow band. Default 1E3.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_NO Sets and Gets Transient narrow band number. Choose from 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_POW_HYSTERESIS Set and read the hysteresis value (Power) for video trigger in Narrow band. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_SLOPE Set and read the trigger edge from positive or negative for video trigger in Narrow band. Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_TARGET_FREQ Set and read the target frequency value which make a video trigger in Narrow band. Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_TARGET_POWER Set and read the target power value which make a video trigger in Narrow band. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_THRESHOLD Set and read the minimum power value which disables the video trigger in Narrow band.- Default -20dB.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_SOURCE Set and read the trigger source from Wide, Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default WB.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_WIDE_BAND_HOLD_OFF_TIME Set and read the holdoff time for Video Trigger in Wide band. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_WIDE_BAND_HYSTERESIS Set and read the hysteresis value for video trigger in Wideband. Default 1E3.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_WIDE_BAND_SLOPE Set and read the trigger edge from positive or negative for video trigger in Wideband. Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_TRIGGER_TRANSIENT_VIDEO_WIDE_BAND_TARGET_FREQUENCY Set and read the target frequency value which make a video trigger in Wideband. Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_ATTENUATION Set and read manual attenuation setting. Default 20.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_ATTENUATION_AUTO_ENABLED Enable and disable the auto calculate attenuation setting. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_FREQUENCY_BAND Set and read the frequency band. Default R8G.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_FREQUENCY_RESOLUTION Set and read the frequency resolution. Default R10.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_INPUT_LEVEL_AUTO_ENABLED Enable and disable the auto leveling function at pre-measurement. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_MAX_INPUT_LEVEL Set and read the maximum input level used to calculate attenuation setting in dBm. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_POWER_CORRECTION_ENABLED Enable and disable the power correlation. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_CHANNEL_VCO_SWEEP_TYPE Set and read the sweep type. Default VControl.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_FOOTSWITCH_MODE This command sets the mode of the "FootSwitch In" line on the Auxiliary IO. Default Ignore.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_PASS_FAIL_LOGIC Sets the logic of the PassFail line (pin 12) on the Material Handler IO (pin 33). Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_PASS_FAIL_MODE Sets and reads the default logical pass/fail state. Default NoWait.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_PASS_FAIL_POLICY Sets the policy used to determine how global pass/fail is computed. Default AllTests.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_PASS_FAIL_SCOPE Sets and reads the scope of pass/fail testing. Default Global.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_PORT_C_DATA Reads and writes a 4-bit value to Port C on the Aux I/O connector. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_PORT_C_LOGIC Reads and writes the logic mode of Port C on the AUX IO. Default Negative.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_PORT_C_MODE Sets Port C to read or write mode. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_AUX_SWEEPEND_MODE Specifies the event that will cause the Sweep End line pin 11) to go to a low (false) state of the Material Handler IO. Default Sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_EXTERNAL_TESTSET_RAW_DATA Reads and writes 16 bits of data through the AD0 through AD12 and three timing lines of the external test set connector.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_INTERFACE_ENABLED Recalls an Interface Control configuration file. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_INDEX_LINE_LOGIC Sets the logic of the index line. Default Positive. Default Negative.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_INDEX_SIGNAL_ENABLED Determines the control of Material Handler connector Pin 20. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_LOGIC Sets the logic of the Data ports A-H on the Handler connector. Default Negative.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_PASS_FAIL_LATCH_MODE_ENABLED Enable the compatible mode with the E5071C for pass/fail status. Default Off(0).
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_PASS_FAIL_LOGIC Sets the logic of the PassFail line of the Material Handler IO (pin 33). Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_PASS_FAIL_MODE Sets and reads the default logical pass/fail state. Default NoWait.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_PASS_FAIL_POLICY Sets the policy used to determine how global pass/fail is computed. Default AllTests.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_PASS_FAIL_SCOPE Sets and reads the scope of pass/fail testing. Default Global.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_PORT_C_MODE Sets and reads the direction of data flow for Port C. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_PORT_D_MODE Sets and reads the direction of data flow for Port D. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_READY_FOR_TRIGGER_SIGNAL_ENABLED Determines the control of Material Handler connector Pin 21. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_MATERIAL_HANDLER_SWEEPEND_MODE Specifies the event that will cause the Handler Sweep End line to strobe. Default Global.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_NOISE_SOURCE_ENABLED Set and read the noise source (28V) ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_READY_FOR_TRIGGER_ENABLED Turns ON / OFF Ready for Trigger output from Backplane Trigger Lines. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_TRIGGER_OUT_ENABLED Turns ON / OFF the trigger output from PXI Backplane line. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_TRIGGER_OUT_READY_LINE Specifies the Backplane Trigger Line to use for the trigger output line. Default Trig2.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_LINE Specifies the Backplane Trigger Line to use for the trigger OUT ready line. Default Trig1.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_READY_FOR_TRIGGER_ENABLED Turns ON / OFF Ready for Trigger output from Streamline Rear SMB. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_TRIGGER_OUT_ENABLED Turns ON / OFF the trigger output from Streamline Rear SMB.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_TRIGGER_OUT_READY_LINE Specifies the Backplane Trigger Line to use for the trigger OUT ready line.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_LINE Specifies the Streamline Rear SMB to use for the trigger output line. Default Trig2.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_TRIGGER_ATBA_ENABLED Determines what happens to an EDGE trigger signal if it occurs before the VNA is ready to be triggered. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_CONTROL_SIGNAL_TRIGGER_OUT_ENABLED The VNA can be enabled to send trigger signals out the rear-panel TRIGGER OUT BNC connector. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_ACTIVE_TRACE_ISOLATION_ENABLED Maximizes (isolates) or restores the active trace in the active window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_COLOR_NO Choose from 1 (Display colors) or 2 (print colors).
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_COLOR_TRACE_PEN_NO Relative trace number in the window for which colors are set.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_ENABLED Specifies whether to disable or enable all analyzer display information in all windows in the analyzer application.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_ERROR_MESSAGE_ENABLED Enables and disables error pop-up messages on the display.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_FREQUENCY_ANNOTATION_ENABLED Turns frequency information on the display title bar ON or OFF for all windows.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_PASS_FAIL_DIALOG_ENABLED Shows or hides the window which displays global pass/fail results.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_SHEET_ENABLED Sets the sheet visible and invisible. Default Off except for Sheet 1.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_SHEET_NO Sheet Number.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_SHEET_TITLE This command sets or gets the sheet label. Default "Sheet 1".
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_SPIN_RESOLUTION Sets and returns the resolution of the front panel knob when it is used to adjust Source Power manually.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_STATUS_BAR_ENABLED Turns the status bar at the bottom of the screen ON or OFF. The status bar displays information for the active window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_ACTIVE_ENTRY_ENABLED Specifies whether to show or hide the active entry toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_CALSET_ENABLED Show or hide the calset toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_MARKER_ENABLED Specifies whether to show or hide the marker toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_PORT_EXTENSIONS_ENABLED Specifies whether to show or hide the port extensions toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_TIME_DOMAIN_ENABLED Specifies whether to show or hide the Time Domain toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_VIRTUAL_KEYS_ENABLED Specifies whether to show or hide the virtual hardkeys on the VNA display.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_UPDATES_ENABLED Enables or disables display updates.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_VNA_APP_ENABLED Makes the VNA application visible or not visible.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ACTIVE_WINDOW Sets or gets the active window number. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ENABLED Specifies whether to disable or enable all analyzer display information in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_LIMIT_LINE_X_POSITION Sets and returns the X-axis position of the Limit Line Pass/Fail indicator on the VNA screen. The lower-left corner of the Pass/Fail indicator is the point of reference for positioning.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_LIMIT_LINE_Y_POSITION Sets and returns the Y-axis position of the Limit Line Pass/Fail indicator on the VNA screen. The lower-left corner of the Pass/Fail indicator is the point of reference for positioning.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_COUPLING_ENABLED Sets the marker readouts to coupled (one combination annotation) or not coupled (one annotation per trace). This setting is per Window scope.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_ENABLED Specifies whether to show or hide the Marker readout (when markers are ON) on the selected window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_MARKER_SYMBOL_ABOVE_TRACE Specifies whether or not to force marker symbols to be displayed above the trace.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_NUMBER_PER_TRACE Sets the number of marker readouts to display per trace. Display up to 20 marker readouts per window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_SCOPE Shows the marker readouts only for active trace or for all traces. This setting is per Window scope.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_SYMBOL_FOR_MARKER Sets the symbol to display for marker position.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_TEXT_SIZE Specifies the size of the marker readout text.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_X_POSITION Sets the X-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are right-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_X_RESOLUTION For the X-axis (stimulus), sets the number digits to display after the decimal point in marker readouts.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_Y_POSITION Sets the Y-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are top-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_MARKER_READOUT_Y_RESOLUTION For the Y-axis (response), sets the number digits to display after the decimal point in marker readouts.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_NUMBER_OF_Y_DIVISIONS Sets or returns the number of divisions in all the graphs, for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_SIZE Sets or returns the window setting of Maximized or Normal.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TABLE Shows the specified table at the bottom of the analyzer screen or Reads to determine what table is visible.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TITLE_ENABLED Turns display of the title string ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TITLE_STRING Sets data in the window title area.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_ANNOTATION_ENABLED Specifies whether to show or hide the Trace Status buttons on the left of the display.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_ENABLED Turns the display of the specified trace in the specified window ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_GRID_LINE_TYPE Sets and returns the grid line type (solid | dotted) for all open windows.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_MEMORY_TRACE_ENABLED Turns the memory trace ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_METHOD_OF_SCALE_COUPLING Sets and returns the method of scale coupling.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_SCALE_COUPLING_ENABLED Enables and disables scale coupling for the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_TITLE_ENABLED Turns display of the Trace Title ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_TITLE_STRING Writes and read data to the trace title area.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_PER_DIVISION_VALUE Sets the Y axis Per Division value of the specified trace in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_REFERENCE_LEVEL Sets the Y axis Reference Level of the specified trace in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_REFERENCE_POSITION Sets the Reference Position of the specified trace in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_DISPLAY_WINDOW_Y_SCALE_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the Y-axis scale label in display window.
KTNA_ATTR_DRIVER_SETUP The driver setup string. It is either specified in the Configuration Store or passed in the OptionString parameter of the Initialize function. Driver setup is empty if the driver is not initialized.
KTNA_ATTR_ECALMODULE_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_GROUP_CAPABILITIES A comma-separated list of the class capability groups implemented by the driver. Capability group names are documented in the IVI class specifications. If the driver is not class compliant, the driver returns an empty string.
KTNA_ATTR_INSTRUMENT_FIRMWARE_REVISION The firmware revision reported by the physical instrument. If Simulation is enabled or the instrument is not capable of reporting the firmware revision, a string is returned that explains the condition.
KTNA_ATTR_INSTRUMENT_MANUFACTURER The name of the manufacturer reported by the physical instrument. If Simulation is enabled or the instrument is not capable of reporting the name of the manufacturer, a string is returned that explains the condition. Manufacturer is limited to 256 bytes
KTNA_ATTR_INSTRUMENT_MODEL The model number or name reported by the physical instrument. If Simulation is enabled or the instrument is not capable of reporting the model number or name, a string is returned that explains the condition. Model is limited to 256 bytes
KTNA_ATTR_INTERCHANGE_CHECK If True, the driver maintains a record of interchangeability warnings. If the driver does not support interchangeability checking, attempts to set InterchangeCheck to True return an error.
KTNA_ATTR_IO_RESOURCE_DESCRIPTOR The resource descriptor specifies the connection to a physical device. It is either specified in the Configuration Store or passed in the ResourceName parameter of the Initialize function. It is empty if the driver is not initialized.
KTNA_ATTR_LOGICAL_NAME Logical Name identifies a driver session in the Configuration Store. If Logical Name is not empty, the driver was initialized from information in the driver session. If it is empty, the driver was initialized without using the Configuration Store.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_BW_LIMIT_DISPLAY_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the bandwidth value display of the bandwidth test, for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_BW_LIMIT_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the bandwidth test function, for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_BW_LIMIT_MAXIMUM Sets/gets the upper limit value of the bandwidth test, for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_BW_LIMIT_MINIMUM Sets or returns the lower limit value of the bandwidth test, for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_BW_LIMIT_THRESHOLD Sets bandwidth threshold value (attenuation from the peak) of the bandwidth test.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CONVERSION_FUNCTION Sets or gets the parameter after conversion using the parameter conversion function, for the active trace of selected channel. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CORRECTION_CALIBRATION_TYPE Sets the Cal Type for the selected measurement on the specified channel. This is used when a Cal Set is applied.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CORRECTION_ELECTRICAL_DELAY_DISTANCE Sets the electrical delay in physical length (distance) for the selected measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CORRECTION_ELECTRICAL_DELAY_MEDIUM Sets the media used when calculating the electrical delay.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CORRECTION_ELECTRICAL_DELAY_TIME Sets the electrical delay in seconds for the selected measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CORRECTION_ELECTRICAL_DELAY_UNIT Sets and returns the units for specifying electrical delay in physical length (distance).
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CORRECTION_ELECTRICAL_DELAY_WAVEG_CUTOFF_FREQ Sets the waveguide cutoff frequency used when the electrical delay media is set to Waveguide.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_CORRECTION_ENABLED Turns error correction ON or OFF for the selected measurement on the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_DISPLAY_FORMAT Sets the display format for the measurement. Default Log.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_DISTORTION_BACK_OFF_COMPRESSION Sets the compression level used in determining the back off calculation. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_DISTORTION_BACK_OFF_ENABLED Enables/disables compression level back off function specified
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_DISTORTION_MODE Displays phase or amplitude distortion. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_DISTORTION_SLOPE_APERTURE Sets the aperture value over which the phase or gain slope will be calculated. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_DISTORTION_SLOPE_ENABLED Enables/disables phase slope (AMPM) or gain slope (AMAM) over the slope aperture to be displayed.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_EQUATION_EDITOR_ENABLED Turns ON and OFF the equation on selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_EQUATION_EDITOR_TEXT Specifies an equation or expression to be used on the selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_EQUATION_ENABLED Turns ON and OFF the equation on selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_EQUATION_TEXT Specifies an equation or expression to be used on the selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_EQUATION_TRACE_UPDATE_DELAY_ENABLED Set and return equation editor trace update delay.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_FREQUENCY_REFERENCE Set and read the frequency reference for delta frequency in VCO Characteristic measurement. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_GAIN_COMPRESSION_ANALYSIS_ENABLED Enables and disables a compression analysis trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_GAIN_COMPRESSION_CW_FREQUENCY Set and return the CW frequency for a compression analysis trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_GAIN_COMPRESSION_DISCRETE_POINTS_ENABLED Sets and returns whether the CW frequency for the compression analysis trace can be set to only the discrete frequencies or provides interpolation.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_GAIN_COMPRESSION_X_DATA_TYPE Sets and returns the type of data to display on the x-axis of a compression analysis trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_GROUP_DELAY_APERTURE_FREQUENCY_RANGE Sets or returns group delay aperture using a fixed frequency range (in Hz).
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_GROUP_DELAY_APERTURE_FREQUENCY_SPAN Sets or returns the group delay aperture using a percent of the channel frequency span.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_GROUP_DELAY_APERTURE_NUMBER_OF_POINTS Sets or returns group delay aperture using a fixed number of data points.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_HOLD_TYPE Sets the type of trace hold to perform.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LEAST_SQUARES_DEVIATION Calculates the deviation from a least-squares best fit line.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_DISPLAY_ENABLED Turns the display of limit segments ON or OFF (if the data trace is turned ON).
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_ENABLED Turns limit segment testing ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_SEGMENT_NO Segment number, if unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_SEGMENT_TYPE Sets the type of limit segment. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_SEGMENT_X_START Sets the start (beginning) of the X-axis stimulus value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_SEGMENT_X_STOP Sets the stop (end) of the X-axis stimulus value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_SEGMENT_Y_START Sets the start (beginning) of the Y-axis amplitude (response) value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_SEGMENT_Y_STOP Sets the stop (end) of the Y-axis amplitude (response) value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LIMIT_TESTING_FAIL_SOUND_ENABLED Turns limit testing fail sound ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LINEAR_REGRESSION_LINE_A_VAL Sets and Returns Linear Regression A parameter value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LINEAR_REGRESSION_LINE_B_VALUE Sets and Returns Linear Regression B parameter value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LINEAR_REGRESSION_RANGE Sets and Returns Linear Regression Range start value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LINEAR_REGRESSION_RANGE_START Sets and Returns Linear Regression Range start value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_LINEAR_REGRESSION_RANGE_STOP Sets and Returns Linear Regression Range stop value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_ACTIVE_MARKER Sets and reads the active marker. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_BUCKET_NO Sets and reads the data point (bucket) number of the trace on which the marker resides.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_COUPLING_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of Coupled Markers (ON and OFF).
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_COUPLING_METHOD Sets and reads the scope of Coupled Markers.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_DELTA_ENABLED Specifies whether marker is relative to the Reference marker or absolute.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_DISPLAY_DISCRETE_DATA_ENABLED Makes the specified marker display either a calculated value between data points (interpolated data) or the actual data points (discrete data).
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_DISTANCE_MODE Specifies the measurement type in order to determine the correct marker distance.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_DISTANCE_UNIT Specifies the unit of measure for the display of marker distance values.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_DISTANCE_VALUE Set or query marker distance on a time domain trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_FORMAT
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_READOUT_POSITION_X Sets or returns the X-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are right-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_READOUT_POSITION_Y Sets or returns the Y-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are top-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_REFERENCE_MODE_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the reference marker mode, for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_DENSITY_ACPR_ENABLED Sets and reads the ACPR density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_DENSITY_BANDWIDTH Sets and reads the bandwidth of the band density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_DENSITY_FREQUENCY_SPAN Sets and reads the frequency span used by Power Density to normalize the power.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_DENSITY_NOISE_MARKER_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of the band density noise marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_DENSITY_NPR_ENABLED Sets and reads the NPR density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_DENSITY_POWER_DENSITY_MARKER_BW Sets and reads the bandwidth of the band power density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_DENSITY_TONE_DENSITY_MARKER_BW Sets and reads the state of the band tone density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_POWER_DENSITY_MARKER_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of the band power density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_POWER_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of the band power marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_POWER_FREQUENCY_SPAN Sets and reads the frequency span of the band power marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_BAND_TONE_DENSITY_MARKER_ENABLED Sets and reads the bandwidth of the band tone density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_FUNCTION_TYPE Set and read the SA marker function type.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_INTEGRATION_BANDWIDTH Sets and reads the integration bandwidth marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_OCCUPIED_BW_ENABLED Sets and returns the percentage of the band power to search for.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SA_OCCUPIED_BW_PERCENTAGE_OF_BAND_POWER Sets and returns the percentage of the band power to search for.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_COMPRESSION_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the compression state.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_COMPRESSION_LEVEL Sets and read the marker compression level.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_FUNCTION Sets or returns the search function that the specified marker will perform when executed.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_MULTI_SEARCH_FUNCTION Sets or returns the search type of the multi search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_MULTI_SEARCH_PEAK_EXCURSION Sets or returns the lower limit of peak excursion value of multi peak search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_MULTI_SEARCH_PEAK_POLARITY Sets or returns the peak polarity of the multi peak search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_MULTI_SEARCH_PEAK_THRESHOLD Sets or returns peak threshold for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_MULTI_SEARCH_TARGET_TRANSITION Sets or returns the transition type of the multi target search.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_MULTI_SEARCH_TARGET_VALUE Sets or returns the target value for the specified marker when doing Multi Target Search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_MULTI_SEARCH_TRACKING_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the search tracking capability (function to repeat search for each sweep) of the multi search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PEAK_EXCURSION Sets or returns amplitude peak excursion for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PEAK_POLARITY Sets or returns polarity of the peak search with marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PEAK_THRESHOLD Sets or returns the peak threshold for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PNOP_BACK_OFF Turns on and sets markers 1, 2, 3, and 4 to calculate various PNOP parameters.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PNOP_ENABLED Turns the PNOP marker search ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PNOP_OFFSET Turns on and sets markers 1, 2, 3, and 4 to calculate various PNOP parameters.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PSAT_BACK_OFF Turns on and sets markers 1, 2, and 3 to calculate various Power Saturation parameters.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_PSAT_ENABLED Turns the PSAT marker search ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_RANGE_START Sets or returns the start of the span that the specified marker's x-axis span will be constrained to.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_RANGE_STOP Sets or returns the stop of the span that the marker's x-axis travel will be constrained to.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_TARGET_TRANSITION Selects the transition type of the target search for specified marker (marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16)) of the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_TARGET_VALUE Sets or returns the target value for the specified marker when doing Target Searches
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_TRACKING_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the tracking search capability for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_SEARCH_USER_RANGE Assigns the specified marker to a range number.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_X_POSITION Set or get the marker's X-axis value (frequency, power, or time).
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MARKER_X_REFERENCE_POSITION Sets and returns the absolute x-axis value of the reference marker.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_MIXER_X_PARAM Sets or returns the swept parameter to display on the X-axis for the selected FCA and GCX measurement. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PHASE_REFERENCE_AUTO_ENABLED Enable and disable the auto phase reference frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PHASE_REFERENCE_FREQUENCY Set and read the "Set Frequency to" setting in the phase reference frequency. Default 1E9.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PHASE_REFERENCE_X_POSITION Set and read the "Measure frequency at" setting in the phase reference frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PHASE_REFERENCE_X_SPAN Set and read the "Using Span of" setting in the phase reference frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PHASE_REFERENCE_ZERO_X_POSITION Set and read the "Phase to Zero at" setting in the phase zero position. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PHASE_REFERENCE_ZERO_X_SPAN Set and read the "Using Span of" setting in the phase zero position. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_INTEGRATION_RANGE_NO Sets and Gets the range number for selected Integration. Choose either equal to or greater than 1.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_INTEGRATION_RANGE_START_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the start frequency for selected Integration. Default Minimum frequency of Analyzer.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_INTEGRATION_RANGE_STOP_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the stop frequency for selected Integration. Default Maximum frequency of Analyzer.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_INTEGRATION_RANGE_WEIGHTING_FILTER Sets and returns the weighting filter of the selected integration range. Provide Weighting filter file name which contains the weighting data.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_QUICK_TRACE_ENABLED Enables or Disables quick trace function for the phase noise measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPOT_NOISE_DECADE_ENABLED Enables and disables the spot noise calculation on every decade offset frequency. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPOT_NOISE_ENABLED Enables and disables spot noise calculation for the selected measurement number. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPURIOUS_ANALYSIS_ENABLED Enables and disables spurious analysis. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPURIOUS_MINIMUM_THRESHOLD Sets and returns the minimum spurious threshold level. Default -500.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPURIOUS_OMISSION_ENABLED Enables and disables spur omission. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPURIOUS_SENSIBILITY Sets and returns the spurious sensibility number.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPURIOUS_TABLE_SORTING_ORDER Sets and returns the spurious table sorting order. Default Power.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_PN_SPURIOUS_USER_OMISSION_ENABLED Enables and disables user specified spur omission. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_RIPPLE_LIMIT_BAND Sets or gets the ripple limit band.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_RIPPLE_LIMIT_DISPLAY_TYPE Sets/gets the display type of ripple value.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_RIPPLE_LIMIT_ENABLED Turns ON/OFF the ripple test function.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_RIPPLE_LIMIT_LINE_DISPLAY_ENABLED Turns ON/OFF the ripple limit line display.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_SENSITIVITY_APERTURE Set and read the sensitivity aperture for Freq/V in VCO Characteristic measurement. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_COUPLING_ENABLED Turns ON and OFF Time Domain Trace Coupling. All of the measurements in the specified channel are coupled.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_CENTER Sets or returns the gate filter center time in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_ENABLED Turns gating state ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_FILTER_SHAPE Sets or returns the gating filter shape when in time domain.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_FILTER_TYPE Sets or returns the type of gate filter used.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_PARAMETERS_TO_COUPLE Specifies the time domain gating parameters to be coupled. The settings for those parameters will be copied from the selected measurement to all other measurements on the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_SPAN Sets or returns the gate filter span time in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_START Sets or returns the gate filter start time in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_GATING_STOP Sets or returns the gate filter stop time in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_ALIGNMENT Sets the way the PNA computes the DC value of the frequency-domain measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_CENTER Sets or returns the center time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_ENABLED Turns the time domain transform capability ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_KAISER_BESSEL_WIDTH Sets the parametric window width for Kaiser Bessel window in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_MODE Sets the type of time domain measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_PARAMETERS_TO_COUPLE Specifies the time domain transform parameters to be coupled. The settings for those parameters will be copied from the selected measurement to all other measurements on the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_SPAN Sets or returns the span time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_START Sets or returns the start time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_START_STOP_ENABLED Turns the start/stop time limits ON or OFF. When ON, limits the start/stop times to avoid aliasing.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_STOP Sets or returns the stop time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_WINDOW_IMPULSE_WIDTH Sets the impulse width for the transform window in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_WINDOW_STEP_RISE_TIME Sets the step rise time (in seconds) for the transform window.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TIME_DOMAIN_TRANSFORM_WINDOW_TYPE Sets the window type for time domain transform.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_DISPLAY_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the display of a trace associated with the specified measurement. When OFF, the measurement behind the trace is still active.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_DISPLAY_TITLE_ENABLED Turns ON or OFF the measurement title.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_MAGNITUDE_OFFSET Offsets the data trace magnitude by the specified value. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_MATH_INTERPOLATION_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of the memory data interpolation.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_MATH_OPERATION Sets or returns math operations on the currently selected measurement and the trace stored in memory.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_MEMORY_TRACE_ENABLED Turns the memory trace ON or OFF for the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_PHASE_OFFSET Sets the phase offset for the selected measurement. Default 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_SLOPE_OFFSET Offsets the data trace magnitude to a value that changes linearly with frequency. The offset slope begins at 0 Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_SMOOTHING_APERTURE Sets or returns the amount of smoothing as a percentage of the number of data points in the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_SMOOTHING_ENABLED Turns data smoothing ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_SMOOTHING_NO_OF_DATA_POINTS Sets or returns the number of adjacent data points to average.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_STATISTICS_DISPLAY_ENABLED Displays and hides the trace statistics (peak-to-peak, mean, standard deviation) on the screen.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_STATISTICS_RANGE Sets or returns the range used to calculate trace statistics. Each channel has 16 user ranges.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_TITLE_STRING Sets or gets the title for the specified measurement. The trace title is embedded in the trace status field.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_Y_PER_DIVISION_VALUE Sets or returns the Y axis Scale Per Division value of the specified trace associated with the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_Y_REFERENCE_LEVEL Sets or returns the Y axis Reference Level of the specified trace associated with the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_MEASUREMENT_TRACE_Y_REFERENCE_POSITION Sets or returns the Reference Position of the specified trace associated with the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_QUERY_INSTRUMENT_STATUS If True, the driver queries the instrument status at the end of each method or property that performs I/O to the instrument. If an error is reported, use ErrorQuery to retrieve error messages one at a time from the instrument.
KTNA_ATTR_RANGE_CHECK Drivers may choose to always validate some property/parameter values, never validate others, and optionally validate others, to avoid sending invalid commands to the instrument. If True, the driver performs optional validations.
KTNA_ATTR_RECORD_COERCIONS If True, the driver keeps a list of the value coercions it makes for ViInt32 and ViReal64 attributes. If the driver does not support coercion recording, attempts to set RecordCoercions to True will return an error.
KTNA_ATTR_SIMULATE If True, the driver does not perform I/O to the instrument, and returns simulated values for output parameters.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE Sets and reads the frequency range number to which the specified source port will be set. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_MATCH_CORR_ENABLED Sets and reads the Match Correction ON/OFF state.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_MATCH_CORR_RANGE Sets and reads the existing frequency ranges over which Match Correction is to be performed.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_MATCH_CORR_REF_RECEIVER Sets and reads the reference receiver to be used to perform Match Correction.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_MATCH_CORR_TEST_PORT_RECEIVER Sets and reads the test port receiver to be used to perform Match Correction.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_PHASE_CONTROL_STATE Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of phase control.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_PHASE_PARAMETER Sets and reads the receivers to be used to measure the phase of the sources.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_PHASE_REFERENCE Sets and reads the port to be used as a reference when controlling phase for the specified port.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_PHASE_START Sets and reads the start value for a phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_PHASE_STOP Sets and reads the stop value for a phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_PHASE_SWEEP_ENABLED Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_POWER_ALC_MODE Sets and reads the leveling mode to be used for the specified source port.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_POWER_ATTENUATION Sets and reads the amount of source attenuation.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_POWER_ATTENUATION_AUTO_ENABLED Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of auto range source attenuation.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_POWER_START Sets and reads the start value of a power sweep in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_POWER_STOP Sets and reads the stop value of a power sweep in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_POWER_SWEEP_ENABLED Sets and reads the state of sweeping power.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_DIQ_SOURCE_STATE Sets and reads the ON / OFF state of the source specified by port.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_FIXED_FREQUENCY Set and read the fixed frequency value for a specific port. Default 1GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_SOURCE_FREQ_ENABLED Set and read the source frequency domain's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_ORDER Set and read the source frequency domain's order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_SOURCE_PHASE_ENABLED Set and read the source phase domain's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_SOURCE_PHASE_ORDER Set and read the source phase domain's order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_SOURCE_POWER_ENABLED Set and read the source power domain's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_SOURCE_POWER_ORDER Set and read the source power domain's order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_START_FREQUENCY Set and read the start frequency value for a specific port. Default Minimum frequency of PNA.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_MULTI_DIMENSIONAL_SWEEP_STOP_FREQUENCY Set and read the stop frequency value for a specific port. Default Maximum frequency of PNA.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_CORRECTION_ENABLED Write and read whether to use the phase correction offset array. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_COUPLING_ENABLED Write and read whether to couple phase control settings (IFBW, Tolerance, Max Iterations). DEfault 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_FIXED_VALUE Write and read the fixed phase value. Deafult 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_INTERNAL_PORT Sets and returns the internal port that the external port is routed through. Default 3.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_MAX_ITERATIONS Write and read the maximum number of background phase sweeps to perform. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_MODE Sets and returns the Phase Control mode. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_PARAMETER Write and read the ratioed receivers (parameter) to use for phase control. Default "a1/b1".
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_POWER_OFFSET_CORRECTION_ENABLED Write and read whether to use the ratio amplitude offset array. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_POWER_OFFSET_FIXED_VALUE Write and read the fixed power ratioed value. Default 0 dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_POWER_OFFSET_START Write and read the start power ratioed value. Default 0dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_POWER_OFFSET_STOP Write and read the stop power ratioed value. Deafult 0 dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_REFERENCE_PORT Sets and returns the reference port for the Phase Control measurement. Default 3.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_SWEEP_START Write and read the start value of phase sweep. Default 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_SWEEP_STOP Write and read the stop value of phase sweep. Default 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_PHASE_CONTROL_TOLERANCE Write and read the tolerance value to be used for background phase sweeps. Default 1 Degree.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_MODE Sets and returns the ALC mode for the specified channel and port. Default Internal.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the frequency range to use for receiver leveling. Default Auto.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_IFBW Sets and returns the IFBW to be used for leveling sweeps. Default 100 kHz.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_IFBW_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of a separate IFBW setting for leveling sweeps. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_LEVELING Sets all ports to pre-sweep or point leveling mode for the specified channel. Default PreSweep.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_LEVELING_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of Receiver Leveling for the specified source port. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_LSPC_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of Use Last Result for Source Power Cal. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MAX_ITER_SEARCH_ENABLED Enables or disables the receiver leveling maximum iteration search function set. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MAX_ITERATIONS Sets and returns the maximum iterations to be used in order to achieve the tolerance setting. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_APERTURE_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of the receiver leveling aperture settings for the specified source for Modulation Distortion measurements. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_APERTURE_OFFSET Sets and returns the offset of the frequency aperture used to measure the signal power. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_APERTURE_SPAN Sets and returns the span of the frequency aperture used to measure the signal power. Default 10e6.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_NOISE_BANDWIDTH Sets and returns the receiver noise bandwidth value for the specified source for Modulation Distortion measurements. Default 1000.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_OFFSET Sets and returns the offset of the frequency aperture used to measure the signal power. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_REFERENCE Sets and returns the reference receiver to be used with Receiver Leveling.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_MODE_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of Safe Mode. Deafult 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_MODE_MAX_POWER Sets and returns the maximum power level for Safe Mode. Default 30 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_MODE_MIN_POWER Sets and returns the minimum power level for Safe Mode. Default -95 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_MODE_STEP_POWER Sets and returns the maximum step power level for Safe Mode. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_TOLERANCE Sets and returns the tolerance value for leveling sweeps. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ATTENUATION_AUTO_ENABLED Turns automatic attenuation control ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ATTENUATION_LEVEL Sets or returns the attenuation level for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ATTENUATION_LEVEL_FOR_RECEIVER_REF Sets the attenuation level in dB for the specified reference attenuator/port.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_ATTENUATION_LEVEL_FOR_RECEIVER_TEST Sets the attenuation level in dB for the specified test attenuator/port.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_ENABLED Enables Guided Power Cal and sets the source port to be calibrated.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_POWER_LEVEL Specifies the power level in dBm at which to perform a power calibration during a guided calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_CALKIT Specifies the calibration kit to be used when an adapter is necessary to connect the power sensor to the port during a guided calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_CONNECTOR_TYPE Specifies the connector type for a power sensor when a power calibration is part of the Guided Calibration process.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_ITEM_NUMBER Power sensor item number.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_MULTI_CALKIT Set and read the Cal Kit to be used when an adapter is necessary to connect the power sensor to the cal plane and you choose to remove its effects from the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_MULTI_CONNECTOR_TYPE Set and read the connector type of a power sensor to be used when an adapter is necessary to connect the power sensor to the cal plane and you choose to remove its effects from the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_MULTI_ENABLED Enables the use of multiple power sensors to calibrate the entire frequency span of the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_MULTI_NAME Set and read the name of the power sensor.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_MULTI_START_FREQUENCY Set and read the start frequency for the specified power sensor (port number).
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORR_GUIDED_SENSOR_MULTI_STOP_FREQUENCY Set and read the stop frequency for the specified power sensor (port number).
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_CAL_POWER_LEVEL_OFFSET Sets or returns a power level offset in dB from the VNA test port power.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_DISPLAY_ENABLED Enables and disables the display of power readings on the VNA screen. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_ENABLED Enables and disables source power correction for the specified port on the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_FREQUENCY_ENABLED Enables and disables frequency checking of source power cal acquisition sweeps.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_ITERATION_TOLERANCE This command describes the number of adjustments to make to the source power.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_MAX_ACQUISITION_COUNT Sets the maximum number of acquisitions that will be used to acquire one settled reading from the power meter.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_MAX_ITERATIONS This control the number of settled readings taken to produce a single power point during source power cal.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_TABLE_LOSS_TABLE_ENABLED Selects which table you want to write to or read from. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_TOLERANCE This command allows for settling of the power sensor READINGS.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_POWER_CORRECTION_WARNING_ENABLED Enables/disables the use of error messages during a source calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_CW_FREQUENCY Set and read the source CW frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_DC_SWEEP_ENABLED Set and read the ON/OFF state of the DC sources.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_DC_SWEEP_ORDER Set and read the DC sweep order.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_DC_SWEEP_POINT_COUNT Set and read the number of steps the source will make across the specified source DC range.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_POWER Set and read the source output power level.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_START_FREQUENCY Set and read the source start frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_START_POWER Set and read the source start power level in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_STOP_FREQUENCY Set and read the source stop frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_STOP_POWER Set and read the source stop power level in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_SWEEP_ORDER Set and read the sweep order.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_SWEEP_POINT_COUNT Set and read the number of steps the source will make across the specified source frequency range.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_SWEEP_POINT_COUNT_ALL Set and read the number of steps the source will make across the specified source power range.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_SWEEP_REPEAT_COUNT Set and read the number of SA (receiver) sweeps for each Source Step.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_SWEEP_REPEAT_COUNT_ALL Set and read the number of SA (receiver) sweeps for each Source Step.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCE_PORT_SA_SWEEP_TYPE Set and read the source sweep type. Default CW.
KTNA_ATTR_SOURCEPORT_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_SPECIFIC_DRIVER_CLASS_SPEC_MAJOR_VERSION Returns the major version number of the class specification in accordance with which the IVI specific driver was developed. Zero is returned if the driver is not compliant with a class specification.
KTNA_ATTR_SPECIFIC_DRIVER_CLASS_SPEC_MINOR_VERSION Returns the minor version number of the class specification in accordance with which the IVI specific driver was developed. Zero is returned if the driver is not compliant with a class specification.
KTNA_ATTR_SPECIFIC_DRIVER_DESCRIPTION Returns a brief description of the IVI specific driver. The string that this attribute returns contains a maximum of 256 bytes including the NUL byte.
KTNA_ATTR_SPECIFIC_DRIVER_PREFIX Returns the case-sensitive prefix of the user-callable functions that the IVI-C specific driver exports. The string that this attribute returns contains a maximum of 32 bytes including the NUL byte.
KTNA_ATTR_SPECIFIC_DRIVER_REVISION Returns version information about the IVI specific driver. The string that this attribute returns contains a maximum of 256 bytes including the NUL byte.
KTNA_ATTR_SPECIFIC_DRIVER_VENDOR Returns the name of the vendor that supplies the IVI specific driver. The string that this attribute returns contains a maximum of 256 bytes including the NUL byte.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FREQ_CENT_STEP_SIZE_AUTO_ENABLED Sets and reads how the center frequency step size is set. When TRUE, center steps by 5% of span. When FALSE, center steps by step size value.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FREQUENCY_CENTER Sets or returns the center frequency of the analyzer.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FREQUENCY_CENTER_STEP_SIZE Sets or returns the center frequency step size of the analyzer in Hz. This command sets the manual step size.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FREQUENCY_SPAN Sets or returns the frequency span of the analyzer in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FREQUENCY_START Sets or returns the start frequency of the analyzer in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FREQUENCY_STEP_SIZE Sets the frequency step size in Hz across the selected frequency range. This effectively sets the number of data points.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets or returns the stop frequency of the analyzer in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_CW_TIME_AUTO_ENABLED Sets and returns the state of automatic CW sweep time (used in Pulse Profile mode).
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_DELAY_AUTO_ENABLED In Narrowband pulse mode, choose to set the delay and width automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_DRIVE_MOD_SOURCE_AUTO_ENAB In Narrowband pulse mode, set the drive for the source modulation automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_IF_GAIN_AUTO_ENABLED In Narrowband pulse mode, set the IF Gain automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_MODE Sets and returns the pulse measurement state for the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_MODE_AUTO_ENABLED Set pulse mode automatically or manually (Narrowband or Wideband) for the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_PRF_AUTO_ENABLED In Narrowband pulse mode, choose to set the Pulse Repetition Frequency automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_CLOCK Sets and returns the Primary Clock setting and is controlled by the internal or external pulse generator which is the primary pulse clock.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the primary pulse measurement frequency. Default 1KHz.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_PERIOD Sets and returns the primary pulse period in seconds. Default 1 msec.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_WIDTH Sets and returns the primary pulse width in seconds. Default 100 microseconds.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_SHAPE Sets and returns the pulse shape type.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_SOFTWARE_GATING_ENABLED When set to OFF, the improved software gating sensitivity is turned OFF and all data outside the measurement band is zeroed.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_START_TIME Sets and returns the start time of the pulse in seconds. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_STOP_TIME Sets and returns the stop time of the pulse in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_STANDARD_STIMULUS_SWEEP_PULSE_WIDEBAND_MODE_ENABLED Set and read the pulse mode detection method.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_OPERATION_ENABLE_REGISTER Enable register (16 bit). Enable bits select whether an Event bit causes the register summary condition bit to become true in the StatusByte register.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_OPERATION_NEGATIVE_TRANSITION_FILTER Operation Negative Transition register (16 bit). If a bit is true, a negative transition of the corresponding OperationCondition bit causes the corresponding OperationEvent bit to become true.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_OPERATION_POSITIVE_TRANSITION_FILTER Operation Positive Transition register (16 bit). If a bit is true, a positive transition of the corresponding OperationCondition bit causes the corresponding OperationEvent bit to become true.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_QUESTIONABLE_ENABLE_REGISTER Enable register (16 bit). Enable bits select whether an Event bit causes the register summary condition bit to become true in the StatusByte register.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_QUESTIONABLE_NEGATIVE_TRANSITION_FILTER Questionable Negative Transition register (16 bit). If a bit is true, a negative transition of the corresponding QuestionableCondition bit causes the corresponding QuestionableEvent bit to become true.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_QUESTIONABLE_POSITIVE_TRANSITION_FILTER Questionable Positive Transition register (16 bit). If a bit is true, a positive transition of the corresponding QuestionableCondition bit causes the corresponding QuestionableEvent bit to become true.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_READY_FOR_TRIGGER_POLARITY Specifies the polarity of Ready for Trigger output.
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_SERVICE_REQUEST_ENABLE_REGISTER The ServiceRequestEnable register specifies the bits in the StatusByte register that can generate a service request (SRQ) setting the StatusByte RequestingService bit (bit 6, value 64).
KTNA_ATTR_STATUS_STANDARD_EVENT_ENABLE_REGISTER Enable register (8 bit). Enable bits select whether an Event bit causes the register summary condition bit to become true in the StatusByte register.
KTNA_ATTR_STEP_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_SUPPORTED_INSTRUMENT_MODELS A comma-separated list of instrument models that the IVI specific driver can control. The string does not include an abbreviation for the manufacturer if it is the same for all models.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_MARKER Sets and reads the active marker. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_MEAS_CLASS Sets and reads the active measurement class. Default Standard.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_PORT Sets or gets the active port number. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_WINDOW Sets or gets the active window number. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_CAPABILITIES_HARDWARE_POWER_RANGE_PORT Sets and reads the port number for power range data.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_CAPABILITIES_HARDWARE_POWER_RANGE_START_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the lower bound of the frequency range used for range based power min and max.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_CAPABILITIES_HARDWARE_POWER_RANGE_STOP_FREQUENCY Sets or returns the upper bound of the frequency range used for range based power min and max.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_CAPABILITIES_HARDWARE_POWER_RANGE_TYPE Sets and reads the type of power range data (specified or typical) to be returned. Default Specified.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_IO_TIMEOUT Gets or sets the I/O timeout. Value is in milliseconds.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_NOISE_SOURCE_ENABLED Sets and reads the noise source (28V) ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_POWER_ENABLED Turns RF power from the source ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_SERIAL_NUMBER The instrument serial number.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_TRACING_ENABLED If true, driver execution trace messages are written to the logging buffer. The level of detail is set by the Level property. The logging buffer is appended to a file when the Enabled property is set from true to false, or when the driver is closed if Enabled is true, or by the Flush() method.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_TRACING_FILE_NAME The name of the file to append the contents of the logging buffer to. Default is 'KtNA_LogOutput.txt' in the folder where the driver application is running. File is written by the Flush() method or when the driver is closed if logging Enabled is true.
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_TRACING_LEVEL The level of messages to write to the logging buffer if Tracing Enabled is true. Messages of the Level setting or higher are written. Low to high Level order is: Debug, Info, Warning, Error
KTNA_ATTR_SYSTEM_USER_PRESET_ENABLED 'Checks' and 'clears' the enable box on the User Preset dialog box. This only affects subsequent Presets from the front panel user interface.
KTNA_ATTR_TRACE_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_CONNECTOR_FOR_EXTERNAL_INPUT Specifies the connector to use for the external trigger input.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_CONNECTOR_FOR_OUTPUT_READY_LINE Specifies the connector to use for the trigger OUT ready line.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_DELAY Sets and reads the trigger delay in seconds for ALL channels (globally).
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_INITIATE_CONTINUOUS_ENABLED Specifies whether the VNA trigger source is set to Internal (continuous) or Manual.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_METHOD Specifies the type of EXTERNAL trigger input detection used to listen for signals on the Meas Trig IN connectors. Edge triggers are most commonly used.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_READY_MANUAL_ENABLED Sets the mode of Ready for Trigger output.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_SCOPE Specifies whether a trigger signal is sent to all channels or only the current channel.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_SLOPE Specifies the polarity expected by the external trigger input circuitry.
KTNA_ATTR_TRIGGER_SOURCE Sets the source of the sweep trigger signal.
KTNA_ATTR_WINDOW_COUNT The number of repeated capability instances.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_FIXTURE_B_LIMITED_STATE Selects whether the fixture is band limited or not.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_FIXTURE_C_DUT_STATE Selects whether to use DUT correction or not when the characterization fixture is not equal to the DUT measurement fixture.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_FIXTURE_C_LENGTH_STATE Selects Fixture Length A not equal to B correction.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_FIXTURE_C_MATCH_STATE Selects Fixture Match A not equal to B correction.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_FIXTURE_INPUTS Describes the fixture inputs (single ended or differential).
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_FIXTURE_MEASUREMENT Selects the number of fixtures to be characterized.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_SAVE_PORTS Assigns the ports for saved fixture data in several formats.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_SAVE_TYPE Sets the file type to save fixture data.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_STANDARD_ALL_OPEN Selects all OPEN standards.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_STANDARD_ALL_SHORT Selects all SHORT standards.
KTNA_ATTR_X_AFR_STANDARD_EDIT_IMPEDANCE_METHOD Sets the impedance method.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_CHANNEL_NO Channel number of the measurement. Choose any number between: 1 and 500. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_EQUATION_STATE Turns ON and OFF the equation on selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_EQUATION_TEXT Specifies an equation or expression to be used on the selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_DEVICE Selects the device type for the balanced measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_FIXTURE_OFFSET_PHASE Sets and reads the state of "Phase Offset - Offset as Fixture" with True Mode balanced measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_FIXTURE_OFFSET_POWER Sets and reads the state of "Power Offset - Offset as Fixture" with True Mode balanced measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_FIXTURE_PHASE Sets and reads the state of "Phase Sweep - Offset as Fixture" (labeling on GUI).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_PARAMETER_STATE Turns balanced transform ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_PHASE_SWEEP_PORT For a Balanced device type, specifies which balanced port the phase will be swept.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_PHASE_SWEEP_STATE Sets and reads the state of phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_BALUN_STIMULUS_MODE Sets the stimulus mode of the VNA source. Default SE.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_DRAFT_SECTION_CIRCUIT_ENABLE Turns all circuits ON or OFF for all ports.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_DRAFT_SECTION_EXTENSION_ENABLE Turns port extensions ON or OFF for all ports.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_DRAFT_SECTION_ZCONVERSION_ENABLE Turns all ZConversions ON or OFF (both SE and BAL).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_POWER_COMPENSATE_MODE Adjust the source power compensation for gain or loss. Default All.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_FSIMULATOR_STATE Turns all three fixturing functions (de-embedding, port matching, impedance conversion) ON or OFF for all ports on the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_BLIMIT_BWIDTH_THRESHOLD Sets bandwidth threshold value (attenuation from the peak) of the bandwidth test.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_BLIMIT_DISPLAY_MARKER_STATE Turns ON or OFF the bandwidth value display of the bandwidth test, for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_BLIMIT_MAXIMUM Sets/gets the upper limit value of the bandwidth test, for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_BLIMIT_MINIMUM Sets or returns the lower limit value of the bandwidth test, for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_BLIMIT_STATE Turns ON or OFF the bandwidth test function, for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_COMPUTATION_DEVIATION Calculates the deviation from a least-squares best fit line.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CONVERSION_FUNCTION Sets or gets the parameter after conversion using the parameter conversion function, for the active trace of selected channel. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CORRECTION_E_DELAY_DISTANCE Sets the electrical delay in physical length (distance) for the selected measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CORRECTION_E_DELAY_MEDIUM Sets the media used when calculating the electrical delay.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CORRECTION_E_DELAY_TIME Sets the electrical delay in seconds for the selected measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CORRECTION_E_DELAY_UNIT Sets and returns the units for specifying electrical delay in physical length (distance).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CORRECTION_E_DELAY_WG_CUTOFF Sets the waveguide cutoff frequency used when the electrical delay media is set to Waveguide.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CORRECTION_STATE Turns error correction ON or OFF for the selected measurement on the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_CORRECTION_TYPE Sets the Cal Type for the selected measurement on the specified channel. This is used when a Cal Set is applied.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_DISTORTION_BACKOFF_COMPRESSION Sets the compression level used in determining the back off calculation. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_DISTORTION_BACKOFF_STATE Enables/disables compression level back off function specified
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_DISTORTION_MODE Displays phase or amplitude distortion. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_DISTORTION_SLOPE_APERTURE Sets the aperture value over which the phase or gain slope will be calculated. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_DISTORTION_SLOPE_STATE Enables/disables phase slope (AMPM) or gain slope (AMAM) over the slope aperture to be displayed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_EQUATION_FAST Set and return equation editor trace update delay.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_EQUATION_STATE Turns ON and OFF the equation on selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_EQUATION_TEXT Specifies an equation or expression to be used on the selected measurement for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_COUPLE_PARAMETERS Specifies the time domain gating parameters to be coupled. The settings for those parameters will be copied from the selected measurement to all other measurements on the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_TIME_CENTER Sets or returns the gate filter center time in seconds.
