KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_TIME_SHAPE Sets or returns the gating filter shape when in time domain.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_TIME_SPAN Sets or returns the gate filter span time in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_TIME_START Sets or returns the gate filter start time in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_TIME_STATE Turns gating state ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_TIME_STOP Sets or returns the gate filter stop time in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FILTER_TIME_TYPE Sets or returns the type of gate filter used.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FORMAT Sets the display format for the measurement. Default Log.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FREQUENCY_REFERENCE Set and read the frequency reference for delta frequency in VCO Characteristic measurement. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FREQUENCY_SENSITIVITY_APERTURE Set and read the sensitivity aperture for Freq/V in VCO Characteristic measurement. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FUNCTION_DOMAIN_USER_RANGE Sets or returns the range used to calculate trace statistics. Each channel has 16 user ranges.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_FUNCTION_STATISTICS_STATE Displays and hides the trace statistics (peak-to-peak, mean, standard deviation) on the screen.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_G_DELAY_FREQUENCY Sets or returns group delay aperture using a fixed frequency range (in Hz).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_G_DELAY_PERCENT Sets or returns the group delay aperture using a percent of the channel frequency span.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_G_DELAY_POINTS Sets or returns group delay aperture using a fixed number of data points.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_GC_MEAS_ANALYSIS_CW_FREQUENCY Set and return the CW frequency for a compression analysis trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_GC_MEAS_ANALYSIS_DISCRETE_STATE Sets and returns whether the CW frequency for the compression analysis trace can be set to only the discrete frequencies or provides interpolation.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_GC_MEAS_ANALYSIS_ENABLE Enables and disables a compression analysis trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_GC_MEAS_ANALYSIS_XAXIS Sets and returns the type of data to display on the x-axis of a compression analysis trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_HOLD_TYPE Sets the type of trace hold to perform.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_DISPLAY_STATE Turns the display of limit segments ON or OFF (if the data trace is turned ON).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_SEGMENT_AMPLITUDE_START Sets the start (beginning) of the Y-axis amplitude (response) value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_SEGMENT_AMPLITUDE_STOP Sets the stop (end) of the Y-axis amplitude (response) value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_SEGMENT_NO Segment number, if unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_SEGMENT_STIMULUS_START Sets the start (beginning) of the X-axis stimulus value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_SEGMENT_STIMULUS_STOP Sets the stop (end) of the X-axis stimulus value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_SEGMENT_TYPE Sets the type of limit segment. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_SOUND_STATE Turns limit testing fail sound ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LIMIT_STATE Turns limit segment testing ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LREGRESSION_LINE_A Sets and Returns Linear Regression A parameter value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LREGRESSION_LINE_B Sets and Returns Linear Regression B parameter value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LREGRESSION_RANGE_START Sets and Returns Linear Regression Range start value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LREGRESSION_RANGE_STOP Sets and Returns Linear Regression Range stop value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_LREGRESSION_RANGE_TYPE Sets and Returns Linear Regression Range start value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_BUCKET Sets and reads the data point (bucket) number of the trace on which the marker resides.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_COUPLING_METHOD Sets and reads the scope of Coupled Markers.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_COUPLING_STATE Sets and reads the state of Coupled Markers (ON and OFF).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_DELTA Specifies whether marker is relative to the Reference marker or absolute.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_DISCRETE Makes the specified marker display either a calculated value between data points (interpolated data) or the actual data points (discrete data).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_DISTANCE Set or query marker distance on a time domain trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FORMAT
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_COMPRESSION_LEVEL Sets and read the marker compression level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_COMPRESSION_STATE Turns ON or OFF the compression state.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_DOMAIN_USER_RANGE Assigns the specified marker to a range number.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_DOMAIN_USER_START Sets or returns the start of the span that the specified marker's x-axis span will be constrained to.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_DOMAIN_USER_STOP Sets or returns the stop of the span that the marker's x-axis travel will be constrained to.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_MULTI_PEAK_EXCURSION Sets or returns the lower limit of peak excursion value of multi peak search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_MULTI_PEAK_POLARITY Sets or returns the peak polarity of the multi peak search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_MULTI_PEAK_THRESHOLD Sets or returns peak threshold for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_MULTI_SELECT Sets or returns the search type of the multi search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_MULTI_TARGET_TRAN Sets or returns the transition type of the multi target search.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_MULTI_TARGET_VALUE Sets or returns the target value for the specified marker when doing Multi Target Search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_MULTI_TRACKING Turns ON or OFF the search tracking capability (function to repeat search for each sweep) of the multi search, for the selected channel and selected trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_PEAK_EXCURSION Sets or returns amplitude peak excursion for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_PEAK_POLARITY Sets or returns polarity of the peak search with marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16), for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_PEAK_THRESHOLD Sets or returns the peak threshold for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_SELECT Sets or returns the search function that the specified marker will perform when executed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_TARGET_TRANSITION Selects the transition type of the target search for specified marker (marker 1 to 15 and reference marker (Mkr:16)) of the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_TARGET_VALUE Sets or returns the target value for the specified marker when doing Target Searches
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_FUNCTION_TRACKING Turns ON or OFF the tracking search capability for the specified marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_NO Any marker number from 1 to 15. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_PNOP_BACKOFF Turns on and sets markers 1, 2, 3, and 4 to calculate various PNOP parameters.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_PNOP_POFFSET Turns on and sets markers 1, 2, 3, and 4 to calculate various PNOP parameters.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_PNOP_STATE Turns the PNOP marker search ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_PSATURATION_BACKOFF Turns on and sets markers 1, 2, and 3 to calculate various Power Saturation parameters.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_PSATURATION_STATE Turns the PSAT marker search ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_REFERENCE_STATE Turns ON or OFF the reference marker mode, for the active trace of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_REFERENCE_X Sets and returns the absolute x-axis value of the reference marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_STATE Turns ON or OFF the specified marker. Marker 16 is the Reference Marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MARKER_X Set or get the marker's X-axis value (frequency, power, or time).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MATH_FUNCTION Sets or returns math operations on the currently selected measurement and the trace stored in memory.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MATH_INTERPOLATE_STATE Sets and reads the state of the memory data interpolation.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MEASUREMENT_NO Measurement number for each measurement. Choose from 1 to 2000. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_MIXER_X_AXIS Sets or returns the swept parameter to display on the X-axis for the selected FCA and GCX measurement. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_OFFSET_MAGNITUDE Offsets the data trace magnitude by the specified value. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_OFFSET_MAGNITUDE_SLOPE Offsets the data trace magnitude to a value that changes linearly with frequency. The offset slope begins at 0 Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_OFFSET_PHASE Sets the phase offset for the selected measurement. Default 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PHASE_PREFERENCE_AUTO Enable and disable the auto phase reference frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PHASE_PREFERENCE_FREQUENCY Set and read the "Set Frequency to" setting in the phase reference frequency. Default 1E9.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PHASE_PREFERENCE_XPOSITION Set and read the "Measure frequency at" setting in the phase reference frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PHASE_PREFERENCE_XSPAN Set and read the "Using Span of" setting in the phase reference frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PHASE_XREFERENCE_XPOSITION Set and read the "Phase to Zero at" setting in the phase zero position. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PHASE_XREFERENCE_XSPAN Set and read the "Using Span of" setting in the phase zero position. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_INTEGRAL_RANGE_NO Sets and Gets the range number for selected Integration. Choose either equal to or greater than 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_INTEGRAL_RANGE_START Sets and returns the start frequency for selected Integration. Default Minimum frequency of Analyzer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_INTEGRAL_RANGE_STOP Sets and returns the stop frequency for selected Integration. Default Maximum frequency of Analyzer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_INTEGRAL_RANGE_WEIGHTING Sets and returns the weighting filter of the selected integration range. Provide Weighting filter file name which contains the weighting data.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_QTRACE Enables or Disables quick trace function for the phase noise measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SNOISE_DECADES_STATE Enables and disables the spot noise calculation on every decade offset frequency. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SNOISE_STATE Enables and disables spot noise calculation for the selected measurement number. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SPURIOUS_ANALYSIS Enables and disables spurious analysis. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SPURIOUS_OMISSION_STATE Enables and disables spur omission. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SPURIOUS_OSSPUR_STATE Enables and disables user specified spur omission. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SPURIOUS_SENSIBILITY Sets and returns the spurious sensibility number.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SPURIOUS_SORT Sets and returns the spurious table sorting order. Default Power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_PN_SPURIOUS_THRESHOLD_LEVEL_MINIMUM Sets and returns the minimum spurious threshold level. Default -500.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_RLIMIT_DISPLAY_LINE_STATE Turns ON/OFF the ripple limit line display.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_RLIMIT_DISPLAY_SELECT Sets or gets the ripple limit band.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_RLIMIT_DISPLAY_TYPE Sets/gets the display type of ripple value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_RLIMIT_STATE Turns ON/OFF the ripple test function.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BAND_FUNCTION Set and read the SA marker function type.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BAND_IBW Sets and reads the integration bandwidth marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_ACPR_STATE Sets and reads the ACPR density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_BW Sets and reads the bandwidth of the band density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_EQSPAN Sets and reads the frequency span used by Power Density to normalize the power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_NOISE_STATE Sets and reads the state of the band density noise marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_NPR_STATE Sets and reads the NPR density marker. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_POWER_BW Sets and reads the bandwidth of the band power density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_POWER_STATE Sets and reads the state of the band power density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_TONE_BW Sets and reads the state of the band tone density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BDENSITY_TONE_STATE Sets and reads the bandwidth of the band tone density marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BPOWER_SPAN Sets and reads the frequency span of the band power marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_BPOWER_STATE Sets and reads the state of the band power marker.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_NO Any marker number from 1 to 15. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_OCC_BAND_PERCENT Sets and returns the percentage of the band power to search for.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SA_MARKER_OCC_BAND_STATE Sets and returns the percentage of the band power to search for.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SMOOTHING_APERTURE Sets or returns the amount of smoothing as a percentage of the number of data points in the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SMOOTHING_POINTS Sets or returns the number of adjacent data points to average.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_SMOOTHING_STATE Turns data smoothing ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_COUPLE_PARAMETERS Specifies the time domain transform parameters to be coupled. The settings for those parameters will be copied from the selected measurement to all other measurements on the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_ALIGNMENT Sets the way the PNA computes the DC value of the frequency-domain measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_CENTER Sets or returns the center time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_CLIP Turns the start/stop time limits ON or OFF. When ON, limits the start/stop times to avoid aliasing.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_IMPULSE_WIDTH Sets the impulse width for the transform window in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_K_BESSEL Sets the parametric window width for Kaiser Bessel window in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_MARKER_MODE Specifies the measurement type in order to determine the correct marker distance.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_MARKER_UNIT Specifies the unit of measure for the display of marker distance values.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_SPAN Sets or returns the span time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_START Sets or returns the start time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_STATE Turns the time domain transform capability ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_STEP_R_TIME Sets the step rise time (in seconds) for the transform window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_STOP Sets or returns the stop time (in seconds) for time domain measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_TYPE Sets the type of time domain measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_MEASURE_TRANSFORM_TIME_WINDOW_TYPE Sets the window type for time domain transform.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CALCULATE_PARAMETER_COUNT Sets or gets the number of traces of selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_CDATA Reads and writes a 4-bit value to Port C on the Aux I/O connector. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_CLOGIC Reads and writes the logic mode of Port C on the AUX IO. Default Negative.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_CMODE Sets Port C to read or write mode. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_FOOTSWITCH_MODE This command sets the mode of the "FootSwitch In" line on the Auxiliary IO. Default Ignore.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_PASSFAIL_LOGIC Sets the logic of the PassFail line (pin 12) on the Material Handler IO (pin 33). Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_PASSFAIL_MODE Sets and reads the default logical pass/fail state. Default NoWait.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_PASSFAIL_POLICY Sets the policy used to determine how global pass/fail is computed. Default AllTests.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_PASSFAIL_SCOPE Sets and reads the scope of pass/fail testing. Default Global.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_AUXILIARY_SWEEPEND Specifies the event that will cause the Sweep End line pin 11) to go to a low (false) state of the Material Handler IO. Default Sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_CHANNEL_INTERFACE_CONTROL_STATE Recalls an Interface Control configuration file. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_EXTERNAL_TESTSET_RAWDATA Reads and writes 16 bits of data through the AD0 through AD12 and three timing lines of the external test set connector.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_CMODE Sets and reads the direction of data flow for Port C. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_DMODE Sets and reads the direction of data flow for Port D. Default Input.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_INDEX_LOGIC Sets the logic of the index line. Default Positive. Default Negative.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_INDEX_STATE Determines the control of Material Handler connector Pin 20. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_LOGIC Sets the logic of the Data ports A-H on the Handler connector. Default Negative.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_PASSFAIL_LATCH Enable the compatible mode with the E5071C for pass/fail status. Default Off(0).
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_PASSFAIL_LOGIC Sets the logic of the PassFail line of the Material Handler IO (pin 33). Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_PASSFAIL_MODE Sets and reads the default logical pass/fail state. Default NoWait.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_PASSFAIL_POLICY Sets the policy used to determine how global pass/fail is computed. Default AllTests.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_PASSFAIL_SCOPE Sets and reads the scope of pass/fail testing. Default Global.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_RTRIGGER_STATE Determines the control of Material Handler connector Pin 21. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_HANDLER_SWEEPEND Specifies the event that will cause the Handler Sweep End line to strobe. Default Global.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_NOISE_SOURCE_STATE Set and read the noise source (28V) ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_RTRIGGER_ROUTE Specifies the Backplane Trigger Line to use for the trigger output line. Default Trig2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_RTRIGGER_STATE Turns ON / OFF Ready for Trigger output from Backplane Trigger Lines. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_ROUTE Specifies the Backplane Trigger Line to use for the trigger OUT ready line. Default Trig1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_PXI_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_STATE Turns ON / OFF the trigger output from PXI Backplane line. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_RTRIGGER_ROUTE Specifies the Backplane Trigger Line to use for the trigger OUT ready line.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_RTRIGGER_STATE Turns ON / OFF Ready for Trigger output from Streamline Rear SMB. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_ROUTE Specifies the Streamline Rear SMB to use for the trigger output line. Default Trig2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_STREAMLINE_TRIGGER_OUTPUT_STATE Turns ON / OFF the trigger output from Streamline Rear SMB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_TRIGGER_ATBA Determines what happens to an EDGE trigger signal if it occurs before the VNA is ready to be triggered. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_CONTROL_SIGNAL_TRIGGER_OUTP The VNA can be enabled to send trigger signals out the rear-panel TRIGGER OUT BNC connector. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_ANNOTATION_FREQUENCY Turns frequency information on the display title bar ON or OFF for all windows.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_ANNOTATION_MESSAGE_STATE Enables and disables error pop-up messages on the display.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_ANNOTATION_STATUS Turns the status bar at the bottom of the screen ON or OFF. The status bar displays information for the active window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_COLOR_NO Choose from 1 (Display colors) or 2 (print colors).
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_COLOR_TRACE_PEN_NO Relative trace number in the window for which colors are set.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_ENABLE Specifies whether to disable or enable all analyzer display information in all windows in the analyzer application.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_F_SIGN Shows or hides the window which displays global pass/fail results.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_GUI_POWER_SPIN_RESOLUTION Sets and returns the resolution of the front panel knob when it is used to adjust Source Power manually.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_MEASUREMENT_NO Measurement number for each measurement. There must be a selected measurement on the trace. Choose from 1 to 2000. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_MEMORY_STATE Turns the memory trace ON or OFF for the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_STATE Turns ON or OFF the display of a trace associated with the specified measurement. When OFF, the measurement behind the trace is still active.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_TITLE_DATA Sets or gets the title for the specified measurement. The trace title is embedded in the trace status field.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_TITLE_STATE Turns ON or OFF the measurement title.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_Y_SCALE_P_DIVISION Sets or returns the Y axis Scale Per Division value of the specified trace associated with the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_Y_SCALE_R_LEVEL Sets or returns the Y axis Reference Level of the specified trace associated with the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_MEASURE_Y_SCALE_R_POSITION Sets or returns the Reference Position of the specified trace associated with the specified measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_SHEET_NO Sheet Number.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_SHEET_STATE Sets the sheet visible and invisible. Default Off except for Sheet 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_SHEET_TITLE_DATA This command sets or gets the sheet label. Default "Sheet 1".
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_TMAX Maximizes (isolates) or restores the active trace in the active window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_CSET_STATE Show or hide the calset toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_ENTRY_STATE Specifies whether to show or hide the active entry toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_EXTENSIONS_STATE Specifies whether to show or hide the port extensions toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_KEYS_STATE Specifies whether to show or hide the virtual hardkeys on the VNA display.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_MARKER_STATE Specifies whether to show or hide the marker toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_TOOLBAR_TRANSFORM_STATE Specifies whether to show or hide the Time Domain toolbar.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_UPDATE_STATE Enables or disables display updates.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_VISIBLE Makes the VNA application visible or not visible.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_LIMIT_X_POSITION Sets and returns the X-axis position of the Limit Line Pass/Fail indicator on the VNA screen. The lower-left corner of the Pass/Fail indicator is the point of reference for positioning.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_LIMIT_Y_POSITION Sets and returns the Y-axis position of the Limit Line Pass/Fail indicator on the VNA screen. The lower-left corner of the Pass/Fail indicator is the point of reference for positioning.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_COUPLE_STATE Sets the marker readouts to coupled (one combination annotation) or not coupled (one annotation per trace). This setting is per Window scope.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_MEASURE_X_POSITION Sets or returns the X-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are right-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_MEASURE_Y_POSITION Sets or returns the Y-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are top-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_NUMBER Sets the number of marker readouts to display per trace. Display up to 20 marker readouts per window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_RESOLUTION_RESPONSE For the Y-axis (response), sets the number digits to display after the decimal point in marker readouts.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_RESOLUTION_STIMULUS For the X-axis (stimulus), sets the number digits to display after the decimal point in marker readouts.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_SIZE Specifies the size of the marker readout text.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_STATE Specifies whether to show or hide the Marker readout (when markers are ON) on the selected window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_SYMBOL Sets the symbol to display for marker position.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_SYMBOL_ABOVE Specifies whether or not to force marker symbols to be displayed above the trace.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_VISIBLE Shows the marker readouts only for active trace or for all traces. This setting is per Window scope.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_X_POSITION Sets the X-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are right-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_MARKER_Y_POSITION Sets the Y-axis position of marker readouts. Readouts are top-justified at the specified position.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_TRACE_STATE Specifies whether to show or hide the Trace Status buttons on the left of the display.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ANNOTATION_Y_STATE Turns ON or OFF the Y-axis scale label in display window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_ENABLE Specifies whether to disable or enable all analyzer display information in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_NO Any existing window number. Choose from 1 to 160. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_SIZE Sets or returns the window setting of Maximized, Minimized, or Normal.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_STATE Create or delete a window on the screen.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TABLE Shows the specified table at the bottom of the analyzer screen or Reads to determine what table is visible.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TITLE_DATA Sets data in the window title area.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TITLE_STATE Turns display of the title string ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_GRATICULE_GRID_L_TYPE Sets and returns the grid line type (solid | dotted) for all open windows.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_MEMORY_STATE Turns the memory trace ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_NO Any existing trace number. Choose any number from 1 to 24. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_STATE Turns the display of the specified trace in the specified window ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_TITLE_DATA Sets data in the window title area.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_TITLE_STATE Turns display of the Trace Title ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_SCALE_COUPLE_METHOD Sets and returns the method of scale coupling.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_SCALE_COUPLE_STATE Enables and disables scale coupling for the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_SCALE_P_DIVISION Sets the Y axis Per Division value of the specified trace in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_SCALE_R_LEVEL Sets the Y axis Reference Level of the specified trace in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_TRACE_Y_SCALE_R_POSITION Sets the Reference Position of the specified trace in the specified window.
KTNA_ATTR_X_DISPLAY_WINDOW_Y_SCALE_DIVISIONS Sets or returns the number of divisions in all the graphs, for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_INITIATE_CONTINUOUS Specifies whether the VNA trigger source is set to Internal (continuous) or Manual.
KTNA_ATTR_X_OUTPUT_MANUAL_NOISE_STATE Sets and reads the noise source (28V) ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_OUTPUT_STATE Turns RF power from the source ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_DISPLAY_INTERPOLATE Sets whether or not interpolation is on for display. Default Off.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_SWEEP_PHASE_POINT Set and read the number of phase points. Default 8.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_SWEEP_POWER_START Set and read the start power level for a 3D sweep. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_SWEEP_POWER_STEP Set and read the number of power steps for a 3D sweep. Default 201.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_SWEEP_POWER_STOP Set and read the stop power level for a 3D sweep. 0dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_TTONE_ABSOLUTE Set and read the absolute tone power level. Default -5dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_TTONE_MODE Set and read the tuning tone mode. Default Absolute.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ACTIVE_TTONE_RELATIVE Set and read the tone power relative to the input power (dBc). Default -15dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_AVERAGE_COUNT Sets the number of measurements to combine for an average.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_AVERAGE_MODE Sets the type of averaging to perform.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_AVERAGE_STATE Turns trace averaging ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_BWIDTH_RESOLUTION Sets or returns the bandwidth (in Hz) of the digital IF filter to be used in the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_BWIDTH_TRACK_STATE Sets and returns the state of the Reduce IF BW at Low Frequencies feature.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CHANNEL_NO Channel number of the measurement. Choose any number between: 1 and 500. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CACHE_MODE Set this mode at ON for SNP file fast saving. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CCHECK_PARAMETER Specifies an existing measurement to be used for the Confidence Check.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CKIT_ECAL_CHARACTERIZE_CNUMBER Sets and reads the number to which the User Characterization will be stored in the ECal module. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CKIT_ECAL_CHARACTERIZE_DESCRIPTION_USER Sets and reads the description of the person and/or company who is producing the ECal user characterization. Default "Empty String".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CKIT_ECAL_CHARACTERIZE_DESCRIPTION_VNA Sets and reads a description of the Vector Network Analyzer used to perform the User Characterization. Default "Empty String".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CKIT_ECAL_CHARACTERIZE_ID Selects the model and serial number of the ECal module to be characterized. Default "Empty String".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CKIT_ECAL_CHARACTERIZE_INSITU_STATE Sets or returns whether the device (CalPod module) will be characterized as an in situ device.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CKIT_ECAL_MODULE_NO
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_CONNECTOR_FNAME Replaces the primary connector family name from the selected kit with a new connector family name.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_DESCRIPTION Modifies the cal kit description field of the selected kit.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_NAME Sets the label for the calibration class designated by class.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_CHARACTER Sets the media type of the selected calibration standard. Default Coax.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_DELAY Sets the electrical delay value for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_FMAXIMUM Sets the maximum frequency for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_FMINIMUM Sets the minimum frequency for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_IMPEDANCE Sets the characteristic impedance for the selected standard. Default 50.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_LABEL Sets the label for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_LOSS Sets the insertion loss for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_SDESCRIPTION Modifies the description of the selected standard of the selected kit.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_TZIMAG Sets the TZImag component value of the Terminal Impedance for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_STANDARD_TZREAL Sets the TZReal component value of the Terminal Impedance for the selected standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_TRL_OPTION_IMPEDANCE Sets the reference impedance when using this TRL cal kit. Default Line.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_TRL_OPTION_LRL_CHAR This setting ONLY applies if an LRL Cal Kit is being modified AND Testport Reference Plane is set to THRU AND the TRL Thru class standard and the TRL Line/Match class standard both have the same values for Offset Z0 and Loss. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_CKIT_TRL_OPTION_RPLANE Sets the reference impedance when using this cal kit. Default Thru.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_CHANNEL_MODE Determines whether or not to honor the channel argument in guided calibration SCPI commands.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_ECAL_SELECT Specifies the Ecal Kit for Ecal Calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_ISOLATION_AVERAGE_INCR Specifies amount to increment (increase) the channels averaging factor during measurement of isolation standards in a guided calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_LIST_STEP_NO Number of calibration standard connection steps for the calibration. Choose number from 1 to 1000.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PREFERENCE_SLIDING_LOAD Specifies the behavior for guided cal steps that involve a sliding load in a cal that is about to be performed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_CKIT Specifies the calibration kit to be used when an adapter is necessary to connect the power sensor to the port during a guided calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_CONNECTOR Specifies the connector type for a power sensor when a power calibration is part of the Guided Calibration process.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_ITEM_NUMBER Power sensor item number.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_MULT_CKIT Set and read the Cal Kit to be used when an adapter is necessary to connect the power sensor to the cal plane and you choose to remove its effects from the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_MULT_CONNECTOR Set and read the connector type of a power sensor to be used when an adapter is necessary to connect the power sensor to the cal plane and you choose to remove its effects from the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_MULT_FREQ_START Set and read the start frequency for the specified power sensor (port number).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_MULT_FREQ_STOP Set and read the stop frequency for the specified power sensor (port number).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_MULT_NAME Set and read the name of the power sensor.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_MULT_STATE Enables the use of multiple power sensors to calibrate the entire frequency span of the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_PORT_NO Source port number of the VNA. Choose any number between 1 and 50. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_POWER_LEVEL Specifies the power level in dBm at which to perform a power calibration during a guided calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_GUIDED_PSENSOR_STATE Enables Guided Power Cal and sets the source port to be calibrated.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_IDLE_TRIGGER This command enables/disables asynchronous sweeping during a calibration acquisition. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_ISOLATION_AVERAGE_INCREMENT Specifies amount to increment (increase) the channel averaging factor during isolation measurement of the ECal module during an unguided ECal calibration. Default 8.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_ISOLATION_ECAL_STATE Specifies whether or not the isolation state of the ECal module will be measured as part of an unguided ECal calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_METHOD For UNGUIDED calibration, sets the calibration method (also known as 'Calibration Type' on calibration dialog box.)
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_NOISE_ENR_ADAPTER_DEEMBED Set and read the state of ENR Adapter de-embedding. Default O - OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_NOISE_PSENSOR_ADAPTER_DEEMBED Set and read the state of power sensor adapter de-embedding. Default O - OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_COLLECT_NOISE_THRU_ADAPTER_DEEMBED Set and read the state of the thru adapter de-embedding. Default O - OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CSET_DESCRIPTION Sets or returns the descriptive string assigned to the selected Cal Set.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CSET_GENERATE_RECEIVER This command converts the selected Cal Set from an S-parameter Cal Set to an S-parameter+Power Cal Set.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_CSET_NAME Sets or queries the name of the Cal Set currently applied to the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_ENR_CAL_TABLE_ID_DATA Sets and returns ID of ENR table.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_ENR_CAL_TABLE_SERIAL_DATA Sets and returns the serial number of noise source.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_GC_SETUP_POWER Set and read the power level at which to perform the Source Power Cal portion of a Gain Compression (Opt S93086A/B) Calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_GC_SETUP_SENSOR_CKIT Set and read the cal kit to be used for calibrating at the port 1 reference plane when the power sensor connector is different from the DUT port 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_GC_SETUP_SENSOR_CONNECTOR Set and read the power sensor connector type which is used to perform the Source Power Cal portion of a Gain Compression Calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_IMPEDANCE_INPUT_MAGNITUDE Sets and returns the system impedance value for the analyzer. Default 50.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_INTERPOLATE_STATE Turns correction interpolation ON or OFF. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_METHODS_MATCH Turns match-correction ON or OFF. Use this command AFTER performing an Guided Power Cal. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_METHODS_PORT_SUBSET_STATE Enabling the port subset correction.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_MODEL Sets and returns the error term model. Default Term10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_PREFERENCE_CSET_SAVE Specifies the default manner in which calibrations that are performed using SCPI or COM are to be stored. Default CalRegister.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_PREFERENCE_ECAL_ORIENTATION_STATE Specifies whether or not the VNA should perform orientation of the ECal module during calibration. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_PREFERENCE_ECAL_OVERRANGE_STATE Sets and returns the ECAL over range state. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_RPOWER_OFFSET Adjusts a receiver power cal to account for components or adapters that are added between the source port and receiver while performing this cal. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_RVELOCITY_COAX Sets the velocity factor to be used with Electrical Delay and Port Extensions. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_SFORWARD_STATE Sets the direction a calibration will be performed when only one set of standards is used. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_STATE Turns error correction ON and OFF for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_TCOLD_USER_VALUE Sets and returns the temperature of the noise source connector.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_TSTANDARDS_STATE Specifies the acquisition of calibration data using ONE or TWO sets of standards. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_WAVE_METHOD Sets and returns the wave correction method. Default MATC.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_CORRECTION_WAVE_NORM_METHOD Sets and returns the wave normalization method. Deafult POW.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_COUPLE_MODE Sets the sweep mode as Chopped or Alternate.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_COUPLE_PARAMETER Turns ON and OFF Time Domain Trace Coupling. All of the measurements in the specified channel are coupled.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLE_DIVISOR Sets and reads the value by which the coupled range will be divided to achieve the frequency range specified.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLE_ID Sets and reads the frequency range to couple settings to. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLE_MULTIPLIER Sets and reads the value by which the coupled range will be multiplied to achieve the frequency range specified
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLE_OFFSET Sets and reads the frequency range number to be used as an offset.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLE_STATE Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of frequency range coupling.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_COUPLE_UCONVERT Sets and reads the state of the Up or Down conversion setting.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_IFBW Sets and reads the receiver IF bandwidth setting in Hz. Default 1e5.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_NO Frequency range number. It starts from 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_START Sets and reads the start value for the specified frequency range.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_FREQUENCY_RANGE_STOP Sets and reads the stop value for the specified frequency range.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_MATCH_RANGE Sets and reads the existing frequency ranges over which Match Correction is to be performed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_MATCH_RRECEIVER Sets and reads the reference receiver to be used to perform Match Correction.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_MATCH_STATE Sets and reads the Match Correction ON/OFF state.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_MATCH_TRECEIVER Sets and reads the test port receiver to be used to perform Match Correction.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_NO Source port number of the VNA. Choose any number between 1 and 50. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_PHASE_PARAMETER Sets and reads the receivers to be used to measure the phase of the sources.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_PHASE_REFERENCE Sets and reads the port to be used as a reference when controlling phase for the specified port.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_PHASE_START Sets and reads the start value for a phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_PHASE_STATE Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of phase control.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_PHASE_STOP Sets and reads the stop value for a phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_PHASE_SWEEP Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of phase sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_POWER_ALC_MODE Sets and reads the leveling mode to be used for the specified source port.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_POWER_ATTENUATION Sets and reads the amount of source attenuation.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_POWER_ATTENUATION_AUTO Sets and reads the ON or OFF state of auto range source attenuation.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_POWER_START Sets and reads the start value of a power sweep in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_POWER_STOP Sets and reads the stop value of a power sweep in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_POWER_SWEEP Sets and reads the state of sweeping power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_RANGE Sets and reads the frequency range number to which the specified source port will be set. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DIQ_PORT_STATE Sets and reads the ON / OFF state of the source specified by port.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_ADC_FILTER_TYPE Selects between a narrow and wide IF filter anti-aliasing path.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_EVM_NORMALIZE Sets and returns the scaling factor applied to the EVM measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_ACP_LOWER_IBW Sets and returns the integration bandwidth (IBW) of the lower ACP measurement. Default 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_ACP_LOWER_OFFSET Sets and returns the lower ACP measurement offset. Default -100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_ACP_UPPER_IBW Sets and returns the integration bandwidth (IBW) of the upper ACP measurement. Defqault 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_ACP_UPPER_OFFSET Sets and returns the upper ACP measurement offset. Default 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_CARRIER_IBW Sets and returns the carrier (Signal) integration bandwidth (IBW) for the distortion measurement. Default 100MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_CARRIER_OFFSET Sets and returns the carrier offset (Signal). Offsets the Carrier integration bandwidth relative to the Carrier LO used to generate the modulation signal. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_NAME Assigns a name to the specified distortion measurement band. Default "NewBand".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_NO Band number from 1 - 100. If unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_NOTCH_IBW Sets and returns the notch integration bandwidth (IBW) for an NPR Notch modulation measurement. Default 10MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_NOTCH_OFFSET Sets and returns the notch offset for an NPR Notch modulation measurement. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_BAND_TYPE Set and read the modulation distortion type.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_CORRELATION_APERTURE Sets and returns the frequency span window used for modeling the DUT's gain and distortion. Default 500000.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_CORRELATION_APERTURE_AUTO Enable or disable automatic calculation of the frequency span window used for modeling the DUT's gain and distortion.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_FILTER Sets the measurement filter to either None (default) or RRC (root-raised-cosine filter) for EVM and ACP measurements only. Default None.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_FILTER_ALPHA Sets and returns the Alpha factor of the measurement filter.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_FILTER_SRATE Sets and returns the Symbol Rate of the filter.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MEASURE_FILTER_SRATE_AUTO Enables or disables using the symbol rate from the file.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_MODULATE_SOURCE Sets and returns the distortion modulation source name.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PATH_DUT_INPUT Sets and returns the VNA port number connected to the DUT input. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PATH_DUT_NOMINAL_GAIN Sets and returns the nominal DUT gain. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PATH_DUT_NOMINAL_NF Sets and returns the nominal DUT noise figure. This value is used by the EVM measurement. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PATH_DUT_NOMINAL_NF_INCLUDE Include or exclude the nominal DUT noise figure value. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PATH_DUT_OUTPUT Sets and returns the VNA port number connected to the DUT output. Default 2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PATH_SOURCE_ATTENUATION_INCLUDE Enables or disables the external modulated source to pass through the attenuator of the specified PNA source and the attenuator setting is used to calculate the power levels.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PATH_SOURCE_NOMINAL_AMPLIFIER Sets and returns the nominal gain of an external source amplifier. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_PULSE_RECEIVER_AUTO Enables or disables receiver timing auto generation from the source pulse timing.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_CARRIER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the carrier center frequency. Default 1.5GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_DWELL Sets and returns the delay in seconds before the test signal to allow the RF source to settle. Default 0s.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LEVEL Sets and returns the carrier power level used for the distortion test at either the input or output of the DUT. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LEVEL_PORT Set and read where to apply power to the DUT (input or output). Default DIN1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LEVEL_TYPE Selects between a ramp type power sweep or a list of power values to define a power sweep. Default Ramp.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_LEVEL Sets and returns the power level used for the specified row in the power sweep list table. Default -10 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_NBW Sets and returns the noise bandwidth setting used for the specified row in the power sweep list table. Default 100Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_NBW_MODE Selects the noise bandwidth mode in the power sweep list table. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_POINTS Sets and returns the number of power points to measure for the power sweep list measurement. Default 11.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_REC_ATT Sets and returns the receiver attenuation for the specified row in the power sweep list table. 0dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_REC_ATT_MODE Selects the receiver attenuation mode in the power sweep list table. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_SOUR_ATT Sets and returns the source attenuation for the specified row in the power sweep list table. Default 0dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_LIST_SOUR_ATT_MODE Selects the source attenuation mode in the power sweep list table. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_RAMP_LEVEL_START Sets and returns the starting power level for the power sweep ramp measurement. Default -20dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_RAMP_LEVEL_STOP Sets and returns the stop power level for the power sweep ramp measurement. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_RAMP_NBW_AUTO Enable or disable increasing noise bandwidth at high powers automatically for faster measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_RAMP_POINTS Sets and returns the number of power points to measure for the power sweep ramp measurement. Default 11.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_CARRIER_SWEEP_NO Power sweep row number. If unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_POWER_SPARAM_LEVEL Sets and returns the power level used to measure the DUT S-parameters when operating in its linear region. Default -30dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_SPARAM_BWIDTH Sets and returns the IF bandwidth for the linear S21 sweep. Default 1 kHz
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_SPARAM_REUSE Enable or disable the re-use of the previous linear S-parameter measurements if available and skip sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_SPARAM_STATE Enable or disable S-parameter sweep. If disabled, curve fitting (smoothing) is used instead of the S-parameter sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_SPARAM_STEP Sets and returns the step size for the linear S21 sweep. Default 1 MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_SWEEP_TYPE Selects between a fixed or power sweep type of sweep. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_TABLE_DISPLAY_FONT Selects between a small and medium sized font displayed below the trace area of the display. Default Small.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_DISTORTION_TABLE_DISPLAY_SORT Selects between sorting the modulation distortion table by band or by power. Default Band.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_DISPLAY_SELECT Select the range to be displayed on the VNA x-axis. All traces in the channel have this same x-axis scaling. Default "Receivers".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_COUPLED Sets and returns the state of coupling (ON or OFF) of the specified range to the primary range.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_FREQUENCY_CW Sets and returns the CW frequency (in Hz).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_FREQUENCY_DIVISOR Sets and returns the divisor value. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_FREQUENCY_MULTIPLIER Sets and returns the multiplier value to be used when coupling this range to the primary range. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_FREQUENCY_OFFSET Sets and returns the offset value to be used when coupling this range to the primary range. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_FREQUENCY_START Sets and returns the Start value of frequency range (in Hz). Default - Minimum frequency of the VNA.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets and returns the Stop value of frequency range (in Hz). Default - Maximum frequency of the VNA.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_NO Range number. If unspecified, value is set to 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_RANGE_SWEEP_TYPE Sets and returns the sweep type to be used with the specified range. Default Linear
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FOM_STATE Turns Frequency Offset ON and OFF. Frequency offset settings are not enabled until this setting is ON.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FREQUENCY_CENTER Sets or returns the center frequency of the analyzer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FREQUENCY_CENTER_STEP_AUTO Sets and reads how the center frequency step size is set. When TRUE, center steps by 5% of span. When FALSE, center steps by step size value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FREQUENCY_CENTER_STEP_SIZE Sets or returns the center frequency step size of the analyzer in Hz. This command sets the manual step size.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FREQUENCY_CW Sets or returns the Continuous Wave (or Fixed) frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FREQUENCY_SPAN Sets or returns the frequency span of the analyzer in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FREQUENCY_START Sets or returns the start frequency of the analyzer in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets or returns the stop frequency of the analyzer in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_AMODE Set and read the method by which gain compression data is acquired. Default SmartSweep
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_ALGORITHM Set and read the algorithm method used to compute gain compression. Default LinearGain.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_BACKOFF_LEVEL Set and read value for the BackOff compression algorithm in dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_DELTA_X Set and read the 'X' value in the delta X or Y compression algorithm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_DELTA_Y Set and read the 'Y' value in the delta X or Y compression algorithm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_INTERPOLATE Sets whether or not interpolation should be performed on 2D measured compression data.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_LEVEL Set and read the desired gain reduction (from reference gain).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_PHASE_LEVEL Set and read the desired phase to measure compression.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_PHASE_MODE Set and read compression format to be either magnitude, phase, or magnitude and phase. Default Magnitude.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_COMPRESSION_SATURATION_LEVEL Set and read the deviation dB from the maximum Pout. This is the point of saturation.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_EOS_OPERATION This setting is used to protect a sensitive device from too much power during the sweep retrace. Default Standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_PMAP_SOURCE_OVERRIDE This function is used when GCX channels with a reference mixer and one GCA channel without a reference mixer are set up simultaneously and you want to use the same path configuration for all channels. This remaps the source port to Port 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_POWER_LINEAR_INPUT_COMPUTE_APERTURE Set and read the aperture to use when computing the linear input power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_POWER_LINEAR_INPUT_LEVEL Set and read the input power at which Linear Gain and all S-parameters are measured.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_POWER_REVERSE_LEVEL Set and read the reverse power level to the DUT.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_POWER_START_LEVEL Set and read the start power level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_POWER_STOP_LEVEL Set and read the stop power level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SAFE_CP_ADJUSTMENT Set and read the Safe Sweep COARSE power adjustment in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SAFE_DC_MLIMIT Set and read the maximum limit of the external DC device. Default -5.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SAFE_DC_PARAMETER Set and read the name of the external DC device.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SAFE_ENABLE Set and read the (ON or OFF) state of Safe Sweep mode.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SAFE_FP_ADJUSTMENT Set and read the Safe Sweep FINE power adjustment in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SAFE_MLIMIT When the VNA port that is connected to the DUT Output measures this value, the input power to the DUT is no longer incremented at that frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SAFE_THRESHOLD Set and read the compression level in which Safe Sweep changes from the COARSE power adjustment to the FINE power adjustment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SMART_CDC Set and read the DC readings at the compression point in the last iteration of a smart sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SMART_MITERATIONS Set and read the maximum permitted number of iterations which SMART Sweep may utilize to find the desired compression level, to within the specified tolerance.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SMART_SITERATIONS Set and read enable for showing intermediate results for each iteration of SMART Sweep
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SMART_STIME Set and read the amount of time SMART Sweep will dwell at the first point where the input power changes by the Backoff or X level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SMART_TOLERANCE Set and read the acceptable range SMART Sweep will allow for the measured compression level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SWEEP_FREQUENCY_POINTS Set and read the number of data points in each frequency sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SWEEP_POWER_POINTS Set and read the number of data points in each power sweep. Default 21.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SWEEP_POWER_SMOOTH Set and read the state of the power smoothing.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_GC_SETUP_SWEEP_POWER_SMOOTH_APERTURE Set and read the power smoothing aperture in percent. Default 25.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IF_FILTER_AUTO Sets and returns whether the VNA configures the 3-stage digital filter settings or they will be configured manually. When making manual settings.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IF_FILTER_BANDWIDTH_FILTER Sets and returns the IF bandwidth filter shape.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IF_FILTER_CMODE Sets and returns the ADC capture mode modeled as a 2-pole switch in the above diagram.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IF_FILTER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the IF frequency for ALL receiver paths being used for the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IF_FILTER_FREQUENCY_AUTO Sets and returns the method for specifying the way the IF Frequency is determined.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IF_FILTER_STAGE1_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the Numerically Controlled Oscillator (NCO) frequency. Default Nominal IF Frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IF_FILTER_STAGE3_TYPE Sets and returns the Stage 3 filter type. Default Tukey.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_DFREQUENCY Sets and returns fixed tone spacing. Default 1MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_DFREQUENCY_START Sets and returns the starting main tone separation for sweep type DFRequency (delta frequency). Default 1MHz
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_DFREQUENCY_STOP Sets and returns the stopping main tone separation for sweep type DFRequency (delta frequency). Default 10MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_F1 Sets and returns the frequency of the F1 tone. Default 0.9995 GHz
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_F2 Sets and returns the frequency of the F2 tone. Default 1.0005 GHz
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_FCENTER Sets and returns the center frequency of the main tones. Default 1.0GHz
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_FCENTER_CENTER Sets and returns the sweep center frequency when sweeping the main tones. Default 13.255 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_FCENTER_SPAN Sets and returns the frequency span when sweeping the main tones. 26.489 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_FCENTER_START Sets and returns the start frequency when sweeping the main tones. Default 10.4 MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_FREQUENCY_FCENTER_STOP Sets and returns the stop frequency when sweeping the main tones. Default 26.4995 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_IFBWIDTH_IMTONE Sets and returns the IF Bandwidth for measurement of the intermodulation products. Default 1kHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_IFBWIDTH_MAIN Sets and returns the IF Bandwidth for measurement of the main F1 and F2 tones. Default 1kHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_SWEEP_TYPE Sets and returns the sweep type for the IMD measurement. Default CenterFrequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_COUPLE Sets and returns the state of power coupling for F1 and F2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_F1 Sets and returns the power level of the F1 tone. Default -24dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_F1_START Sets and returns the start power level of the F1 tone. Default -24 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_F1_STOP Sets and returns the stop power level of the F1 tone. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_F2 Sets and returns the power level of the F2 tone. Default -24 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_F2_START Sets and returns the start power level of the F2 tone. Default -24 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_F2_STOP Sets and returns the stop power level of the F2 tone. Default -10dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_IMD_TPOWER_LEVEL Sets and returns the tone power leveling mode. Default None.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_ELO_STATE Sets and returns the ON or OFF state of Embedded LO.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_IF_FREQUENCY_SIDEBAND When two LO stages are used, sets or returns whether to select the sum or difference for the IF1 product.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_IF_FREQUENCY_START Sets or returns the IF start frequency value of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_IF_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets or returns the stop frequency value of the mixer IF frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_FREQUENCY_DENOMINATOR Sets or returns the denominator value of the Input Fractional Multiplier.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_FREQUENCY_FIXED Sets or returns the fixed frequency of the input.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_FREQUENCY_MODE Sets or returns the Input sweep mode. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_FREQUENCY_NUMERATOR Sets or returns the numerator value of the Input Fractional Multiplier.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_FREQUENCY_START Sets or returns the Input start frequency value of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets or returns the Input stop frequency value of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_POWER Sets or returns the value of the Input Power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_POWER_START Sets the input start power for a power sweep in a mixer channel like SMC. The value is only used when the sweep type is power sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_POWER_STOP Sets the input stop power for a power sweep in a mixer channel . The value is only used when the sweep type is power sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_INPUT_POWER_USE_NOMINAL Toggles the Use Nominal Incident Power setting ON and OFF. This setting is ONLY to be used with SMC measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_DENOMINATOR Sets or returns the denominator value of the LO Fractional Multiplier. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_FREQUENCY_FIXED Sets or returns the fixed frequency of the specified mixer LO.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_FREQUENCY_ILTI Specifies whether to use the Input frequency that is greater than the LO or less than the LO.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_FREQUENCY_MODE Sets or returns the LO sweep mode. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_FREQUENCY_START Sets or returns the LO start frequency value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets or returns the LO stop frequency value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_NAME ets or returns the name of the VNA internal source or external source to use as the LO in a converter measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_NUMERATOR Sets or returns the numerator value of the LO Fractional Multiplier.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_POWER Sets or returns the LO Power fixed value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_POWER_START For an LO power sweep, sets or returns the LO power start value. Default -20 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_POWER_STOP For an LO power sweep, sets or returns the LO power stop value. Default -10 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_LO_STAGE_NO LO stage number. Choose 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_NORMALIZE_POINT Sets or returns the data point for normalizing the phase measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_OUTPUT_FREQUENCY_FIXED Sets or returns the output fixed frequency of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_OUTPUT_FREQUENCY_MODE Sets or returns the Output sweep mode. Default Fixed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_OUTPUT_FREQUENCY_SIDEBAND Specify whether to select the sum (High) or difference (Low) products.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_OUTPUT_FREQUENCY_START Sets or returns the Output start frequency of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_OUTPUT_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets or returns the Output stop frequency of the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_PHASE_ABSOLUTE_STATE Sets and returns the state of SMC Phase measurements to use absolute phase
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_PHASE_STATE Sets and returns the state of SMC Phase measurements and calibrations.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_STAGE Number of IF stages (LOs) used in the mixer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_MIXER_X_AXIS Sets or returns the swept frequency range to display on the X-axis for the IMDx or NFx channel. Default Output.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_AVERAGE_COUNT Set and read the averaging factor for the noise receiver.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_AVERAGE_STATE Turns noise averaging ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_BWIDTH Set and read the bandwidth of the noise receiver.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_GAIN Set and read the amount of gain for the noise receiver.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_GAIN_CTCHECK Turns noise threshold checking ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_IMPEDANCE_COUNT Sets the number of impedance states to use during calibrated measurements.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_NARROWBAND_STATE Turns narrowband noise figure compensation ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_PULL_STATE Enables and disables the use of source pull technique to compute S22.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_RECEIVER
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_TEMPERATURE_AMBIENT Sets the temperature at which the current noise measurement is occurring. Default 295 Kelvin.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_NOISE_TEMPERATURE_AMBIENT_AUTO If ON, will use 302K as the ambient temperature when vector correction is applied and the tuner is an ECal or internal tuner. If OFF, will use the specified ambient temperature.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PATH_CONFIG_DTEXT Write and read descriptive text associated with the configuration.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_ADJUST_CONFIGURE_FREQUENCY_SEARCH Enables and disables a broadband carrier search within the range specified. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_ADJUST_CONFIGURE_LEVEL_THRESHOLD Sets and returns the threshold to use during a carrier search. Default -20dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_ATTENUATION_AUTO Enable and disable the automatic attenuation control. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_ATTENUATION_VALUE Sets the attenuation level for the selected channel. The range is from 0 to 30 dB with the step size 1 dB. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_BASEBAND_GAIN Sets and returns the setting for baseband gain. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_BASEBAND_INPUT_COUPLING Sets and returns the setting for baseband input. Default ACLF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_BWIDTH_RATIO Sets and returns the resolution bandwidth ratio, which is the specified resolution bandwidth percentage of every half decade offset frequency. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_COMPOSITION_MODEL Choose decomposition model of AM/PM composite measurement range. Default 4.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_COMPOSITION_RANGE Choose the range of AM/PM composite measurement. Default R30.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_CORRELATION_COUNT Sets and returns the cross correlation count number. Correlation count number from 1 to 100,000. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_FAVERAGE_FACTOR Sets and returns the FFT average factor number. FFT average factor number from 1 to 10,000. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_NTYPE Sets and returns the noise type to phase, residual or baseband noise. Default Phase.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_POWER_INPUT_CORRECTION_STATE Enable and disable the power correction. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_PULSE_PERIOD Set or returns Pulse period for phase noise measurement. Default 100E-6.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_PULSE_STATE Enables or disables Pulse setup for phase noise measurement. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_SEGMENT_BWIDTH Sets and returns the resolution bandwidth for each phase noise segment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_SEGMENT_CORRELATION_COUNT Sets and returns the cross correlation count number for each phase noise segment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_SEGMENT_NO Set this property before using any PN segment command. Choose segment number either equal to or greater than 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_SWEEP_CARRIER_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the carrier frequency. Default 1 GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_SWEEP_NOISE_MODE Sets and returns the sweep noise mode. Default Normal.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_SWEEP_OFFSET_EXTEND Sets and returns the Offset frequency extension status. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_SWEEP_TYPE Sets and returns the phase noise sweep type to logarithmic or segment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PN_XGINDICATOR This command turns the cross-correlation gain indicator on and off. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PULSE_MODE Sets the specific PULSe4 behavior to either “All" ADC Activity or "Trace" ADC Activity. Default All.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PULSE_OPTION Turns pulse4 output ON and OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_PULSE_TPOLARITY
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ROSCILLATOR_CONTROL_AUTO Enables selecting between locking to an external reference without the ability to change the reference frequency, or select internal or external reference with the ability to change the reference frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ROSCILLATOR_EXTERNAL_FREQUENCY Set and read Reference Oscillator frequency at the reference input connector. Default 1E+7.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ROSCILLATOR_EXTERNAL_FREQUENCY_AUTO When enabled, Reference Oscillator frequency is measured with internal hardware and set automatically.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ROSCILLATOR_OUTPUT_FREQUENCY Set and read Reference Oscillator frequency outputted from the reference output connector. Default 1E+7.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_ROSCILLATOR_SOURCE Set and read the Reference Oscillator state. Default Internal.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_DITHER Set and read the ON or OFF state of the FFT grid dither setting
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_FILTER Set and read the ADC filter cutoff frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_FILTER_AUTO Set and read how the ADC filter is set. When ON, the ADC filter is set based on the start and stop frequencies and the ADC sampling frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_MREC_PERIOD Set and read the period to wait between ADC record chunks.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_MREC_SIZE Set and read the size of the ADC record chunks.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_MREC_STATE Set and read the ON or OFF state of the multiple recording function.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_OVERLOAD_PERCENT Set and read the ADC overload threshold percentage. Default 80.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_RECORD_SIZE_FORCE Set and read the ADC record size mode.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_RECORD_SIZE_FORCE_VALUE Set and read the integer size value for the force ADC record size feature.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_SAMPLE_DECIMATION_FIR Set and read the FIR filter for 25 MHz decimation.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_SAMPLE_RATE Set and read the IQ sample rate.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_SAMPLE_RATE_AUTO Set and read the ADC sample rate mode.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_STACKING_STATE Set and read the ON or OFF state of the ADC sample stacking.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_ADC_STACKING_VALUE Set and read the ADC stacking value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH Set and read the resolution bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH_RESOLUTION_AUTO Set and read how the resolution bandwidth is set. When ON, the resolution bandwidth is set based on Span or RBW ratio.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH_SEARCH_OCCUPIED_MIN Set and read the minimum search frequency to use during an Occupied BW search measurement. Default 250MHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH_SHAPE Set and read the resolution bandwidth shape. Default Gaussian.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH_VIDEO Set and read the video bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH_VIDEO_AUTO Set and read how the video bandwidth is set. When ON, video bandwidth is set based on RBW or VBW ratio.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH_VIDEO_AVER_TYPE Set and read the averaging type. Default Power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_BANDWIDTH_VIDEO_RATIO Set and read the RBW or VBW ratio. Default 1.0
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_LOFTHRU_MONITOR Set and read the LO feedthru monitoring state.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_LOFTHRU_MONITOR_RECEIVER Set and read the target receiver for LO Feedthru monitor. Select the reference receiver in most cases. Default "a1".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_LOFTHRU_MONITOR_TOLERANCE Set and read the threshold level for warning. Default -40.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_LOFTHRU_MONITOR_TYPE Set and read the monitoring method for LO feedthru monitor. Default Band power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_DATA Set and read the data display mode. Default All.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_HREJECT Set and read the number of test signal harmonics you want to be protected against. This adds constraints to the list of LOs used to cover the span. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_NYQREJECT Sets and returns the Nyquist protection level. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_PERIOD Set and read the test signal repetition rate (in seconds). Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_REFERENCE Set and read the multitone image rejection offset frequency. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_SPACING Set and read the tone spacing of the multitone signal (in Hz). Default 1000000.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_MULTITONE_STATE Enables or disables multitone image rejection.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_DISPLAY_LEVEL Set and read the phase display minimum level in dBm. Default -60 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STATE Enables or disables phase computing.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING Enable or disable phase stitching.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_COMMON Enables or disables selected receiver, or receiver with highest energy in the overlap area, to drive the phase stitching for all receivers.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_HW_TSTAMP Enables or disables phase stitching using hardware time stamps to determine the phase of each LO acquisition and stitch them back together with phase consistency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_LEVEL Set and read the minimum tone power level to perform phase stitching in dBm. Default -150 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_RECEIVER_AUTO Set and read the receiver for stitching automatically.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PHASE_STITCHING_RECEIVER_NAME Assigns a specified receiver for phase stitching. Default R1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_COUNT Set and read the maximum pulse search count. Default 100.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_DUTY_TOLERANCE Set and read the duty cycle tolerance.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_PERIOD Set and read the period starting point in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_PERIOD_TOLERANCE Set and read the period tolerance. Only solutions that ensure this tolerance will be accepted.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_PRIORITY Set and read the priority choice for the search algorithm. Default Width.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_WIDTH Set and read the width starting point in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_PULSE_SEARCH_WIDTH_TOLERANCE Set and read the width tolerance. Only solutions that ensure this tolerance will be accepted.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_VECTOR_AVERAGE Set and read the ON or OFF state of the vector averaging.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_COHERENCE_VECTOR_AVERAGE_VALUE Set and read the vector averaging value.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FIFO_STATE Enables or disables exporting data to the FIFO (First-IN, First-OUT) data buffer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FILE_BINARY_STATE Enables or disables binary file (.bin) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FILE_ERASE Enables or disables erasing output data files after each sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FILE_PREFIX Set and return the file name prefix for the data file.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FILE_TEXT Enables or disables text file (.txt) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FILE_TEXT_MARKERS Enables or disables adding marker data to the text file (.txt) output.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FILE_TEXT_MARKERS_ALL Enables or disables adding all marker data to the text file (.txt) output.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_FILE_TEXT_VERBOSE Enables or disables exporting frequency and data for text files.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_IQ_ALIGNED Enable or disable recomputing the advanced IQ parameters (IQ center, IQ sample rate, IQ number of points) automatically if a SA sweep parameter change is performed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_IQ_CARRIER_FREQUENCY Set and read the IQ carrier frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_IQ_FILE_BINARY Enables or disables binary file (.bin) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_IQ_FILE_TEXT Enables or disables text file (.txt) output. Data is not exported until the next new sweep occurs.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_IQ_SAMPLE_COUNT Set and read the number of IQ samples.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_IQ_SAMPLE_RATE Set and read the IQ sample rate.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_IQ_STATE Enable or disable computing time domain IQ.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_KEEP_RECEIVERS_LIST
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_KEEP_STATE Set and read the ON or OFF state of the end of sweep processing.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_RECEIVERS_LIST Set and read the list of receivers to export. The order set using this command will determine the order in which data will be exported to the FIFO data buffer.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_SHARED_NAME Assigns a specified name to the Microsoft Windows shared data mechanism.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_SHARED_STATE Enables or disables exporting data to shared memory, which is the fastest way to transfer data between applications.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_THRESHOLD_STATE Enables or disables data level threshold mode
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_THRESHOLD_VALUE Set and read the threshold value (dBm). Default -60 dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DATA_TYPE Set and read the data format.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DETECTOR_BYPASS Set and read the ON or OFF state of the detector bypass setting.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DETECTOR_FUNCTION Set and read the detector type. Default Peak.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DFT_BANDWIDTH_AUTO Set and read the default values for DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DFT_BANDWIDTH_NARROW_MAX Set and read the maximum value for narrow DFT bandwidth.
