KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DFT_BANDWIDTH_NARROW_MIN Set and read the minimum value for narrow DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DFT_BANDWIDTH_WIDE_MAX Set and read the maximum value for wide DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DFT_BANDWIDTH_WIDE_MIN Set and read the minimum value for wide DFT bandwidth.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_DFT_TYPE Set and return the DFT record size type. Default Radix.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FFT_DITHER Set and read the ON or OFF state of the FFT grid dither setting
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER Set and read the ON on OFF state of the dual band configuration for fast setting of the frequency converter DUT.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER_INPUT_CENTER Set and read the frequency converter DUT input center frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER_INPUT_PORT Set and read the port number of the VNA connected to the input of the frequency converter DUT. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER_INPUT_SOURCE Set and read the source name that generates the modulated signal. Default "None".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER_OUTPUT_CENTER Set and read the frequency converter DUT output center frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER_OUTPUT_INVERTED Enable or disable inverting the spectrum (or mirror) by the frequency converter operation.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER_OUTPUT_OFFSET Set and read the LO offset value in Hz. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_CONVERTER_OUTPUT_PORT Set and read the port number of the VNA connected to the output of the frequency converter DUT. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_FREQUENCY_SPAN_BANDWIDTH_RATIO Set and read the Frequency Span or RBW ratio.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_IMAGE_REJECT Set and read the image reject mode. Default Normal.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_IMAGE_STRENGTH Sets and returns the image rejection strength. Default Medium
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_LO_RANDOM Set and read the LO randomize state.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_LOBASEBAND_STATE Enables and disables baseband sweep independent of the LO sweep to allow signals down to 1 Hz to be analyzed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_LOFORCE Set and read enable force LO to frequency mode.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_LOFORCE_FREQUENCY Set and read enable force LO to the specified frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_LOFORCE_OFFSET_DIVIDER Set and read the divider in the equation for setting LO frequency. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_LOFORCE_OFFSET_MULTIPLIER Set and read the multiplier in the equation for setting LO frequency. Default1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_LOFORCE_OFFSET_SOURCE Set and read the source name in the equation for setting LO frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_DC_SWEEP_FIRST Set and read the DC sweep order.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_DC_SWEEP_POINT Set and read the number of steps the source will make across the specified source DC range.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_DC_SWEEP_STATE Set and read the ON/OFF state of the DC sources.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_CW Set and read the source CW frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_START Set and read the source start frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_STOP Set and read the source stop frequency in Hz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_PORT_NO Source port number of the VNA. Choose any number between 1 and 50. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_POW_SWEEP_POINT_COUNT Set and read the number of steps the source will make across the specified source power range.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_POW_SWEEP_REPEAT_COUNT Set and read the number of SA (receiver) sweeps for each Source Step.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_POWER Set and read the source output power level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_POWER_START Set and read the source start power level in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_POWER_STOP Set and read the source stop power level in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_SWEEP_FIRST Set and read the sweep order.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_SWEEP_POINT_COUNT Set and read the number of steps the source will make across the specified source frequency range.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_SWEEP_REPEAT_COUNT Set and read the number of SA (receiver) sweeps for each Source Step.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_SOURCE_SWEEP_TYPE Set and read the source sweep type. Default CW.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_TRACE_IMAGE Set and read the show or hide state of the image reject traces in the measurement parameters dialog.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_TRIGGER_LEVEL Set and read the ON or OFF state of a measurement trigger event that will occur whenever the ADC level is greater than the value specified
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_TRIGGER_LEVEL_VALUE Set and read the ADC trigger level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_TRIGGER_PERCOUNTER Set and read the ON or OFF state of a measurement trigger event based on the specified period.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SA_TRIGGER_PERCOUNTER_VALUE Set and read the periodic counter value. This command initiates a measurement trigger event based on the specified period.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_ARBITRARY Enables you to setup a segment sweep with arbitrary frequencies.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_BWIDTH Sets the IF Bandwidth for the specified segment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_BWIDTH_CONTROL Specifies whether the IF Bandwidth resolution can be set independently for each segment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_NO Segment number to add, delete or modify.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_POWER_CONTROL Specifies whether Power Level can be set independently for each segment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_STATE Turns the specified sweep segment ON or OFF. At least ONE segment must be ON or Sweep Mode is automatically set to Linear.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_SWEEP_DWELL Sets or returns the sweep dwell time of the specified sweep segment. Default 0s.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_SWEEP_DWELL_CONTROL Turns ON or OFF the sweep dwell time of the specified sweep segment.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SEGMENT_X_SPACING Sets X-axis spacing ON or OFF. Default Linear.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SOURCE_PORT_NO Source port number of the VNA. Choose any number between 1 and 50. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SOURCE_RECEIVER_GAIN_COUPLING_ALL
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_DWELL Sets or returns the dwell time in seconds between each sweep point.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_DWELL_AUTO Specifies whether or not to automatically calculate and set the minimum possible dwell time.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_DWELL_SDELAY Sets or returns the time in seconds to wait just before acquisition begins for each sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_GENERATION Sets sweep as Stepped or Analog.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_GENERATION_POINT_SWEEP Turns ON and OFF point sweep mode.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_GROUPS_COUNT Sets the trigger count (groups) for the specified channel. Set trigger mode to group after setting this count.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_LF_EXTENSION_STATE Turns ON or OFF low frequency extension for extending the range down to 1 kHz start frequency.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_MODE Sets the number of trigger signals the specified channel will ACCEPT.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_POINTS Sets or returns the number of data points for the measurement.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_CW_TIME Sets and returns the state of automatic CW sweep time (used in Pulse Profile mode).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_DETECTMODE_AUTO Set pulse mode automatically or manually (Narrowband or Wideband) for the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_DRIVE_AUTO In Narrowband pulse mode, set the drive for the source modulation automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_IF_GAIN_AUTO In Narrowband pulse mode, set the IF Gain automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_MODE Sets and returns the pulse measurement state for the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_PRF_AUTO In Narrowband pulse mode, choose to set the Pulse Repetition Frequency automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_CLOCK Sets and returns the Primary Clock setting and is controlled by the internal or external pulse generator which is the primary pulse clock.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_FREQUENCY Sets and returns the primary pulse measurement frequency. Default 1KHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_PERIOD Sets and returns the primary pulse period in seconds. Default 1 msec.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_PRIMARY_WIDTH Sets and returns the primary pulse width in seconds. Default 100 microseconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_PROFILE_START Sets and returns the start time of the pulse in seconds. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_PROFILE_STOP Sets and returns the stop time of the pulse in seconds.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_SHAPE Sets and returns the pulse shape type.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_SWGATE_STATE When set to OFF, the improved software gating sensitivity is turned OFF and all data outside the measurement band is zeroed.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_TIMING In Narrowband pulse mode, choose to set the delay and width automatically or manually.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_PULSE_WIDEBAND_STATE Set and read the pulse mode detection method.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_SLOCAL_MAXIMUM Sets the Shift LO maximum frequency for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_SLOCAL_STATE Turns ON or OFF the Shift LO mode for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_SPEED Sets and returns the state of Fast Sweep mode.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_STEP Sets the frequency step size in Hz across the selected frequency range. This effectively sets the number of data points.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_TIME Sets or Returns the time in seconds the analyzer takes to complete one sweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_TIME_AUTO Turns the automatic sweep time function ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_TRIGGER_DELAY Sets and reads the trigger delay in seconds for all measurements in the specified CHANNEL.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_TRIGGER_MODE Sets and reads the trigger mode for the specified channel. This determines what EACH signal will trigger.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_SWEEP_TYPE_FACW Enables Fast CW sweep and sets the number of data points for the channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_NARROW_BAND_NO Narrow Band number. Choose from 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_NARROW_BANDWIDTH_VIDEO Sets and read the Video Band Width (VBW) for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default 1.7M.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_NARROW_FREQUENCY_CENTER Set and read the center frequency for Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default 1G.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_NARROW_FREQUENCY_RANGE Set and read the frequency span of narrow band 1/2. Default R30.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_NARROW_TIME_OFFSET Set and read the offset time at the reference point for the narrow band 1 or 2. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_NARROW_TIME_REFERENCE Set and read the position at the reference point of the narrow band 1 or 2. Default Center.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_NARROW_TIME_SPAN Set and read the time span of the narrow band 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_POWER_INPUT_CORRECTION_STATE Enable and disable the power correction. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_POWER_INPUT_LEVEL_MAXIMUM Set and read the maximum power input level.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_STYPE Sets and read the transition mode, Wide-Narrow or Narrow-Narrow. Default WN.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_TIME_COUPLING Enable and disable the time coupling for two measurements (Wide-Narrow or Narrow1-Narrow2). Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_WIDE_BANDWIDTH_VIDEO Sets and read the Video Band Width (VBW) for Wide Band. Default 250E3.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_WIDE_FREQUENCY_RANGE Set and read the frequency range for wide band. Default R8G.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_WIDE_TIME_OFFSET Set and read the time offset for wide band.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_WIDE_TIME_REFERENCE Set and read the position at the reference point of wide band. Default Center.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_TR_WIDE_TIME_SPAN Set and read the time span of wide band.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_ATTENUATION Set and read manual attenuation setting. Default 20.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_ATTENUATION_AUTO Enable and disable the auto calculate attenuation setting. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_FREQUENCY_BAND Set and read the frequency band. Default R8G.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_FREQUENCY_RESOLUTION Set and read the frequency resolution. Default R10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_POWER_INPUT_CORRECTION_STATE Enable and disable the power correlation. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_POWER_INPUT_LEVEL_AUTO Enable and disable the auto leveling function at pre-measurement. Default 1 (On).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_POWER_INPUT_LEVEL_MAXIMUM Set and read the maximum input level used to calculate attenuation setting in dBm. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SENSE_VCO_SWEEP_SOURCE Set and read the sweep type. Default VControl.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_CHANNEL_NO Channel number of the measurement. Choose any number between: 1 and 500. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_FREQUENCY_BAND Selects the frequency band which include the target VCO frequency. Default R8G
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_ITERATION Set and read the maximum number of readings to take at each data point for iterating the frequency. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_LIMIT_HIGH Set and read the maximum limit of VControl during Auto Tune sequence. Default 18.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_LIMIT_LOW Set and read the minimum limit of VControl during Auto Tune sequence. Default 0.5.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_SENSITIVITY Set and read the sensitivity of VCO (Hz/Volt). This value is used at the first loop of sequence. Default 50.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_STATE Enable and disable the Auto Tune VControl voltage. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_TARGET Set and read the target frequency. Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_AFC_TOLERANCE Set and read the maximum desired deviation from the specified target frequency. Default 1E5.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_ENABLE Sets the ON / Off state of all configured DC sources for the specified channel. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_LNOISE Enable and disable the low noise V Control. Choose from 1 or 0. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_SEQUENCING_STATE Sets and reads the DC output sequencing state. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_DC_SEQUENCING_STIME Sets and reads the DC output sequencing settling time. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_DIMENSION_ORDER Set and read the source frequency domain's order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_DIMENSION_STATE Set and read the source frequency domain's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_FIXED Set and read the fixed frequency value for a specific port. Default 1GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_START Set and read the start frequency value for a specific port. Default Minimum frequency of PNA.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_FREQUENCY_STOP Set and read the stop frequency value for a specific port. Default Maximum frequency of PNA.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_CONTROL_COUPLE_STATE Write and read whether to couple phase control settings (IFBW, Tolerance, Max Iterations). DEfault 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_CONTROL_ITERATION Write and read the maximum number of background phase sweeps to perform. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_CONTROL_TOLERANCE Write and read the tolerance value to be used for background phase sweeps. Default 1 Degree.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_CORRECTION_STATE Write and read whether to use the phase correction offset array. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_DIMENSION_ORDER Set and read the source phase domain's order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_DIMENSION_STATE Set and read the source phase domain's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_EXTERNAL_PORT Sets and returns the internal port that the external port is routed through. Default 3.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_FIXED Write and read the fixed phase value. Deafult 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_MODE Sets and returns the Phase Control mode. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_PARAMETER Write and read the ratioed receivers (parameter) to use for phase control. Default "a1/b1".
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_POFFSET_CORRECTION_STATE Write and read whether to use the ratio amplitude offset array. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_POFFSET_FIXED Write and read the fixed power ratioed value. Default 0 dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_POFFSET_START Write and read the start power ratioed value. Default 0dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_POFFSET_STOP Write and read the stop power ratioed value. Deafult 0 dBc.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_PORT_NO Source port number of the VNA. Choose any number between 1 and 50. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_REFERENCE_PORT Sets and returns the reference port for the Phase Control measurement. Default 3.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_START Write and read the start value of phase sweep. Default 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PHASE_STOP Write and read the stop value of phase sweep. Default 0 degrees.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_MODE Sets and returns the ALC mode for the specified channel and port. Default Internal.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_ACQUISITION_MODE Sets all ports to pre-sweep or point leveling mode for the specified channel. Default PreSweep.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_FAST Sets and returns the state of a separate IFBW setting for leveling sweeps. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_FTYPE Sets and returns the frequency range to use for receiver leveling. Default Auto.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_IFBW Sets and returns the IFBW to be used for leveling sweeps. Default 100 kHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_ITERATION_ENABLE Enables or disables the receiver leveling maximum iteration search function set. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_ITERATION_VALUE Sets and returns the maximum iterations to be used in order to achieve the tolerance setting. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_LSPC Sets and returns the state of Use Last Result for Source Power Cal. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_APERTURE_OFFSET Sets and returns the offset of the frequency aperture used to measure the signal power. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_APERTURE_SPAN Sets and returns the span of the frequency aperture used to measure the signal power. Default 10e6.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_APERTURE_STATE Sets and returns the state of the receiver leveling aperture settings for the specified source for Modulation Distortion measurements. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_MODULATION_BANDWIDTH_NOISE Sets and returns the receiver noise bandwidth value for the specified source for Modulation Distortion measurements. Default 1000.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_OFFSET Sets and returns the offset of the frequency aperture used to measure the signal power. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_REFERENCE Sets and returns the reference receiver to be used with Receiver Leveling.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_MAX Sets and returns the maximum power level for Safe Mode. Default 30 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_MIN Sets and returns the minimum power level for Safe Mode. Default -95 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_STATE Sets and returns the state of Safe Mode. Deafult 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_SAFE_STEP Sets and returns the maximum step power level for Safe Mode. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_STATE Sets and returns the state of Receiver Leveling for the specified source port. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ALC_RECEIVER_TOLERANCE Sets and returns the tolerance value for leveling sweeps. Default 1 dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ATTENUATION_AUTO Turns automatic attenuation control ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ATTENUATION_LEVEL Sets or returns the attenuation level for the selected channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ATTENUATION_RECEIVER_REFERENCE Sets the attenuation level in dB for the specified reference attenuator/port.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_ATTENUATION_RECEIVER_TEST Sets the attenuation level in dB for the specified test attenuator/port.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CENTER Sets or returns the power sweep center power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_AVERAGE_COUNT Sets the maximum number of acquisitions that will be used to acquire one settled reading from the power meter.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_AVERAGE_NTOLERANCE This command allows for settling of the power sensor READINGS.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_DISPLAY_STATE Enables and disables the display of power readings on the VNA screen. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_FCHECK_STATE Enables and disables frequency checking of source power cal acquisition sweeps.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_ITERATION_COUNT This control the number of settled readings taken to produce a single power point during source power cal.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_ITERATION_NTOLERANCE This command describes the number of adjustments to make to the source power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_TABLE_LOSS_STATE Selects which table you want to write to or read from. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_COLLECT_WARN Enables/disables the use of error messages during a source calibration. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_OFFSET Sets or returns a power level offset in dB from the VNA test port power.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_CORRECTION_STATE Enables and disables source power correction for the specified port on the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_COUPLE Turns Port Power Coupling ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_DIMENSION_ORDER Set and read the source power domain's order in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_DIMENSION_STATE Set and read the source power domain's ON/OFF state in the multi-dimensional sweep. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_LEVEL Sets or returns the RF power output level in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_MODE Sets the state of VNA source for the specified port.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_PORT_NO Source port number of the VNA. Choose any number between 1 and 50. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_PORT_START Sets and reads the power sweep start power value in dBm for a specific port. This allows uncoupled forward and reverse power sweep ranges.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_PORT_STOP Sets and reads the power sweep stop power value in dBm for a specific port. This allows uncoupled forward and reverse power sweep ranges.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_SLOPE Sets the RF power slope value in in db/GHz.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_SLOPE_STATE Turns Power Slope ON or OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_SPAN Sets the power sweep span power in dBm.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_START Sets or returns the power sweep start power for ALL ports being used by the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_POWER_STOP Sets or returns the power sweep stop power for ALL ports being used by the specified channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SOURCE_PULSE_MODULATOR_STATE Turns pulse on and off with an external modulation source.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_MARKER Sets and reads the active marker. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_MCLASS Sets and reads the active measurement class. Default Standard.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_PORT Sets or gets the active port number. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_ACTIVE_WINDOW Sets or gets the active window number. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_CALIBRATE_ALL_CALIBRATION_NO Calibration number. Choose any number from 1 to 250. The default is 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_CALIBRATE_ALL_CSET_PREFIX Sets and returns the prefix to be used when saving User Cal Sets that result from the Cal All session.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_CALIBRATE_ALL_IFBW Sets and returns the IFBW in Hz for a Cal All calibration.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_CAPABILITY_HW_POWER_PORT Sets and reads the port number for power range data.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_CAPABILITY_HW_POWER_RANGE_FREQUENCY_START Sets or returns the lower bound of the frequency range used for range based power min and max.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_CAPABILITY_HW_POWER_RANGE_FREQUENCY_STOP Sets or returns the upper bound of the frequency range used for range based power min and max.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_CAPABILITY_HW_POWER_TYPE Sets and reads the type of power range data (specified or typical) to be returned. Default Specified.
KTNA_ATTR_X_SYSTEM_U_PRESET_F_PANEL 'Checks' and 'clears' the enable box on the User Preset dialog box. This only affects subsequent Presets from the front panel user interface.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_AUX_CONNECTOR AUX Trigger connector used to send or receive signals. Choose from 1 or 2. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_CHANNEL_NO Any existing channel number. Choose any number between: 1 and 500. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_ENABLE Turns ON / OFF the trigger output.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_DELAY Specifies the delay in seconds that should be applied by the VNA after the Aux trigger input is received and before the acquisition is made.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_HANDSHAKE Turns handshake ON / OFF.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_POLARITY Specifies the polarity of the trigger IN signal to which the VNA will respond.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_INPUT_ROUTE Specifies the auxiliary trigger input source.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_OUTPUT_DELAY Specifies the delay in seconds that should be applied by the VNA after the Aux trigger output is output and before the acquisition is made.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_OUTPUT_DURATION Specifies the width of the output pulse, which is the time that the Aux trigger output will be asserted.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_OUTPUT_INTERVAL Specifies how often a trigger output signal is sent.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_OUTPUT_POLARITY Specifies the polarity of the Aux Output signal being supplied by the VNA.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_AUXILIARY_OUTPUT_POSITION Specifies whether the aux trigger out signal is sent BEFore or AFTer the acquisition.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_CHANNEL_NO Any existing channel number. Choose any number between: 1 and 500. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_ETTADJUSTMENT Set and read the adjustment time from the external trigger. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_ENABLE Enable and disable the video trigger for the Transient measurement. Default 0 (Off).
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_BAND_NO Sets and Gets Transient narrow band number. Choose from 1 or 2.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_FREQUENCY_HYSTERESIS Set and read the hysteresis value (frequency) for video trigger in Narrow band. Default 1E3.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_FREQUENCY_TARGET Set and read the target frequency value which make a video trigger in Narrow band. Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_HOFF Set and read the holdoff time for Video Trigger in Narrow band. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_POWER_HYSTERESIS Set and read the hysteresis value (Power) for video trigger in Narrow band. Default 10.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_POWER_TARGET Set and read the target power value which make a video trigger in Narrow band. Default 0.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_SLOPE Set and read the trigger edge from positive or negative for video trigger in Narrow band. Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_NARROW_THRESHOLD Set and read the minimum power value which disables the video trigger in Narrow band.- Default -20dB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_SOURCE Set and read the trigger source from Wide, Narrow1 or Narrow2. Default WB.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_WIDE_FREQUENCY_HYSTERESIS Set and read the hysteresis value for video trigger in Wideband. Default 1E3.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_WIDE_FREQUENCY_TARGET Set and read the target frequency value which make a video trigger in Wideband. Default 1E6.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_WIDE_HOFF Set and read the holdoff time for Video Trigger in Wide band. Default 1.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_CHANNEL_TR_VIDEO_WIDE_SLOPE Set and read the trigger edge from positive or negative for video trigger in Wideband. Default Positive.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_DELAY Sets and reads the trigger delay in seconds for ALL channels (globally).
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_READY_POLARITY Specifies the polarity of Ready for Trigger output.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_READY_SOURCE_MANUAL_ENABLE Sets the mode of Ready for Trigger output.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_ROUTE_INPUT Specifies the connector to use for the external trigger input.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_ROUTE_READY Specifies the connector to use for the trigger OUT ready line.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_SCOPE Specifies whether a trigger signal is sent to all channels or only the current channel.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_SLOPE Specifies the polarity expected by the external trigger input circuitry.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_SOURCE Sets the source of the sweep trigger signal.
KTNA_ATTR_X_TRIGGER_TYPE Specifies the type of EXTERNAL trigger input detection used to listen for signals on the Meas Trig IN connectors. Edge triggers are most commonly used.
